Joshua4:1 Lettu manennana iyaro bangsaé ri liweng
Joshua4:2 “Piléno seppulo duwa tau
Joshua4:3 Paréntangngi mennang untu' mala seppulo duwa batu polé ri tengnga-tengngana Salo Yordan
Joshua4:4 Nanaobbini Yosua iya seppulo duwa tau iya ripiléro
Joshua4:5 nainappa makkeda
Joshua4:6 Iyaro batu-batué naparéngngerangiwi matu bangsaéwé lao ri aga iya puraé napogau' Puwangnge. Ri munri rékko makkutanai ana'-ana'mu aga bettuwanna iyaé batu-batué untu' alému
Joshua4:7 sitinajako paissengiwi mennang makkedaé uwaina Salo Yordan pettui wettunna Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge ritiwi malléttoiwi saloéro. Iyaro batu-batué tuli naparéngngerangiwi matu bangsa Israélié lao ri aga iya kajajiyangngé kuwaé.”
Joshua4:8 Napogau'ni iya seppulo duwa tauwéro paréntana Yosua. Situru sibawa panunju'na Puwangnge lao ri Yosua
Joshua4:9 Ri tengnga-tengnganato Yordanro
Joshua4:10 Sining imangngé tette'i tettong ri tengnga-tengngana Yordan narapi iyaro sining tauwé pura napogau' sininna iya riparéntangngéngngi ri Puwangnge naolai Yosua. Iyaro siturui panunju-panunju polé ri Musa lao ri Yosua. Masitta'i umma Israélié malléttoiwi Salo Yordan.
Joshua4:11 Lettu manennana ri liweng
Joshua4:12 Situru sibawa iya napparéntangngé Musa
Joshua4:13 Iya manenna 40.000 tau worowané iya massenjataé sibawa sadiya untu' mammusu. Ri yolona Puwangnge
Joshua4:14 Iyaro essoé napogau'i Puwangnge gau'-gau' iya mébbuéngngi bangsa Israélié pakalebbii Yosua selaku tau maraja. Gangka tuwona napakalebbii mennang pada-pada napakalebbina Musa.
Joshua4:15 Nainappa Puwangnge suroi Yosua
Joshua4:16 paréntangngi sining imang iya mpulééngngi Petti Assijancingngéro kuwammengngi namassu polé ri Yordan.
Joshua4:17 Napogau'ni Yosua aga iya riparéntangngéngngi ri Puwangnge.
Joshua4:18 Lettu'na muwa iyaro sining imangngé ri wirinna saloé
Joshua4:19 Lettu'ni umma Israélié ri liwenna Yordan sibawa ri tanggala seppulona uleng mammulangngé
Joshua4:20 Kuwaniro nalappo Yosua iya seppulo duwa batu iya nalaé polé ri laleng Yordan.
Joshua4:21 Nainappa makkeda Yosua lao ri umma Israélié
Joshua4:22 powadangngi mennang makkedaé nalléttoiwi umma Israélié iyaé Salo Yordan ri yasé'na tana iya marakkoé.
Joshua4:23 Curitangngi mennang makkedaé Puwang Allataalamu rakkoingekko uwaina iyaro Salo Yordan narapi lettu manekko ri liweng
Joshua4:24 kuwammengngi naissengngi sininna tauwé ri linoé pékkugi rajanna akuwasanna Puwangnge. Nanallalengiwi mupakalebbii matu Puwang Allataalamu untu' mannennungeng.”

Joshua7:1 Puwangnge pura mapparéntangngi lao ri umma Israélié makkedaé polé risininna séuwa-séuwaé ri kota Yérikho harusu'i ripaccappu
Joshua7:2 Iyaro wettué suroni Yosua siyagangngaré tau polé ri Yérikho lao ri Ai
Joshua7:3 lisuni sibawa laporo'i ri Yosua. Makkedai mennang
Joshua7:4 Jaji iya laowé gasai iyaro kotaé banna tellussebbu tau
Joshua7:5 Sining tau Aié lellungngi mennang polé ri pintu gerbanna kota Ai lettu ri daéra attambangengngé
Joshua7:6 Messé senna'ni Yosua sibawa sining pamimpinna bangsa Israélié angkanna nasapé-sapé mennang pakéyanna
Joshua7:7 Makkedani Yosua lao ri Puwangnge
Joshua7:8 Oh Puwang! Ripasoroni sining tau Israélié ri balié. Aga harusu upowada makkekkuwangngé?
Joshua7:9 Naéngkalingai matu tau Kanaangngé sibawa sininna tau laingngé ri daéraéwé passalenna gau'éro. Nakeppukki matu mennang sibawa nauno manekki! Na agana harusu Upogau' matu untu' mattahangengngi alebbirem-Mu?”
Joshua7:10 Nabalini Puwangnge Yosua
Joshua7:11 Purai pogau' dosa tau Israélié. Purai Uwapparéntang kuwammengngi naturusiwi mennang assijancinna sibawa Iyya
Joshua7:12 Iyanaro saba'na dé' naulléi mennang mattahang moloiwi balié. Ripasoroi mennang ri balié nasaba aléna mennang pura ripateppai pahukkungeng untu' ripaccappu. Dé'na umaélo ranrekko
Joshua7:13 Oto'no makkekkuwangngé
Joshua7:14 Rimakkuwannanaro
Joshua7:15 Nainappa tau iya rijello'é sibawa taroéngngi barab-barang iya riyattéyangngéro harusu'i ritunu gangka cappu silaong sibawa kaluwargana enrengngé sininna séuwa-séuwa iya nappunnangiyé; nasaba aléna majjalékkaiwi assijancingngé sibawa pogau'i ja battowaé ri tengnga-tengngana umma Israélié.”
Joshua7:16 Bajanana
Joshua7:17 Nainappana nasuro Yosua suku Yéhuda malluru liyolo
Joshua7:18 Purairo nasuroni Yosua kaluwargana Zabdi malluru liyolo
Joshua7:19 Nakkeda Yosua lao ri Akhan
Joshua7:20 Nakkeda Akhan
Joshua7:21 Ri yelle'na barab-barang iya tasittaiyé
Joshua7:22 Nainappa Yosua kiring tau mapperi-peri lao ri kémana Akhan. Nalolongenni iyaro barab-barang riyattéyangngé engka manengngi kuwaro
Joshua7:23 Nalani mennang iyaro barab-barangngé nanatiwii lao ri Yosua sibawa sininna tau Israélié. Nainappa iyaro barab-barangngé napalénne ri yolona Puwangnge.
Joshua7:24 Nainappa Yosua sibawa sininna umma Israélié tikkengngi Akhan
Joshua7:25 Nainappa makkeda Yosua lao ri Akhan
Joshua7:26 Purairo natémpunni mennang iyaro onrongngé sibawa maéga senna batu iya lettu'é essoéwé engka mupi kuwaro. Iyanaro saba'na nariyaseng mupi iyaro onrongngé Lompo Asussang. Nasorona caina Puwangnge.
Joshua8:1 Makkedai Puwangnge lao ri Yosua
Joshua8:2 Ai sibawa arunna harusu'i mugaukeng pada-pada mugaukengngéngngi Yérikho sibawa arunna riyolo. Iyakiya iya sisengngé barab-baranna sibawa olokolo'na weddingngi muwala mancaji appunnangemmu. Sadiya-sadiyano untu' luruiwi kotaéro tappa polé ri monri.”
Joshua8:3 Nasadiya-sadiyana Yosua untu' lao ri Ai silaong sininna tentarana. Piléni 30.000 tau pejuwang iya kaminang makessingngé
Joshua8:4 sibawa mpéréngngi mennang iyaé paréntaé
Joshua8:5 Iyya sibwa ana' buwaku maélo maddeppériwi kotaéro. Rékko massui sining tau Aié untu' méwaki
Joshua8:6 Nalellukki matu mennang matteru narapi mabéla polé ri kotaéro
Joshua8:7 Ri wettuénnaro harusu'ko massu polé ri onrong allekkekemmu
Joshua8:8 Puranana musittai
Joshua8:9 Nainappa Yosua suroi mennang
Joshua8:10 Maélé senna'ni Yosua moto sibawa paréntangngi pasukanna kuwammengngi naddeppungeng. Nainappa aléna sibawa sining pamimping umma Israélié tiwii iyaro pasukangngé lao ri Ai.
Joshua8:11 Iyaro pasukangngé silaonni Yosua joppa mattuju ri pintu gerbang utamana kota Ai
Joshua8:12 Lebbi kurang 5.000 tau égana pura nasuro massubbu ri seddé yajanna kotaéro
Joshua8:13 Jaji
Joshua8:14 Naitana arung Ai ana' buwana Yosua
Joshua8:15 Yosua sibawa ana' buwana najjaini mennang soro; larini mennang mattuju ri daéra padang makabuttué.
Joshua8:16 Sininna tau worowané ri kota Ai ripangarani untu' lellungngi Yosua sibawa pasukannaro. Iyakiya pédé nalellungngi mennang Yosua
Joshua8:17 Sininna tauwé ri Ai massuni untu' lellungngi tau Israélié
Joshua8:18 Nainappa makkeda Puwangnge lao ri Yosua
Joshua8:19 Natanréyanna muwa limanna Yosua
Joshua8:20 Gilinni limonri sining tau Aié
Joshua8:21 
Joshua8:22 
Joshua8:23 sangadinna arung Ai. Ritikkenni nainappa ritiwi mangolo ri Yosua.
Joshua8:24 Puranana pasukang Israélié nauno gangka cappu tentara balié iya lellungngéngngi mennang ri padang makabuttué
Joshua8:25 Matteru mupi Yosua tanréyangngi bessinna mattuju ri Ai
Joshua8:26 
Joshua8:27 Olokolo sibawa barab-barang iya nasittaiyé ri kota Airo
Joshua8:28 Natununi Yosua Ai
Joshua8:29 Nagattunni arunna kotaéro ri patto'é
Joshua8:30 Nainappa patettong Yosua séddi mézba ri Bulu Ebal untu' Puwangnge
Joshua8:31 Iyaro mézbaé naébbui situru panunju-panunju ri laleng Kitta'na Musa
Joshua8:32 Kuwaro
Joshua8:33 Sining tau Israélié
Joshua8:34 Nainappa nabaca Yosua maladde-ladde sininna hukkungngé situru sibawa iya tarokié ri laleng Kitta Hukkungngé
Joshua8:35 Tungke paréntana Musa nabacai Yosua lao ri sininna umma Israélié iya maddeppungengngé kuwaro
Joshua9:1 Karéba passalenna sining apakalanna Israélié tassiyani risininna arungngé ri seddé yajanna Salo Yordan – ri bulué
Joshua9:2 Sininna arungngéro sipekke'ni nenniya siyempe untu' musui Yosua sibawa umma Israélié.
Joshua9:3 Iyakiya sining tau Gibéon polé ri bangsa Héwié purani naéngkalinga passalenna aga iya napogau'é Yosua lao ri Yérikho sibawa Ai.
Joshua9:4 Nanapettuini mennang untu' bengnguwangngi Yosua ri laleng pattékériwi kaleddé'na mennang: karung-karung malaung
Joshua9:5 Pakéi mennang pakéyang iya sapé-sapé'é nenniya sapatu iya malaungngénna sibawa ritéppang-teppang.
Joshua9:6 Ri laleng keadaang makkuwaéro laoni mennang méwai sita Yosua ri akkémangngé ri Gilgal nainappa makkeda lao ri Yosua sibawa tau Israélié
Joshua9:7 Iyakiya makkedai sining tau Israélié
Joshua9:8 Makkedani mennang
Joshua9:9 Nappébali mennang
Joshua9:10 sibawa passalenna aga iya Napogau'é lao ri iya duwa arung Amorié ri seddé alauna Yordan
Joshua9:11 Sining pamimpingngé sibawa sininna pabbanuwana wanuwatta suroki passadiya bokong untu' joppa lao mai méwai sita Bapa'-bapa'
Joshua9:12 Coba Bapa'-bapa' mitai
Joshua9:13 Sibawa iyaé sining popang anggoro'é mabaru mupa wettutta lisekiwi; iyakiya makkekkuwangngé
Joshua9:14 Nanatarimani céddé sining tau Israélié inanréna sining tau Gibéongngéro
Joshua9:15 Mébbuni Yosua assijancing assisellaong sibawa sining tau Gibéongngéro
Joshua9:16 Iyakiya annessana
Joshua9:17 
Joshua9:18 Iyakiya tau Israélié dé' nawedding mpunoi mennang
Joshua9:19 Iyakiya mappébaliwi iyaro sining pamimpingngé
Joshua9:20 Dé' naweddiki mpunoi mennang saba' purani majjanci; narékko riyassakkarengngi iyaro jancié nahukkukki matu Allataala.
Joshua9:21 Jaji
Joshua9:22 Nainappa riyobbi sining tau Gibéongngé mangolo ri Yosua. Makkedai Yosua
Joshua9:23 Nasaba kédo makkuwakoro
Joshua9:24 Nappébali mennang
Joshua9:25 Makkekkuwangngé ri lalekki akuwasanna Bapa'. Gaukenni situru iya naitaé Bapa' makessing.”
Joshua9:26 Na iyanaé napogau' Yosua: nalinrungiwi sining tauwéro sibawa dé' napalaloi tau Israélié mpunoi mennang.
Joshua9:27 Iyakiya ripancajiwi mennang ata – iyanaritu pappuwé aju sibawa pallémpa uwai untu' tau Israélié sibawa untu' mézbana Puwangnge. Lettu makkekkuwangngé napogau' mupi mennang iyaro pallaungngé ri onrong iya napilé Puwangnge mancaji onrong assompanna.
Joshua10:1 Naéngkalingani Adoni-Zédék
Joshua10:2 Métau senna'ni pabbanuwana Yérusalém
Joshua10:3 Rimakkuwannanaro nasuroni Adoni-Zédék tauwé lao ri Arung Hoham ri Hébron
Joshua10:4 “Laono mai bantuka gasai Gibéon
Joshua10:5 Na iya lima arung Amoriéro
Joshua10:6 Nakirinni sining tau Gibéongngé iyaé karébaé lao ri Yosua ri akkémangngé ri Gilgal
Joshua10:7 Nainappa Yosua sibawa sininna tentarana
Joshua10:8 Makkedai Puwangnge lao ri Yosua
Joshua10:9 Puppu benni Yosua sibawa pasukanna joppa polé ri Gilgal lao ri Gibéon
Joshua10:10 Puwangnge mébbui sining tau Amorié dé' naissengengngi aléna wettunna naita tentara Israélié. Maéga tau Amori riyuno ri Gibéon
Joshua10:11 Wettunna sining tau Amorié mattengngang turungiwi émpeng bulué nasaba lariwi polé ri tentara Israélié
Joshua10:12 Iyaro essoé wettunna Puwangnge mpéréngngi apakalang tau Israélié polé ri tau Amorié
Joshua10:13 Nappésauna mata essoé sibawa dé'na nalétté kétengngé narapi tau Israélié pura nacau sining balinna. Iyaé kajajiyangngé riyokii ri laleng Kitta Yasar. Puppu esso mappésau mata essoé ri tengnga-tengngana langié
Joshua10:14 Dé' naengka nakajajiyang sibawa dé'tona nakajajiyang matu séuwa esso pada-pada essoéro
Joshua10:15 Puranana musuéro
Joshua10:16 Iyakiya iya lima arung Amoriéro leppe'i sibawa massubbui ri laleng séddié gowa ri Makéda.
Joshua10:17 Riitai mennang ri tauwé
Joshua10:18 nakkeda Yosua
Joshua10:19 iyakiya aja' muwappésau kuwaro. Lellungngi matteru
Joshua10:20 Naunoni Yosua sibawa tau Israélié sining tau Amoriéro
Joshua10:21 Nainappa sininna tentarana Yosua lisu sibawa salama ri Yosua ri akkémangngé ri Makéda. Dé' muwi séddi tau ri wanuwaéro barani powadai agi-agi méwai tau Israélié.
Joshua10:22 Purairo makkedani Yosua
Joshua10:23 Ritimpa'ni iyaro gowaé
Joshua10:24 naritiwi lao ri Yosua. Nainappa naobbi Yosua sininna tau Israélié maddeppungeng
Joshua10:25 Purairo
Joshua10:26 Nainappa nauno Yosua sining arungngéro sibawa gattungngi mennang ri lima patto. Ujuna mennang rileppessangngi kuwaro narapi arawéng.
Joshua10:27 Wettunna labuni essoé
Joshua10:28 Iyaro essoé nagasani Yosua Makéda
Joshua10:29 Purairo
Joshua10:30 Puwangnge mpéréng towi apakalang tau Israélié lao ri kotaéwé sibawa arunna. Dé' muwi séddi tau naleppessang tuwo; sininna tauwé ri laleng kotaéro naunoi. Nagaukenni Yosua arunna kotaéro pada-pada iya nagaukengngéngngi arung Yérikho.
Joshua10:31 Nainappa Yosua sibawa tentarana maju polé ri Libna lao ri Lakhis. Nakeppunni mennang kotaéro nainappa nagasa.
Joshua10:32 Puwangnge mpéréngngi apakalang tau Israélié lao ri Lakhis ri laleng ammusurengngé ri esso maduwaé. Aga iya napogau'é ri Libna
Joshua10:33 Horam
Joshua10:34 Rappina
Joshua10:35 Iyatoro essoé nasittaiwi mennang Eglon
Joshua10:36 Polé ri Eglon
Joshua10:37 sibawa nasittai kotaéro. Arunna sibawa tungke tau ri kotaéro sibawa ri kota-kota laingngé ri seddéna kuwaro
Joshua10:38 Purairo
Joshua10:39 Iyaro kotaé silaong arunna nenniya sininna kota laingngé ri seddéna nasittai manenni Yosua. Sininna tauwé kuwaro naunoi. Nagaukenni Yosua Debir sibawa arunna pada-pada iya nagaukengngéngngi Hébron sibawa Libna silaong arunna.
Joshua10:40 Napatunru'ni Yosua sininna wanuwaéro. Nacauni sining arungngé ri daéra bulué
Joshua10:41 Nacauni Yosua daéra-daéraé polé ri Kadés-Barnéa ri yattang lettu ri Gaza ri seddéna wiring tasi'é
Joshua10:42 Ri laleng siseng bawang mammusu
Joshua10:43 Purairo
Joshua11:1 Wettunna naéngkalinga Arung Yabin polé ri Hazor passalenna sining apakalanna Israélié
Joshua11:2 lao risining arungngé ri bulué bagiyang manorang
Joshua11:3 Suro towi tau lao ri tau Kanaangngé ri bagiyang yajang sibawa alauna Yordan
Joshua11:4 Napoléna iyaro sining arungngé sibawa sininna tentarana mennang iya maéga senna'é pada-pada kessi'é ri wiring tasi'é. Anyarang sibawa karéta musuna mennang maéga senna'to.
Joshua11:5 Sininna arungngéro siyempe'i sibawa silaongngi polé patettong markas ri seddéna ana' Salo Mérom untu' gasai Israélié.
Joshua11:6 Nakkeda Puwangnge lao ri Yosua
Joshua11:7 Naluruini Yosua sibawa sininna tentarana iyaro balié tennasenna-sennai ri seddéna ana' Salo Mérom.
Joshua11:8 Na Puwangnge mébbui umma Israélié caui mennang. Tau Israélié gasai sibawa lellungngi mennang lettu sibbéla Misréfot-Maim sibawa Sidon ri manorang
Joshua11:9 Napogau'ni Yosua lao ri mennang situru sibawa aga iya puraé napparéntang Puwangnge: napaccappuni anyaranna
Joshua11:10 Purairo lisuni Yosua
Joshua11:11 
Joshua11:12 Nainappa nasittai Yosua iyaro kota-kotaé
Joshua11:13 Iyakiya kota-kota iya napatettongngé ri yasé'na bulu-bulu ruttungengngé
Joshua11:14 Sininna pabbanuwana iyaro kota-kotaé naunoi; dé' muwi séddi tau naleppessang tuwo. Iyakiya sininna barab-baranna iya mangke'é sibawa olokolo'na nalai tau Israélié mancaji appunnangenna mennang.
Joshua11:15 Sininna iya napparéntangngé Puwangnge lao ri Musa
Joshua11:16 Nasittaini Yosua sininna wanuwaéro – daéra buluna
Joshua11:17 Lowanna iyaro daéraé mappammulai ri Bulu Makellué ri bagiyang yattang seddéna Edom
Joshua11:18 
Joshua11:19 Polé risininna kota-kotaé risininna daéraéro dé' muwi séddi kota iya mébbué assijancing assisellaongeng sibawa Israélié
Joshua11:20 Puwangnge mébbui mennang matedde ati untu' mammusu sibawa tau Israélié
Joshua11:21 Ri wettuéttonaro nalao Yosua paccappui bangsa Enak-é
Joshua11:22 Dé' muwi séddi tau polé ri bangsa Enak-éro iya nasésaé ri daéra Israélié
Joshua11:23 Sininna wanuwaéro nasittaiwi Yosua situru paréntana Puwangnge lao ri Musa
Joshua12:1 Daéra seddé alauna Yordan
Joshua12:2 Iya séddié riyaseng Sihon
Joshua12:3 makkuwatoro nassanraiwi daérana Lompo Yordan bagiyang alau
Joshua12:4 Arung laing iya nacaué tau Israélié iyanaritu Arung Og polé ri wanuwa Basan
Joshua12:5 Daéra akuwasanna nassanraiwi Bulu Hérmon
Joshua12:6 Iyanaro duwa arung iya nacaué Musa silaong bangsa Israélié. Tanana iyaro sining arungngé nabbéréyanni Musa
Joshua12:7 Arung-ngarung iya nacaué Yosua silaong bangsa Israélié iyanaritu sininna arungngé ri daéra seddé yajanna Salo Yordan
Joshua12:8 Iyaro daéraé nassanraiwi daéra bulué
Joshua13:1 Makkekkuwangngé macowa senna'ni Yosua. Makkedai Puwangnge lao ri Yosua
Joshua13:2 sininna daéra Filistin sibawa Gésur
Joshua13:3 sibawa sininna daéra Awi liyattang. (Daéra polé ri Salo Sikhor ri pakkasésénna Maséré lettu ri pakkasésénna Ekron ri seddé manorang
Joshua13:4 Makkuwatoro harusu'i nasittai: sininna daéra Kanaan sibawa Méara (appunnangenna bangsa Sidon)
Joshua13:5 nainappa daérana bangsa Gébal
Joshua13:6 Muttama toni sininna daérana tau Sidongngé
Joshua13:7 Jaji
Joshua13:8 Suku Rubén sibawa Gad nenniya sitengngana suku Manasyé pura tarimani bagiyang tana polé ri Musa
Joshua13:9 Daérana mennang nassanraiwi Aroér (ri wirinna Lompo Salo Arnon)
Joshua13:10 sibawa lettu ri pakkasésénna daéra Amon
Joshua13:11 Muttama toni daéra Giléad
Joshua13:12 Daérana mennang nassanrai towi daéra akuwasanna Arung Og
Joshua13:13 Iyakiya pabbanuwana Gésur sibawa Maakha dé' narirukka ri tau Israélié; monro mupi mennang ri Israélié.
Joshua13:14 Suku Léwi dé' natarima bagiyang tana polé ri Musa
Joshua13:15 Sibagiyang polé ri tana iya najjanciyangngé Puwangnge lao ri umma Israéliéro pura nabbéréyanni Musa lao ri kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng suku Rubén
Joshua13:16 Daérana mennang nassanraiwi Aroér (ri wirinna Lompo Salo Arnon) sibawa kota ri tengnga-tengngana lompo'éro lettu risininna tanété tanré ri seddéna Médéba;
Joshua13:17 makkuwatoro Hésybon sibawa sininna kotaé ri tanété tanréro
Joshua13:18 Yahas
Joshua13:19 Kiryataim
Joshua13:20 Bét-Péor
Joshua13:21 Muttama toni sininna kota ri tanété tanréro
Joshua13:22 Ri yelle'na sining tau iya naunoé bangsa Israélié engka towi Biléam ana' Béor
Joshua13:23 Salo Yordan mancaji pakkaséséng bagiyang yajanna daéra suku Rubén. Iyanaro kota-kota sibawa désa-désa iya riyabbéréyangngé lao ri kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng suku Rubén untu' mancaji tana appunnangenna mennang.
Joshua13:24 Sibagiyang polé ri tana iya najjanciyangngé Puwangnge lao ri umma Israéliéro pura toni nabbéréyang Musa lao ri kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng suku Gad
Joshua13:25 Daérana nassanraiwi Yaézer sibawa sininna kotaé ri Giléad enrengngé sitengngana polé ri daérana bangsa Amongngé narapi sibbéla Aroér ri seddé alauna Raba;
Joshua13:26 daérana Hésybon lettu ri Ramat-Mizpa sibawa Batonim
Joshua13:27 Ri Lompo Yordan
Joshua13:28 Iyanaro kota-kota sibawa désa-désa iya riyabbéréyangngé lao ri kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng suku Gad untu' mancaji tana appunnangenna mennang.
Joshua13:29 Sibagiyang polé ri tana iya najjanciyangngé Puwangnge lao ri umma Israéliéro pura toni nabbéréyang Musa lao ri kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng sitengngana polé ri suku Manasyé untu' mancaji appunnangenna mennang.
Joshua13:30 Pakkasésénna daérana mennang lettu ri Mahanaim
Joshua13:31 Muttama toni sitengngana daéra Giléad
Joshua13:32 Makkuwaniro Musa bagéi tanaé ri seddé alauna Yérikho ri liwenna Salo Yordan
Joshua13:33 Iyakiya suku Léwié dé' nalolongeng tana muwi céddé polé ri Musa. Makkedai Musa lao ri mennang makkedaé bagiyang iya nabbéréyangngé lao ri mennang iyanaritu polé ri akkarobangeng-akkarobangeng iya riyakkasuwiyangengngé lao ri Puwang Allataalana Israélié.
Joshua14:1 Iyaé mangoloé iyanaritu curitana passalenna pékkugi wanuwa Kanaan seddé yajanna Salo Yordan riyabbagé-bagéyang ri yelle'na umma Israélié. Iya bagé-bagééngngi iyaro tanaé lao ri umma Israélié iyanaritu Imang Eléazar
Joshua14:2 Pada-pada iya pura napparéntangngé Puwangnge lao ri Musa
Joshua14:3 Tanaé ri seddé alauna Salo Yordan pura nabbéréyanni Musa lao ri iya duwa sitengnga suku bangsa iya laingngéro. (Parellui riyoki kuwaé makkedaé wijanna Yusuf tabbagéi ri laleng duwa suku: Suku Manasyé sibawa suku Efraim.) Passalenna suku Léwi
Joshua14:4 
Joshua14:5 Makkuwaniro umma Israélié bagé-bagéi iyaro tanaé situru sibawa iya puraé napparéntang Puwangnge lao ri Musa.
Joshua14:6 Riséuwaé esso sining tau polé ri suku Yéhuda poléi méwai sita Yosua ri Gilgal. Sala séddinna polé ri mennang iyanaritu Kaléb ana' Yéfune
Joshua14:7 Umuru'ku patappulo taung wettunna Musa
Joshua14:8 Sining tau iya uwéwaé silaong lao
Joshua14:9 Narimakkuwannanaro
Joshua14:10 Makkekkuwangngé patappuloni lima taunna sipongenna napowada Puwangnge gau'éro lao ri Musa. Iyaro kajajiyangngi wettunna bangsa Israélié mattengngang sollé ri padang kessi'é. Napada-pada iya puraé najjanciyang Puwangnge
Joshua14:11 iyakiya mawatang mupa pada-pada wettunna Musa suroka. Mappunnai mupa cuku' awatangeng untu' mammusu iyaré'ga untu' pogau'i agi-agi.
Joshua14:12 Rimakkuwannanaro
Joshua14:13 Nasitujuini Yosua Kaléb ana' Yéfune
Joshua14:14 Lettu makkekkuwangngé iyaro kotaé mancaji mupi appunnangeng manana wija-wija Kaléb ana' Yéfune
Joshua14:15 Riyolo Hébron riyasengngi kota Arba. (Arba iyanaritu tau iya kaminang battowaé polé ri yelle'na bangsa Enak-é.) Na amanna sibawa damé iyaro wanuwaé nasaba dé' narigangguna ri balié.
Joshua15:1 Kaluwarga-kaluwarga suku Yéhuda tarimai bagiyang tana iya pakkasésénnaé iyanaritu: Ri seddé yattanna
Joshua15:2 mappammulai ri cappa yattanna Tasi Maté
Joshua15:3 matteru liyattang molai émpeng bulué ri Akrabim lettu ri Zin. Nainappa molai yattanna Kadés-Barnéa
Joshua15:4 Polé kuwaro matterusi lao ri Azmon
Joshua15:5 Ri seddé alau
Joshua15:6 ménré ri Bét-Hogla
Joshua15:7 nainappa matteru ri Lompo Asussangngé lettu ri Débir
Joshua15:8 nainappa ménré lalo ri Lompo Hinom lao ri seddé yattanna bulu-bulué
Joshua15:9 nainappa matteru ri mata uwai Mé-Néftoah
Joshua15:10 sibawa mattulilingiwi bagiyang yajanna Baala mattuju ri buluna Edom
Joshua15:11 Polé ri Timna
Joshua15:12 iya mancajiyé jori pakkaséséng seddé yajanna daéra suku Yéhuda. Ri lalenna daéraéro monroi sining tau polé ri kaluwarga-kaluwarga ri laleng suku Yéhuda.
Joshua15:13 Situru paréntana Puwangnge lao ri Yosua
Joshua15:14 Wija-wijanna Enak iyanaritu tau Sésai
Joshua15:15 Polé kuwaro laowi gasai sining tau iya monroé ri Débir. (Iyaro kotaé tarompoi riyolo selaku Kiryat-Séfer.)

Joshua16:4 Iyanaro daéra iya riwéréngngéngngi suku Manasyé sibawa Efraim
Joshua16:5 Mangoloéwé iyanaritu pakkasésénna tana iya riyabbéréyangngé lao ri kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng suku Efraim. Ri seddé alauna
Joshua16:6 nainappa matteru ri Tasi Tengngaé. Mikhmétat engkai ri seddé manoranna. Ri seddé alauna

Joshua16:8 Ri seddé yajang

Joshua17:8 Daéra Tapuah iyanaritu appunnangenna suku Manasyé

Joshua18:17 bélo'i limanorang ri En-Sémes

Joshua23:2 Nanaobbini sininna umma Israélié
Joshua23:3 Purani muwita sininna séuwa-séuwaé iya napogau'é Puwang Allataalamu lao ri sininna bangsaé kuwaé untu' iko. Iya mammusurengngékko iyanaritu Puwang Allataalamu muto.
Joshua23:4 Tanana bangsa-bangsaé iya monroé mupa
Joshua23:5 Puwang Allataalamu mébbui matu bangsa-bangsaéro soro

Joshua23:8 Mala harusu'ko tette matinulu lao ri Puwangnge

Judges1:6 Larini
Judges1:7 Adanna Adoni-Bézék

Judges1:11 Polé ri Hébron

Judges1:19 
Judges1:20 Pada-pada iya puraé napparéntang Musa
Judges1:21 Suku Bényamin dé' naulléi paddésu'i tau Yébus-é massu polé ri kota Yérusalém. Iyanaro saba'na naonro mupa tau Yébus-é kuwaro silaong tau Bényamingngé.
Judges1:22 Suku-suku Efraim sibawa Manasyé wijanna Yusuf
Judges1:23 
Judges1:24 siruntu'i mennang séddi tau worowané iya polé ri kotaé. Adanna mennang lao ri aléna
Judges1:25 Na iyaro tauwé najellokenni mennang laleng muttama'é ri kotaéro. Nainappa sining tau Efraingngé sibawa Manasyé muttamakiwi kotaéro enrengngé mpunoi sininna pabbanuwana
Judges1:26 Nainappa létté ri wanuwanna tau Hét-é
Judges1:27 Suku Manasyé dé' napaddésu'i pabbanuwana kota Bét-Séan
Judges1:28 Mémeng tattambanana awatangenna tau Israélié
Judges1:29 Ri kota Gézer
Judges1:30 Pabbanuwana kota Kitron sibawa Nahalol dé'to napaddésu'i suku Zébulon. Iyanaro saba'na bangsa Kanaangngé tette mupi monro kuwaro silaong mennang
Judges1:31 Pabbanuwana kota Ako
Judges1:32 Iyanaro saba'na tau Kanaangngé
Judges1:33 Pabbanuwana kota Bét-Sémes sibawa Bét-Anat dé'to napaddésu'i suku Naftali. Iyanaro saba'na tau Kanaangngé
Judges1:34 Bangsa Amorié tette mupi monro ri Ayalon
Judges1:35 
Judges1:36 Ri seddé manoranna Séla
Judges2:1 Laoni malaéka'na Puwangnge ri Bokim polé ri Gilgal sibawa makkeda lao risining tau Israélié
Judges2:2 Rimakkuwannanaro dé' naweddikko mébbu séuwa assitarong sibawa pabbanuwana wanuwaéwé. Sining mézbana mennang harusu'i muruttung.’ Iyakiya iko dé' mupogau'i aga iya puraé Uwapparéntanro. Mala purani mupogau' sibalé'na!
Judges2:3 Jaji
Judges2:4 Puranana napalettu iyaro malaéka'é iyaro karébaé
Judges2:5 Iyanaro saba'na nariyaseng iyaro onrongngé Bokhim. Nainappa ri onrongngéro makkasuwiyanni sining tau Israélié akkarobangeng lao ri Puwangnge.
Judges2:6 Puranana naleppessang Yosua sining tau Israélié lao
Judges2:7 Gangka tuwona Yosua
Judges2:8 Yosua ana' Nun – atanna Puwang -ngéro – matéi ri umuru sératu seppulo taung.
Judges2:9 Ritampungngi ri tana appunnangenna muto
Judges2:10 Nainappa sininna sippangka'éro maté toni. Na sippangka rappina dé'na naissengngi Puwangnge
Judges2:11 Namadosana tau Israélié lao ri Puwangnge. Dé'na mennang namassompa lao ri Puwangnge
Judges2:12 
Judges2:13 
Judges2:14 
Judges2:15 Sises-siseng mennang lao mammusu
Judges2:16 Makkolik-koling Puwangnge mpéréngngi mennang pamimping iya mammusué untu' paleppe'i mennang polé ri garembolang parampo'é.
Judges2:17 Iyakiya dé' mennang nabati-batiwi iyaro sining pamimpingngé. Massompai mennang déwata-déwata laing
Judges2:18 Rékko mabbéréi Puwangnge séddi tau pamimping lao ri bangsa Israélié
Judges2:19 Iyakiya rékko iyaro pamimpingngé maténi
Judges2:20 Rimakkuwannanaro macai senna'ni Puwangnge lao ri umma Israélié
Judges2:21 Makkekkuwangngé dé'na Umaélo paddésu'i muwi bangsa niga iya engkaé mupa ri wanuwaéwé wettunna maté Yosua.
Judges2:22 Maélo-Ka pakéi iyaro bangsa-bangsaé untu' mojiwi bangsa Israélié
Judges2:23 Iyanaro saba'na dé' nabbéré Puwangnge apakalang ri Yosua lao ri bangsa-bangsaéro. Sibalé'na naleppessangngi Puwangnge mennang monro ri wanuwaéro
Judges3:1 Untu' mojiwi sining tau Israél iya dé'é naengka napéneddingiwi musué ri Kanaan
Judges3:2 Napogau'i Puwangnge iyaro banna sibawa akkatta paggurui tungke assossoreng Israélié mammusu
Judges3:3 Bangsa-bangsa iya monroé mupa ri wanuwaéro iyanaritu: bangsa iya monroé ri laleng iya lima kota Filistin
Judges3:4 Engkai mennang kuwaro untu' mancaji batu ojiyang lao ri bangsa Israélié. Nanallalengiwiro weddingngi riisseng aga bangsa Israélié naturusiwiga parénta-parénta iya puraé nabbéréyang Puwangnge lao ri néné-nénéna mennang naolai Musa.
Judges3:5 Iyanaro saba'na sining tau Kanaangngé
Judges3:6 Kawing sicampuru'ni umma Israélié sibawa bangsa-bangsaéro
Judges3:7 Madosani umma Israélié lao ri Puwangnge
Judges3:8 Namacaina Puwangnge lao ri umma Israélié
Judges3:9 Namangobbina umma Israélié méllau tulung lao ri Puwangnge
Judges3:10 Rikuwasaini Otniél ri Rohna Puwangnge angkanna mancaji pamimpinna umma Israélié. Laoni mammusu
Judges3:11 Na amanna iyaro wanuwaé patappulo taung ittana. Nainappa maté Otniél.
Judges3:12 Madosasi tau Israélié lao ri Puwangnge
Judges3:13 Masséddini Arung Eglon sibawa bangsa Amongngé nenniya bangsa Amalé'é
Judges3:14 Seppulo aruwa taung ittana umma Israélié rijaja ri Eglon.
Judges3:15 Iyakiya wettunna umma Israélié mangobbi méllau tulung ri Puwangnge
Judges3:16 Riséuwaé esso mébbui Ehud sipeppa peddang iya mammata wali-walié iya lampénaé nawéki sitengnga météré. Natappini iyaro peddangngé ri benréng ataunna ri laleng wajunna
Judges3:17 nainappa lao mabbéréyangngi pakkasuwiyanna umma Israélié ri Arung Eglon. Iyaro arungngé macommo senna.
Judges3:18 Purana nabbéréyang iyaro pakkasuwiyangngé
Judges3:19 Iyakiya aléna Ehud mappésauwi wettunna lettu ri batu-batu massobbi'é ri seddéna Gilgal
Judges3:20 
Judges3:21 Matteruni Ehud rampui peddanna sibawa lima abiyona polé ri benréng ataunna
Judges3:22 
Judges3:23 nainappa massu sibawa goncingngi tange'na bili'éro
Judges3:24 nainappa lao. Wettunna polé sining atanna arungngé sibawa napoléiwi iyaro sining tange'na bili'é taggoncing
Judges3:25 Maittanana mattajeng nadé'pa natimpa'i arungngé tange'é
Judges3:26 Wettunna mennang mattajeng mupi
Judges3:27 Lettu'na muwa ri daéra buluna Efraim
Judges3:28 Adanna lao ri mennang
Judges3:29 Ri laleng ammusurengngéro naunoi mennang kira-kira 10.000 prajuri Moab iya kaminang makessingngé; dé'gaga leppe.
Judges3:30 Iyaro essoé cauni Moab polé ri Israélié
Judges3:31 Pamimping rappina iyanaritu Samgar ana' Anat. Méwa towi sibawa paleppe'i tau Israélié. Nasibawang tekkeng paddimpa sapinna
Judges4:1 Maténana Ehud
Judges4:2 Narileppessanna mennang ricau ri Yabin
Judges4:3 Mappunnaiwi Yabin 900 karéta musu polé ri bessié. Duwappulo taung ittana najaja tau Israélié sibawa mabecco. Nainappa mennang mangobbi méllau tulung lao ri Puwangnge.
Judges4:4 Iyaro wettué iya pimpingngéngngi umma Israélié iyanaritu séddiwi nabi makkunrai riyaseng Débora
Judges4:5 Débora biyasai tudang ri yawana pong karomaé
Judges4:6 Ri séuwaé esso nasuroi tauwé mobbii Barak
Judges4:7 Iyya'pa mébbui matu Siséra
Judges4:8 Nakkeda Barak lao ri Débora
Judges4:9 Nametté Débora
Judges4:10 Nanapangarani Barak suku Zébulon sibawa Naftali lao ri Kédes. Iya maccowériyéngngi Barak sibawa Débora iyaro wettué engka 10.000 tau.
Judges4:11 Iyaro wettué Héber
Judges4:12 Naéngkalina muwa Siséra makkedaé laoni Barak ri Bulu Tabor
Judges4:13 napaddeppungenni iya aséra ratuna karéta musuna iya polé ri bessiéro
Judges4:14 Nanakkeda Débora lao ri Barak
Judges4:15 nanagasai Siséra. Na Puwangnge pakacaui sininna tentarana Siséra sibawa karéta-karéta musuna
Judges4:16 Nalellunni Barak karéta-karéta musué sibawa pasukanna baliéro lettu ri Harosét-Hagoyim nanaunoi sininna pasukanna Siséraro; dé' muwi séddi naleppessang tuwo.
Judges4:17 Na wettuéro larini Siséra lao ri kémana Yaél
Judges4:18 Wettunna polé Siséra
Judges4:19 Nakkeda Siséra lao ri Yaél
Judges4:20 Nanakkeda Siséra lao ri Yaél
Judges4:21 Makkuwamani tekkona Siséra angkanna cakkaruddu namatinro sibawa memme. Malani Yaél séddi palu-palu sibawa sipasang patto untu' kémaé
Judges4:22 Wettunna polé Barak sappai Siséra
Judges4:23 Iyaro essoé Puwangnge mpéréngngi apakalang tau Israélié lao ri Yabin
Judges4:24 Iyaro arungngé pédé maitta pédé ritenre ri tau Israélié angkanna paccappurenna binasa.
Judges5:1 Iyaro essoé makkélonni Débora sibawa Barak ana' Abinoam. Makkuwaiyé adanna:
Judges5:2 Pojiwi Puwangnge
Judges5:3 Engkalingai éh sining arungngé sibawa ana' pattolaé
Judges5:4 Wettum-Mu joppa polé ri Séir
Judges5:5 Taggoccang sining bulué ri yolona panguwasana Sinai
Judges5:6 Ri wettunna Samgar
Judges5:7 Kota-kotana Israélié dé'gaga monroiwi
Judges5:8 Wettunna Israél mammula massompa déwata
Judges5:9 Wettunna nattawareng aléna sining pallimana Israélié sibawa cenning ati
Judges5:10 Eh iko iya tonangiyé kaleddé puté
Judges5:11 Ri seddéna sining bujungngé riyéngkalingai tauwé makkélong marowa
Judges5:12 Tokkonni Débora
Judges5:13 Pabbarani iya nasésaé laoni ri pamimpinna
Judges5:14 Joppani mennang polé ri Efraim lao ri lompo'é
Judges5:15 Sining tomariyolona Isakhar poléni silaong Débora
Judges5:16 Magi mennang naonro ri yelle'na bimbala-bimbala'é? Aga untu' méngkalingai pakkampié mobbii olokolo'na? Mémeng suku Rubén dé' naulléi pattentui pallolongenna saba' ri yelle'na mennang dé' narilolongeng asséddingeng adaé.
Judges5:17 Ri wettu maserona mammusu Zébulon sibawa Naftali ri ammusurengngé
Judges5:18 
Judges5:19 Ri Taanakh
Judges5:20 Sining wéttowingngé maccowéto méwai Siséra
Judges5:21 Sapu Salo Kison malirengngi balié. Maju
Judges5:22 Metta-ketta garigi anyarangngé nataro gatti iya ribabbaé ri tonangiyéngngi.
Judges5:23 “Tanroiwi Méros
Judges5:24 Maupe'i Yaél
Judges5:25 Méllauwi uwai Siséra
Judges5:26 Nasibawang patto nenniya palu-palu ri limanna naunrui Yaél Siséra gangka ancuru ulunna.
Judges5:27 Rebbani ri ajéna Yaél temmakkényawa lénne ri tanaé lolongengngi ajjalenna.
Judges5:28 Polé ri sebbo-sebbo tellongengngé makkitai indo'na Siséra
Judges5:29 Iya kaminang mapanré ri yelle'na pattumaninna mabbéré pappébali iya nalolongengngé ri atinna:
Judges5:30 “Mattengngangngi mennang bagé-bagéi barang narappaé
Judges5:31 Tennapodo sining balim-Mu
Judges6:1 Siseppi umma Israélié madosa lao ri Puwangnge
Judges6:2 Makkuwamani tauna tau Israélié lao ri tau Midiangngé
Judges6:3 Ri lainnaé paimeng sises-siseng patani Israélié mattanet-taneng
Judges6:4 Makkémai mennang ri daéra Israélié sibawa solangiwi sininna tanet-tanengngé kuwaro lettu ri daéra mattulilinna Gaza seddé ri yattang. Makkuwatoro olokolo bimbala'é
Judges6:5 Iyaro sining tauwé poléi mallompéngeng silaong olokolo'na sibawa kémana mennang ri laleng jumella iya battowa senna'é. Maéga senna mennang sibawa unta-untana untu' wedding ribilang. Poléi mennang solangiwi wanuwaéro
Judges6:6 na umma Israélié dé' agaga naullé pogau' lao ri mennang.
Judges6:7 Namangobbi umma Israélié méllauwi ri Puwangnge tulungngi mennang méwai tau Midiangngé.
Judges6:8 Nasuroni Puwangnge séddi nabi lao ri mennang. Makkedai iyaro nabié
Judges6:9 Purano Upassalama polé ri tau Maséré'é sibawa sining tauwé ri wanuwaéwé iya musuékko. Purani mennang Upaddésu polé ri wanuwaéwé wettummu gasai mennang
Judges6:10 Pura Upowadanno makkedaé Iyya'na Puwang Allataalamu
Judges6:11 Riséuwaé esso poléi malaéka'na Puwangnge ri kota Ofra
Judges6:12 Iyaro malaéka'na Puwangnge mappaitangngi alé lao ri aléna sibawa makkeda
Judges6:13 Nametté Gidéon
Judges6:14 Nainappa nabbéréyang Puwangnge paréntaéwé lao ri Gidéon
Judges6:15 Nappébali Gidéon
Judges6:16 Nakkeda Puwangnge
Judges6:17 Nappébali Gidéon
Judges6:18 Uwéllauwi tatajekka Puwang riyolo kuwaé narapi upatalangekki inanré Puwang.” Nappébali Puwangnge
Judges6:19 Nanalisuna Gidéon nanasu sikaju bémbé iya maloloé
Judges6:20 Nakkeda iyaro malaéka'na Puwangnge
Judges6:21 Nainappa iyaro malaéka'na Puwangnge naloro limanna nanasibawang cappa aju iya nakkatenningngé nagéssai iyaro jukué sibawa rotié. Malluwa'ni iyaro batué nanacappu nanré iyaro jukué sibawa rotié. Nainappa lennye'ni iyaro malaéka'é.
Judges6:22 Mainge'ni Gidéon makkedaé iya polé ri alénaro iyanaritu aléna malaéka'na Puwangnge. Nanasibawang tau makkedani Gidéon
Judges6:23 Iyakiya makkedai Puwangnge ri aléna
Judges6:24 Nanapatettonni Gidéon séddi mézba kuwaro sibawa masengngi “ Puwangnge Assalenna Asaléwangengngé”. Iyaro mézbaé engka mupi ri Ofra
Judges6:25 Iyaro wennié nabbéréyanni Puwangnge paréntaéwé lao ri Gidéon
Judges6:26 Patettongngi ri yasé'na goppoéro séddi mézba iya puraé murancang sibawa makessing. Nainappa sininna iyaro saping laié
Judges6:27 Nanapiléni Gidéon seppulo atanna nainappa lao pogau'i aga riparéntangngi ri Puwangnge. Iyakiya nasaba métau senna'i lao ri kaluwargana sibawa lao risining tauwé ri désanaro
Judges6:28 Wettunna moto pabbanuwana kotaéro bajana éléna
Judges6:29 Makkutanani mennang séddié lao ri laingngé
Judges6:30 Nakkeda mennang lao ri Yoas
Judges6:31 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Yoas lao ri sininna méwaéngngiro
Judges6:32 Nasaba makkedai Yoas
Judges6:33 Iyaro wettué sininna tau Midiangngé
Judges6:34 Iyakiya Gidéon rikuwasaiwi ri Rohna Puwangnge
Judges6:35 Kiring towi suro lao ri suku Asyer
Judges6:36 Namakkeda Gidéon lao ri Allataala
Judges6:37 Rékko mémeng makkuwairo
Judges6:38 Nakajajiyanna makkuwaro: Wettunna Gidéon moto bajana éléé sibawa para'i iyaro bulu bimbala'é
Judges6:39 Nainappa makkeda lao ri Allataala
Judges6:40 Iyaro wennié napogau'ni Allataala aga naéllau Gidéonro
Judges7:1 Riséuwaé esso Gidéon silaong sininna ana' buwana moto'ni maélé senna. Laoni mennang namakkéma ri seddéna mata uwai Harod. Akkémanna tau Midiangngé engkai ri seddé manoranna mennang
Judges7:2 Makkedai Puwangnge lao ri Gidéon
Judges7:3 Jaji
Judges7:4 Nanakkedasi Puwangnge lao ri Gidéon
Judges7:5 Nanatiwini Gidéon iyaro sining tauwé ri saloé
Judges7:6 Na engka 300 tau iya lépe'éngngi uwai polé ri limanna; sininna laingngé makkaluttu untu' ménung.
Judges7:7 Namakkeda Puwangnge lao ri Gidéon
Judges7:8 Rimakkuwannanaro nasuroni Gidéon sininna tau Israél laingngé lisu sangadinna iya tellu ratuéro. Sininna bokongngé sibawa tarompé'é nalani polé risining tau iya lisuéro. Tau Midiangngé engkai ri lompo'é ri yawana tau Israélié makkéma.
Judges7:9 Iyaro wennié makkedai Puwangnge lao ri Gidéon
Judges7:10 Iyakiya rékko métauko
Judges7:11 Muwéngkalingai matti aga nabicara balié
Judges7:12 Tau Midiangngé
Judges7:13 Wettunna lettu Gidéon kuwaro
Judges7:14 Nappébali silaonna
Judges7:15 Wettunna naéngkalinga Gidéon passalenna nippinna tauwéro sibawa bettuwanna
Judges7:16 Nanabagéni Gidéon iya tellu ratu ana' buwana mancaji tellu regu. Tungke tau riwéréng séddi tarompé sibawa séddi kendi iya mallise'é sulo.
Judges7:17 Adanna Gidéon lao ri mennang
Judges7:18 Rékko iyya sibawa regukku masseppung tarompé
Judges7:19 Mawé'nana tengnga benni
Judges7:20 Iya duwa regu laingngé pogau' towi makkuwaro. Nainappa nakka maneng sulona mennang sibawa lima abiyo
Judges7:21 Tette manengngi mennang tettong tungke-tungke ri onronna ri mattulilinna akkémangngéro. Nalarina kajelli-jelli sininna tentara baliéro nakelli-kelli'to.
Judges7:22 Wettunna Gidéon sibawa sining taunna mappaoni tarompé
Judges7:23 Na suku Naftali
Judges7:24 Makkuwatoro lao ri sininna daéra buluna Efraim
Judges7:25 Duwa ponggawana bangsa Midian ritikkeng ri mennang
Judges8:1 Makkedani tau Efraingngé lao ri Gidéon
Judges8:2 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Gidéon
Judges8:3 Iko ritu lolongeng akuwasang polé ri Allataala angkanna mulléi mpunoi Oréb sibawa Zeeb
Judges8:4 Iyatoro wettué lettu'ni Gidéon silaong iya telluratu ana' buwana ri liwenna Salo Yordan. Poso senna'ni iyakiya matteru mupi lellungngi balié.
Judges8:5 Nanalettu mennang ri Sukot. Kuwaniro Gidéon makkeda lao ri pabbanuwana kotaéro
Judges8:6 Iyakiya mappébaliwi sining pamimpingngé ri Sukot
Judges8:7 Nakkeda Gidéon
Judges8:8 Nanapatteruni joppana Gidéon nanalettu ri Pnuél. Méllau towi inanré kuwaro untu' ana' buwana. Iyakiya pappébalinna tau Pnuél-é padai pappébalinna tau Sukot-é.
Judges8:9 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani Gidéon lao ri mennang
Judges8:10 Na wettuéro Zébah sibawa Salmuna silaong sininna pasukanna engkani ri Karkor. Polé risininna pasukang tau padang kessi'é
Judges8:11 Natuttunni Gidéon pakkaséséng padang kessi seddé alauna Nobah sibawa Yogbélha nainappa nagasa balié tennasenna-senna.
Judges8:12 Zébah sibawa Salmuna
Judges8:13 Na ri laleng allalengeng lisunna polé ri ammusurengngé
Judges8:14 Kuwaniro tikkeng séddi kallolo polé ri Sukot
Judges8:15 Purairo laoni Gidéon méwai sita sining tomariyoloé ri kotaéro namakkeda
Judges8:16 Purairo malani Gidéon dori polé ri padang kessi'é
Judges8:17 Ri Pnuél naruttung towi menaraé sibawa mpunoi sininna tau worowané ri kotaéro.
Judges8:18 Purairo makkutanani Gidéon ri Zébah sibawa Salmuna
Judges8:19 Nakkeda Gidéon
Judges8:20 Nanakkeda Gidéon lao ri Yéter
Judges8:21 Adanna Zébah sibawa Salmuna lao ri Gidéon
Judges8:22 Namakkeda umma Israélié lao ri Gidéon
Judges8:23 Nametté Gidéon
Judges8:24 Iyakiya rimunri makkedasi Gidéon
Judges8:25 Nappébali mennang
Judges8:26 Sininna anting-nganting ulaweng iya riwéréngngéngngi Gidéon wettuéro tane'na nawéki duwappulo kilo
Judges8:27 Polé ri ulawengngéro
Judges8:28 Dé'na naulléi méwana tau Midiangngé; ricauni mennang ri tau Israélié. Na amanna iyaro wanuwaé patappulo taung ittana ri wettu tuwona mupa Gidéon.
Judges8:29 Labe'na ammusurengngéro
Judges8:30 Mappunnaiwi pituppulo tau ana' worowané
Judges8:31 Engkato gundi'na ri Sikhem; polé ri gundi'naé lolongengngi séddi ana' worowané iya nasengngé Abimélékh.
Judges8:32 Macowa senna mani Gidéon ana' Yoasro nappa maté. Ritampungngi ri kuburu'na Yoas
Judges8:33 Maténana Gidéon
Judges8:34 Dé'na mennang nassompana lao ri Allataala
Judges8:35 Dé'to mennang nawale'i ampé-ampé makessinna lao ri kaluwargana Gidéon
Judges9:1 Riséuwaé esso Abimélékh ana' Gidéon laowi ri kota Sikhem onronna kaluwargana indo'na. Kuwaniro mabbicara sibawa mennang
Judges9:2 “Cobai makkutanangngi risininna pabbanuwana Sikhem
Judges9:3 Nalaona iyaro kaluwargana indo'na Abimélékh risining tau Sikhengngé sibawa palettu'i pasenna Abimélékh lao ri mennang. Nainappa iyaro pabbanuwana Sikhem napettuini untu' maccowé ri Abimélékh
Judges9:4 Nainappa mennang mpéréngngi pituppulo dowi péra' iya riyalaé polé ri bola assompanna Baal-Bérit. Nasibawang dowiéro napéssaroini Abimélékh sigarembolang tau kurang ajara'é untu' masséddi sibawa aléna
Judges9:5 nanalao ri kampong assalenna ambo'na ri Ofra. Kuwaniro nauno iya pituppulo silessurennaro ri tompo'na séddié batu. Iyakiya Yotam
Judges9:6 Namaddeppungenna sininna pabbanuwana Sikhem sibawa Bét-Milo
Judges9:7 Naéngkalingana Yotam passalenna gau'éro
Judges9:8 Séuwa wettu maddeppungengngi aju-kajungngé maélo pilé arung untu' mennang. Namakkedana mennang lao ri pong zaitungngé
Judges9:9 Nappébali pong zaitungngé
Judges9:10 Nanakkeda aju-kajungngé lao ri pong araé
Judges9:11 Iyakiya mappébaliwi pong araé
Judges9:12 Purairo makkedani aju-kajungngé lao ri pong anggoro'é
Judges9:13 Iyakiya mappébaliwi pong anggoro'é
Judges9:14 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani sininna ajué lao ri alekale dorié
Judges9:15 Nappébali alekale dorié
Judges9:16 Nakkeda Yotam patterui
Judges9:17 iya puraé mammusurekko? Engngerangngi
Judges9:18 Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé mubali'bellariwi kaluwargana ambo'ku. Pura manenni muwuno ana'-ana'na – musisengiwi pituppuloé tau ri tompo'na séddié batu. Abimélékh iyanaritu ana'na ambo'ku polé ri atanna. Iyakiya mulanti'i mancaji arunna Sikhem
Judges9:19 Rékko tindakammu iyaé essoé lao ri ambo'ku sibawa kaluwargana malempui sibawa macenning
Judges9:20 Iyakiya rékko dé' nappakkuwaro
Judges9:21 Purairo larini Yotam nanaonro ri Beer
Judges9:22 Telluttaung ittana Abimélékh paréntai Israélié.
Judges9:23 Nainappa Puwangnge paompo assimusureng ri yelle'na Abimélékh sibawa sining tau Sikhengngé angkanna mennang méwai aléna.
Judges9:24 Iyaé gau'é kajajiyangngi kuwammengngi nariwale jana Abimélékh sibawa sining tau Sikhengngé iya pakiri-kiriyéngngi untu' mpunoi iya pituppulo ana'-ana'na Gidéon.
Judges9:25 Iyaro sining tau Sikhengngé taroi tau pangadang-ngadang ri tompo-tompo bulué untu' tikkengngi Abimélékh. Tungke tau iya laloé kuwaro narampo'i iyaro tau pangadang-ngadangngé. Na iyaro gau'é ripowadanni Abimélékh.
Judges9:26 Iyaro wettué Gaal ana' Ebéd poléni silaong silessu-silessurenna untu' monro ri Sikhem; na sining tau Sikhengngé mateppe'i ri aléna.
Judges9:27 Laoni mennang maccéppu anggoro risining dare anggoro'é
Judges9:28 Nakkeda Gaal
Judges9:29 “Akkalarapanna iyya pimpingngi iyaé sining tau Sikhengngé
Judges9:30 Zébul
Judges9:31 Kirinni suro lao ri Abimélékh ri Aruma untu' palettu'i pasengngéwé
Judges9:32 Rimakkuwannanaro sitinajako sibawa sining taummu lao massubbu ri dare'é ri wennié.
Judges9:33 Baja éléé rékko mompoi essoé
Judges9:34 Na Abimélékh sibawa sininna ana' buwana kédoni ri wennié. Tassiyani mennang mancaji eppa pasukang nainappa lao massubbu ri mattulilinna kota Sikhem.
Judges9:35 Naitana muwa Abimélékh silaong sining taunna massu Gaal sibawa tettong ri pintu gerbanna kotaé
Judges9:36 Naitani Gaal mennang
Judges9:37 Nainappasi makkeda Gaal
Judges9:38 Makkedani Zébul lao ri Gaal
Judges9:39 Nanatiwini Gaal sining tau Sikhengngé naéwai Abimélékh.
Judges9:40 Iyakiya Abimélékh gasai angkanna lari. Makkamaté-maténni lettu ri yolona pintu gerbanna kotaé.
Judges9:41 Angkanna lisuni Abimélékh ri Aruma
Judges9:42 Pappa bajana mammulani sining tau Sikhengngé salaiwi kotaé
Judges9:43 Nanapaddeppungenni Abimélékh sining taunna
Judges9:44 Wettunna Abimélékh sibawa pasukanna mapperi-peri maju gasai pintu gerbanna kotaé
Judges9:45 Mammusuni matteru Abimélékh puppu esso sibawa tudangiwi kotaéro; naunoi pabbanuwana
Judges9:46 Wettunna sining tau iya engkaé ri laleng bénténg Sikhem méngkalingai passalenna gau'éro
Judges9:47 Naripaissengina Abimélékh ri tauwé makkedaé sining tauwé ri bénténg Sikhemro maddeppungenni kuwaro.
Judges9:48 Rimakkuwannanaro Abimélékh sibawa sining taunna laoni ri Bulu Zalmon. Kuwaniro toto takké-takké aju sibawa wasé
Judges9:49 Na tungke-tungke mennang totoni takké-takké aju
Judges9:50 Purairo laoni Abimélékh ri Tébes. Nakeppungngi iyaro kotaé nainappa natudangi.
Judges9:51 Ri tengnga-tengngana kotaéro engka séddi menara iya masse'é. Na sininna pabbanuwana kotaéro larini lao kuwaro. Muttama'ni mennang ri laleng menaraéro nanagoncingngi tange'na
Judges9:52 Napoléna Abimélékh kuwaro untu' gasai menaraéro. Wettunna lettu ri sumpanna menaraéro sibawa maélo tunui
Judges9:53 séddi makkunrai pasempé séddi batu allélureng ri tompo ulunna angkanna mallesse kaddaro ulunnaro.
Judges9:54 Mapperi-perini Abimélékh mobbii kallolo iya méssangngéngngi senjatana sibawa makkeda
Judges9:55 Wettunna naita sining tau Israélié makkedaé maténi Abimélékh
Judges9:56 Mappakkuwaniro carana Allataala mpale'i Abimélékh polé ri ja iya napogau'é lao ri ambo'na
Judges9:57 Na Puwangnge hukkung towi sining tau Sikhengngé nasaba jana mennang. Iyaro gau'é sicoco'i napowadaé Yotam ana'na Gidéon passalenna mennang wettunna natanroi.
Judges10:1 Maténana Abimélékh
Judges10:2 Duwappulo tellu taung ittana pimpingngi umma Israélié
Judges10:3 Maténana Tola
Judges10:4 Ana'na iya worowané engka telluppulo tau. Mappunnaiwi mennang telluppulo kajunna kaleddé tonangeng sibawa telluppulo désa ri daéra Giléad. Iyaro désa-désaé riyaseng mupi désa-désa Yair.
Judges10:5 Maténi Yair
Judges10:6 Madosasi paimeng umma Israélié lao ri Puwangnge. Dé' mennang najampangiwi Puwangnge sibawa dé'tona nasompani Aléna. Nasompai mennang déwata-déwata Baal sibawa Asytorét
Judges10:7 Rimakkuwannanaro macayii Puwangnge lao ri umma Israélié
Judges10:8 Seppulo aruwa taung ittana iya duwa bangsaéro tenre'i sininna tau Israélié iya monroé ri Giléad
Judges10:9 Mala tau Amongngé nalléttoiwi Salo Yordan untu' lao musui suku Yéhuda
Judges10:10 Namangobbi umma Israélié lao Puwangnge
Judges10:11 Nappébali Puwangnge
Judges10:12 
Judges10:13 Namuni makkuwaro
Judges10:14 Lao bawanno ri déwata-déwata iya mupiléro. Angobbino lao ri mennang! Leppessanni mennang mattulung ri wettummu ri laleng asukkarakengngé.”
Judges10:15 Iyakiya makkedai umma Israélié lao ri Puwangnge
Judges10:16 Nanabuwanni mennang sininna dato-dato barahalaé
Judges10:17 Iyaro wettué sadiya-sadiyani tentarana Amon maélo mammusu. Makkémai mennang ri Giléad. Umma Israélié maddeppungeng toni sibawa makkéma ri Giléad.
Judges10:18 Kuwaniro ra'ya'é silaong sining pamimping polé ri suku-suku Israélié sisullé sitanai engkaga ri yelle'na mennang iya baranié makka senjata méwai bangsa Amongngé. Iyaro tauwé ripancajiwi matu pamimpinna sininna pabbanuwana Giléad.
Judges11:1 Yéfta iyanaritu séddi tau prajuri iya baranié naporé. Monroi ri Giléad. Ambo'na riyasengngi Giléad iyakiya indo'na séddiwi cakkuribang.
Judges11:2 Iyaro ambo'na mappunnai towi ana'-ana' worowané laingngé iya polé ri bainéna iya essaé. Battowanana iyaro ana'-ana'é
Judges11:3 Rimakkuwannanaro massaranni Yéfta polé ri silessu-silessurenna nainappa lao nanaonro ri daéra Tob. Kuwaniro masséddi sibawa sigarembolang tau maja nainappa lao mennang maddampo.
Judges11:4 Siyagangngaré wettu ri munrinna riluruini tau Israélié ri tau Amongngé.
Judges11:5 Wettunna kajajiyang gau'éro
Judges11:6 Makkedai mennang
Judges11:7 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Yéfta
Judges11:8 Nappébali mennang
Judges11:9 Nametté Yéfta
Judges11:10 Nappébali mennang
Judges11:11 Najoppana Yéfta silaong sining pamimpinna Giléad. Nainappa pabbanuwana Giléad makkai mancaji panguwasa sibawa pamimping. Na ri yolona Puwangnge ri Mizpa
Judges11:12 Purairo suroni Yéfta tau lao ri arung Among untu' powadai makkuwaé
Judges11:13 Nabalini arunna bangsa Amongngé iyaro sining suroé
Judges11:14 Nainappa surosi Yéfta tau lao ri arung Among
Judges11:15 untu' baliwi makkuwaé
Judges11:16 Wettunna nasalai tau Israélié Maséré
Judges11:17 Nainappa suro tau lao ri arung Edom untu' méllau paramisi molai wanuwanna. Iyakiya dé' napalaloi mennang. Nainappa méllauwi mennang gau' padaé ri arung Moab
Judges11:18 Nainappa napatteru mennang joppana molai padang kessi'é
Judges11:19 Purairo suroni umma Israélié tau lao ri Sihon
Judges11:20 Iyakiya Sihon dé' napalaloi mennang saba' dé' namateppe makkedaé maélomi bawang lalo. Mala napangarai sininna tentarana nainappa mébbu markas ri Yahas nanaluruiwi Israélié.
Judges11:21 Iyakiya Puwangnge
Judges11:22 Iyaro daérana Amorié natudangiwi mennang mappammulai polé ri Arnon ri seddé yattang
Judges11:23 Jaji Puwangnge
Judges11:24 Na makkekkuwangngé maélokoga malai lisu? Tana iya nabbéréyangngé Kamos
Judges11:25 Muwasengngi lebbi kessikko naiya Balak ana' Zipor
Judges11:26 Tellu ratu taung ittana Israélié tudangiwi Hésybon sibawa Aroér nenniya désa-désaé ri seddéna
Judges11:27 Dé'
Judges11:28 Iyakiya arung Among dé' nabati-batiwi iyaro pasenna Yéfta.
Judges11:29 Narikuwasaina Yéfta ri Rohna Puwangnge. Nalaona Yéfta célléngiwi daéra Giléad sibawa Manasyé nainappa lisu ri Mizpa ri Giléad. Polé kuwaro napatteruni joppana ri daérana bangsa Amongngé.
Judges11:30 Najjanciyanni Yéfta iyaé lao ri Puwangnge
Judges11:31 enrengngé lisu sibawa salama
Judges11:32 Nainappa nalléttoi Yéfta Salo Yordan untu' musui tau Amongngé
Judges11:33 Nagasani Yéfta mennang matteru polé ri Aroér lettu ri daéra seddéna Minit – iya manenna duwappulo kota – sibawa lettu sibbéla Abél-Keramim. Maéga senna tau Amon iya maté
Judges11:34 Wettunna lisu Yéfta polé ri Mizpa
Judges11:35 Naitana muwa Yéfta
Judges11:36 Nanakkeda iyaro ana'daraé lao ri Yéfta
Judges11:37 “Banna”
Judges11:38 Ripalaloni ri ambo'na
Judges11:39 Labe'nana duwampuleng
Judges11:40 laowi ana'-ana'daraé patangngesso tungke taung untu' messé babuwa méngngerangngi ana'na Yéfta ri Giléad.
Judges12:1 Iyaro wettué sadiya-sadiyani suku Efraim untu' mammusu
Judges12:2 Nakkedana Yéfta
Judges12:3 Jaji
Judges12:4 Nanapaddeppungenni Yéfta sininna tau Giléad-é
Judges12:5 Iyaro sining tau Giléad iya mammusué
Judges12:6 risuroni ri mennang powadai ada “Syibolét”. Makkedai matu “Sibolét” nasaba dé' naulléi teppui adaéro sibawa teppa. Nainappa natikkeng mennang nanaunoi ri sala séddinna onrong alléttongngéro. Nariyunona wettuéro 42.000 tau Efraim.
Judges12:7 Enneng taung ittana Yéfta pimpingngi tau Israélié. Nainappa maté naritampung ri kampong assalenna iyanaritu kota Mizpa ri Giléad.
Judges12:8 Labe'nana Yéfta
Judges12:9 Ebzan mappunnaiwi telluppulo ana' worowané sibawa telluppulo ana' makkunrai. Ana'-ana'na iya makkunraiéro napasiyalai sibawa sining tau polé ri suku laingngé
Judges12:10 nainappa maté sibawa ritampung ri Bétléhém.
Judges12:11 Labe'nana Ebzan
Judges12:12 Nainappa maté naritampung ri Ayalon ri daérana Zébulon.
Judges12:13 Labe'nana Elon
Judges12:14 Ana'na iya worowané engka patappulo tau
Judges12:15 Nainappa maté naritampung ri Piraton ri daérana Efraim ri buluna tau Amalé'é.
Judges13:1 Madosasi tau Israélié lao ri Puwangnge
Judges13:2 Ri wettuéro engka séddi tau worowané ri kota Zora. Asenna Manoah
Judges13:3 Iyakiya riséuwaé esso nappaitangngi aléna malaéka'na Puwangnge lao ri aléna sibawa makkeda
Judges13:4 Rimakkuwannanaro jagaiwi alému madécéd-décéng. Aja' muwénung anggoro iyaré'ga énungeng maseri
Judges13:5 Jajinna iyaro ana'mu
Judges13:6 Purairo laoni bainéna Manoah ri lakkainna sibawa makkeda
Judges13:7 Iyakiya makkedai makkedaé mattampu'ka matu sibawa lolongeng séddi ana' worowané. Makkeda towi makkedaé dé' naweddikka ménung anggoro iyaré'ga énungeng maseri
Judges13:8 Naéngkalinganaro
Judges13:9 Naéngkalingai Allataala paréllaunna Manoah. Poléni paimeng iyaro malaéka'na Puwangnge wettunna bainéna Manoah tudat-tudang ri dare'é. Iyaro wettué dé'i gaga lakkainna kuwaro.
Judges13:10 Jaji larini paissengiwi gau'éro
Judges13:11 Masittani Manoah maccowériwi bainéna. Naddeppérini iyaro tauwé sibawa makkutana
Judges13:12 Namakkutana Manoah
Judges13:13 Nappébali iyaro malaéka'na Puwangnge
Judges13:14 
Judges13:15 Nanakkeda Manoah lao ri Aléna
Judges13:16 Iyakiya makkedai iyaro malaéka'na Puwangnge
Judges13:17 
Judges13:18 Nakkutana iyaro malaéka'na Puwangnge
Judges13:19 Nanaalana Manoah sikaju bémbé lolo sibawa céddé gandong
Judges13:20 Ri wettu malluwa'na mupa apié liyasé polé ri mézbaéro
Judges13:21 
Judges13:22 Nanakkeda Manoah lao ri bainéna
Judges13:23 Nappébali bainéna
Judges13:24 Siyagangngaré uleng ri munrinna iyaro bainéna Manoah jajiyanni séddi ana' worowané nanawéréngngi aseng Simson. Iyaro ana'é mancaji battowani enrengngé ribarakkaki ri Puwangnge;
Judges13:25 na wettunna engkai ri akkémanna suku Dan
Judges14:1 Riséuwaé esso laowi Simson ri Timna
Judges14:2 Nainappa lisu sibawa makkeda ri tomatowanna
Judges14:3 Iyakiya makkedai tomatowanna
Judges14:4 Dé' naissengngi tomatowanna Simson makkedaé Puwangnge ritu mébbui Simson pogau'i gau'éro. Saba'
Judges14:5 Nanalaona Simson ri Timna silaong sibawa tomatowanna. Wettunna mennang lalo riséddié dare anggoro
Judges14:6 natennasenna-sennana Simson mancaji mawatang polé ri akuwasanna Puwangnge. Nainappa nasapé-sapé iyaro singaé sibawa limanna
Judges14:7 Nainappa lao Simson ri ana'daraéro sibawa sipabbicara-bicara
Judges14:8 Labe'nana siyagangngaré wettu ittana
Judges14:9 Nakarao'ni iyaro cani'é ri laleng limanna
Judges14:10 Laonana ambo'na Simson ri bolana ana'daraéro
Judges14:11 Wettunna naita tau Filistingngé
Judges14:12 Nanakkeda Simson lao ri mennang
Judges14:13 Iyakiya rékko dé' muwulléi teppui
Judges14:14 Nakkeda Simson
Judges14:15 Jaji
Judges14:16 Rimakkuwannanaro
Judges14:17 Ri lalenna pitungngessoé péstaéro bainéna Simson terimi matteru. Nasaba matteru-terui majjabé
Judges14:18 Jaji
Judges14:19 Tappa mawatanni Simson polé ri akuwasanna Puwangnge
Judges14:20 Nainappa matuwa worowanéna mabbéréyangngi iyaro bainéna Simson lao ri tau iya mancajiyé passeppina Simson ri wettu akawingenna.
Judges15:1 Siyagangngaré wettu ri munrinna
Judges15:2 Adanna lao ri Simson
Judges15:3 Makkedani Simson
Judges15:4 Nainappa lao tikkeng telluratu serigala. Ikko'na iyaro sining serigalaé nasiyoi tadduwa-duwa. Ri sumpunnaro nataroiwi séddi sulo.
Judges15:5 Purairo napalluwa'ni iyaro sining suloé nainappa naleppessang iyaro sining serigalaé ri laleng sining dare gandonna tau Filistingngé. Nanréni api sininna gandong iya puraé riyéngngala kuwaro. Mala gandong ritanengngé sibawa palla-palla anggoro'é maccowéto nanré.
Judges15:6 Laoni sining tau Filistingngé salidikiwi gau'éro. Naripaissengina mennang ri tauwé makkedaé Simson ritu pogau'i
Judges15:7 Nanakkeda Simson lao risining tau Filistingngéro
Judges15:8 Nainappa nalurui mennang sibawa mabecco sibawa mpunoi maéga polé ri yelle'na mennang. Purairo
Judges15:9 Nalaona tau Filistingngé ri daéra Yéhuda namakkéma kuwaro
Judges15:10 Makkutanani tau Yéhudaé ri tau Filistingngé
Judges15:11 Naéngkalinganaro
Judges15:12 Nakkeda mennang
Judges15:13 Nakkeda mennang
Judges15:14 Wettunna Simson ritiwi lettu ri Léhi
Judges15:15 Nainappa lolongenni séddi buku bangi iya barué mupa polé risikajué kaleddé. Naitténi iyaro bukué
Judges15:16 Namakkélonna Simson
Judges15:17 Purairo
Judges15:18 Namadekka senna'ni Simson
Judges15:19 Nanatimpa'ni Allataala kalebbongngé ri bulu batué ri Léhiro
Judges15:20 Duwappulo taung ittana Simson pimpingngi umma Israélié wettunna mennang rikuwasai ri tau Filistingngé.
Judges16:1 Riséuwaé esso laowi Simson ri Gaza. Kuwaniro siruntu sibawa séddi cakkuribang nanalao matinro sibawa makkunraiéro.
Judges16:2 Nanaéngkalingani pabbanuwana Gaza makkedaé engkai Simson kuwaro. Jaji
Judges16:3 Iyakiya dé' namatinro Simson kuwaro narapi élé. Tengnga benninna moto'i nanalao ri pintu gerbanna kotaé. Nareddu'i iyaro pintué iya manenna silaong allirinna sibawa paccala'na. Nainappa naakka iyaro pintué ri salakangkanna
Judges16:4 Purairo napojisi Simson séddi makkunrai polé ri Lompo Sorék. Asenna iyaro makkunraié Délila.
Judges16:5 Napoléna lima tau panguwasana Filistingngé ri makkunraiéro sibawa makkeda
Judges16:6 Nakkeda Délila lao ri Simson
Judges16:7 Nappébali Simson
Judges16:8 Nainappa iyaro sining panguwasa Filistingngéro mpéréngngi Délila pitu tulu pana iya dé'éppa namarakko senna. Nainappa
Judges16:9 
Judges16:10 Nanakkeda Délila lao ri Simson
Judges16:11 Nametté Simson
Judges16:12 Na tau Filistingngé mattajengngi ri bili' laingngé
Judges16:13 Nanakkeda Délila lao ri Simson
Judges16:14 Naripatinrona Simson ri Délila nainappa naaneng iya pituppesse gemme'na Simson ri wennangngé ri paréwa tennungngé. Purairo nassiyorenni ri aju paréwa tennungngéro nainappa gora
Judges16:15 Nainappa makkeda Délila
Judges16:16 Esso-esso Délila matteru-teru bawang majjabé sibawa maddessa
Judges16:17 Angkanna nacurita Simson rahasiyana
Judges16:18 Napérasani Délila makkedaé purani nappaissengeng Simson rahasia atinna. Rimakkuwannanaro nakirinni iyaé birittaéwé lao risining tomakuwasana Filistingngé
Judges16:19 Purairo ricapu-capuni Simson ri Délila gangkanna matinro ri wakkanna
Judges16:20 Nainappa gora
Judges16:21 Naritikkenna risining tau Filistingngé sibawa nacukkéi lise matanna. Natiwini mennang ri Gaza nanasiyoi sibawa duwa ranté tembaga
Judges16:22 Iyakiya iyaro wettué mammulasi tuwo paimeng gemme'na.
Judges16:23 Riséuwaé esso maddeppungenni sining panguwasana Filistingngé maélo mappésta sibawa makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng marowa senna untu' Dagon
Judges16:24 Wettunna mennang mariyo-riyo makkedai
Judges16:25 
Judges16:26 Nakkeda Simson lao ri anana' worowané iya rénréngngéngngi
Judges16:27 Iyaro gedungngé buce sibawa tau. Iya lima panguwasana Filistingngé engka towi kuwaro. Na ri langga yasé'na iyaro gedungngé engka kira-kira 3.000 tau. Makkita-ita manengngi mennang sibawa méllé-kéllé'i Simson.
Judges16:28 Iyaro wettué massempajangngi Simson; makkedai
Judges16:29 Purairo nakkatenninni Simson iya duwa alliri tengnga iya tula'éngngi iyaro gedungngé. Nainappa mattulekkeng sibawa lima abéyona ri alliri séddié na lima ataunna ri alliri iya laingngé
Judges16:30 gorani
Judges16:31 Nanapoléna sumpulolona sibawa sininna kaluwargana untu' malai ujuna. Natiwini mennang iyaro ujuna lisu
Judges17:1 Engka séddi tau worowané riyaseng Mikha. Monroi ri daéra bulué ri daérana Efraim.
Judges17:2 Riséuwaé esso makkedai lao ri indo'na
Judges17:3 Napalisuni Mikha iyaro dowié ri indo'na
Judges17:4 Purana napalisu Mikha iyaro dowié ri indo'na
Judges17:5 Mémeng mappunnaini Mikha séddi onrong assompang. Mébbuni siyagangngaré dato'-dato' barahala sibawa silampa éfod nainappa nakkka sala séddinna ana'na worowané mancaji imang.
Judges17:6 Iyaro wettué dé' nappunnai arung bangsa Israélié; tungke tau pogau'i aga iya nangga'é tongeng.
Judges17:7 Iyatoro wettué engka séddi tau kallolo polé ri suku Léwi. Riyolo monroi ri Bétléhém ri daérana Yéhuda.
Judges17:8 Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé nasalaini iyaro kotaé sibawa mattengngang joppa sappa onrong iya laingngé. Ri laleng allalengennaro lettu'ni ri bolana Mikha ri daéra buluna Efraim.
Judges17:9 Makkutanani Mikha ri aléna
Judges17:10 Nakkeda Mikha
Judges17:11 Nasitujuini iyaro kallolo Léwié
Judges17:12 
Judges17:13 Nakkeda Mikha
Judges18:1 Iyaro wettué ri Israélié dé'gaga arung. Suku Dan sappa-sappa mupi daéra untu' mancaji daérana mennang
Judges18:2 Rimakkuwannanaro
Judges18:3 Wettunna maélo muttamakiwi iyaro bolaé naéngkalingani mennang iyaro kallolo Léwié mabbicara
Judges18:4 Nappébali iyaro tau kalloloé
Judges18:5 Namakkeda mennang lao ri aléna
Judges18:6 Nappébali iyaro imangngé
Judges18:7 Purairo joppani iya lima tauwéro nanalao ri Lais. Kuwaniro napénessai pabbanuwana. Manessani makkedaé cara atuwo-tuwonna iyaro pabbanuwana Lais pada-pada cara atuwonna bangsa Sidongngé. Namuni mennang massala
Judges18:8 Wettunna iya lima tauwéro lisu lao risining sukunna ri Zora sibawa Esytaol
Judges18:9 Makkedani mennang
Judges18:10 
Judges18:11 Rimakkuwannanaro
Judges18:12 laoni mennang ri bagiyang yajanna Kiryat-Yéarim ri daérana Yéhuda nainappa makkéma kuwaro. Iyanaro saba'na nariyaseng mupi iyaro onrongngé Akkémanna Dan.
Judges18:13 Polé kuwaro joppani mennang matteru ri daéra buluna Efraim lettu ri bolana Mikha.
Judges18:14 Makkedani iya lima tau mata-mata risuroé riyoloro lao ri sellao-sellaona
Judges18:15 Nainappa mennang lao ri bolana Mikha
Judges18:16 Iyaro wettué iya enneng ratuna prajuri suku Dan
Judges18:17 Iya lima mata-mataéro matteruni muttama ri lalempola
Judges18:18 Wettunna iya lima tauwéro muttama ri bolana Mikha sibawa malai éfod-é silaong dato'-dato' barahalaéro
Judges18:19 Nappébali mennang
Judges18:20 Masennanni iyaro kallolo Léwié sibawa tangngaéro. Jaji
Judges18:21 Nainappa napatteru mennang joppana iyaro rombangangngé
Judges18:22 Wettunna mennang mabélani
Judges18:23 gora-gorani Mikha sibawa sining taunna lao ri mennang. Iyaro sining tau suku Dangngé gilinni sibawa makkutana lao ri Mikha
Judges18:24 Nappébali Mikha
Judges18:25 Nakkeda iyaro sining tau suku Dangngé
Judges18:26 Purana makkeda makkuwaro
Judges18:27 Puranana iyaro sining tau duku Dangngé nalariyang iyaro imangngé nenniya iyaro barab-barang assompang ébbuna Mikha
Judges18:28 
Judges18:29 Asenna iyaro kotaé nasulléiwi mennang mancaji Dan
Judges18:30 Dato'-dato' barahala iya natiwié mennanro
Judges18:31 Iyaro dato'-dato' barahala ébbuna Mikha tette'i ri Lais ri wettu engkana mupa Kémana Puwangnge ri Silo.
Judges19:1 Wettunna tau Israélié dé'pa nappunnai arung
Judges19:2 Iyakiya ri munri macayii iyaro makkunraié lao ri aléna
Judges19:3 iyaro tau Léwié laoni molaiwi untu' palécéi nalisu ri aléna. Laowi sibawa tiwi séddi ata enrengngé duwakkaju kaleddé. Lettu'nana kuwaro
Judges19:4 sibawa nadessa'na kuwammengngi aja' nalisu. Rimakkuwannanaro
Judges19:5 Ri esso maeppaé
Judges19:6 Nanatudanna iyaro tau Léwié sibawa manré ménung sisama ambo'na iyaro makkunraié. Iyakiya wettunna tettong maélo joppa
Judges19:7 
Judges19:8 Ri esso malimaé
Judges19:9 Nainappa wettunna iyaro tau Léwié maélo joppa silaong gundi'na sibawa atanna
Judges19:10 Iyakiya iyaro tau Léwié dé'na namaélo mabbennina kuwaro. Joppani sibawa gundi'na
Judges19:11 
Judges19:12 Iyakiya mappébaliwi puwanna
Judges19:13 
Judges19:14 Rimakkuwannanaro joppani mennang matteru sibawa dé' nappésau ri Yébus. Labuni essoé wettunna mennang lettu ri Gibéa ri daérana suku Bényamin.
Judges19:15 Léppanni mennang kuwaro untu' mabbenni
Judges19:16 Wettunna mennang tudang ri tana lapanna kotaé
Judges19:17 Wettunna naita iyaro tomatowaé tau Léwié ri tana lapangngé
Judges19:18 Nappébali iyaro tau Léwié
Judges19:19 Dé' aga-aga iya riyapparelluwangngé iya laingngé
Judges19:20 Nanakkeda iyaro tomatowaé
Judges19:21 Nanatiwini mennang ri bolana nanawéréngngi inanré kaleddé'-kaleddé'na mennang. Sibawa puranana iyaro sining topoléna nabissani ajéna
Judges19:22 Wettunna mennang massennas-sennang
Judges19:23 Massuni iyaro tomatowaé sibawa makkeda lao ri mennang
Judges19:24 Uwéréppo matu gundi'na sibawa ana'ku iya ana'daraé. Weddikko pésennangiwi alému sibawa mennang. Iyakiya
Judges19:25 Iyakiya nasaba iyaro sining tau benna'é tette'i mattedde
Judges19:26 Subunnana lisuni iyaro makkunraié
Judges19:27 Iyaro éléé
Judges19:28 Adanna
Judges19:29 Lettu'nana ri bolaé
Judges19:30 Sininna tau iya mitaéngngi iyaro makkeda
Judges20:1 Napoléna sininna umma Israélié polé ri Dan ri manorang lettu ri Bérsyéba ri yattang
Judges20:2 Iya manenna engka 400.000 prajuri polé ri pasukang mallalengngé. Pamimping-pamimpinna tungke suku bangsa engka towi kuwaro.
Judges20:3 Iyaro wettué naéngkalinga toni sining tau suku Bényamingngé makkedaé sininna tau Israélié iya laingngé maddeppungenni ri Mizpa. Nakkutananni iyaro sining tau Israélié lao ri tau Léwi iya riyunoé gundi'naro
Judges20:4 
Judges20:5 Napolé sining tau Gibéaé ri wennié untu' sappaka. Nakeppungngi bola iya uwonroiyé mabbenni sibawa akkatta untu' mpunoka
Judges20:6 Nauwalani ujuna nainappa ulétta-létta
Judges20:7 Iko maneng iya engkaé kuwaé iyanaritu tau Israél. Jaji makkekkuwangngé uwéllauwi timbangetta!”
Judges20:8 Nassama-samang sining tau iya maddeppungengngé ri onrongngéro tettong sibawa makkeda
Judges20:9 Iyanaé maélo tapogau': Taundiwi untu' pattentui sining tau iya harusu'é gasai Gibéa.
Judges20:10 Tawa seppulona polé risininna tau worowané Israélié harusu passadiya inanré untu' ménnang iya mammusué. Iya laingngé laowi gasai Gibéa untu' hukkungngi mennang nasaba jana iya puraé napogau' ri yelle'na umma Israélié.”
Judges20:11 Makkuwaniro umma Israélié masséddi untu' gasai Gibéa.
Judges20:12 Purairo nasuroni umma Israélié sining tauwé lao ri sininna daérana suku Bényamin untu' palettu'i karébaéwé: “Ja aga iya kajajiyangngé ri iko?
Judges20:13 Abbéréyangngi iyaro sining tau benna'é polé ri Gibéa lao ri idi kuwammengngi taunoi mennang nanallalengiwiro ripallennye'i iyaro jaé polé ri tengnga-tengngana Israélié.” Iyakiya dé' nabati-batiwi tau Bényamingngé ada-adanna tau Israélié iya laingngéro.
Judges20:14 Mala polé risininna kotaé ri daérana Bényaminro poléni sining tau Bényamingngé ri Gibéa untu' musui sining tau Israél laingngé.
Judges20:15 Iyaro essoé napaddeppungenni mennang polé ri kota-kotana mennang singngéga 26.000 prajuri. Na ri lainnaéro pabbanuwanato Gibéa paddeppungeng toni 700 tau ripilé. Iya manenna tau kabiyo-biyo iya maccaé mallobang. Rékko mallobangngi
Judges20:16 
Judges20:17 Na risining tau Israél laingngé maddeppungenni 400.000 égana prajuri tallatié.
Judges20:18 Iyaro tentarana umma Israélié laoni ri Bétel
Judges20:19 Pappa bajana éléé joppani mennang sibawa makkéma ri seddéna kota Gibéa.
Judges20:20 Naatoro'ni mennang barisi musuna siyolong sibawa kotaéro
Judges20:21 Nassuna tentarana Bényamin maggasato sibawa mpunoi 22.000 tentara Israélié iyaro essoé.
Judges20:22 Nasaba acaurengngéro
Judges20:23 
Judges20:24 Untu' mabbékkaduwanna mennang lao gasai iyaro tentarana Bényamin.
Judges20:25 Na untu' mabbékkaduwannato sining tau Bényamingngé massu maggasa. Iyaé sisengngé naunoi 18.000 prajuri tallatinna tentara Israélié.
Judges20:26 Nalaosi umma Israélié ri Bétel sibawa teri lao ri Puwangnge. Mappuwasani mennang kuwaro narapi wenni sibawa makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng ritunu lao ri Puwangnge.
Judges20:27 Iyaro wettué Petti Assijancinna Allataala engkai ri Bétel
Judges20:28 
Judges20:29 Naéngkalingana pappébalinna Puwang -ngéro
Judges20:30 Nainappa ri esso matellué nagasani mennang tentarana Bényamin sibawa susunang tentara mangoloé ri Gibéa pada-pada iya puraé napogau' ri esso-esso riyolona.
Judges20:31 Maggasa toni sining tau Bényamingngé
Judges20:32 Rimakkuwannanaro nasenni sining tau Bényamingngé nacausi sining tau Israéliéro pada-pada pammulanna. Iyakiya tentara Israélié pura narancanani untu' soro kuwammengngi natattaré tentara Bényamingngéro lao ri watattanaé
Judges20:33 Wettunna soro pasukang utamana Israélié
Judges20:34 Iyaro mennang sining tau tappilé polé risininna Israélié; jumellana 10.000 tau. Marowani musué wettunna seppulo sebbu tauwéro gasai Gibéa. Dé' sises-siseng nasenna-sennai sining tau Bényamingngé makkedaé dé'na namaittana nacau.
Judges20:35 Puwangnge mpéréngngi apakalang tau Israélié lao ri tau Bényamingngé
Judges20:36 Nappai namaingeki tau Bényamingngé makkedaé cauni mennang. Pasukang utamana Israélié nattungka lari polé risining tau Bényamingngé nasaba nattuwangngi ana' buwana mennang ri onrong-ngonrong allekkekenna ri seddéna Gibéa.
Judges20:37 Iyaro sining tau mallekke'é mapperi-perini massu gasai Gibéa; tattale'ni mennang lao tulili ri laleng kotaé sibawa mpunoi sininna tauwé kuwaro.
Judges20:38 Iyakiya pura mémenni sipekke lebbi riyolo makkedaé rékko engka rumpu makkompe liyasé polé ri tengnga-tengngana kotaé
Judges20:39 pasukang utama iya soroé harusu'i giling sibawa gasai balié. Iyaro wettué sining tau Bényamingngé purani nauno 30 tentara Israélié sibawa nasenni mennang nacausi sining tau Israélié pada-pada riyolo.
Judges20:40 Iyakiya tennasenna-sennana mammulani maddumpu rumpué liyasé polé ri tengnga-tengngana kota Gibéa. Tassélenni sining tau Bényamingngé wettunna mennang giling sibawa naitai sininna kotaé nanré api.
Judges20:41 Na iyatoro wettué nagiling maggasa pasukang utamana Israélié
Judges20:42 Jaji
Judges20:43 Sining tau Israélié keppungngi sibawa lellungngi mennang matteru-teru lettu riséuwaé onrong ri seddé Gibéa. Mallellungngi nanauno towi mennang
Judges20:44 seppulo aruwa sebbu prajuri tallatinna polé ri tentarana Bényamin.
Judges20:45 Tentara Bényamin laingngé balé'ni nainappa lari molai daéra padang kessi'é mattuju ri bulu-bulu batué ri Rimon. Limassebbu tau ri yelle'na mennang riyuno ri tengnga laleng. Iya laingngé rilellungngi matteru lettu ri Gidéom. Polé risining tauwéro engka 2.000 riyuno.
Judges20:46 Jaji
Judges20:47 Iyakiya polé ri yelle'na mennang iya lariyé molai daéra padang kessi'é mattuju ri bulu-bulu batué ri Rimon engka 600 tau iya leppe'é. Monroi mennang ri Rimon eppa uleng ittana.
Judges20:48 Nanalisuna tau Israélié nainappa nalurui sibawa nauno maneng sésa-sésana tau Bényamingngé – worowané

Judges21:2 Makkekkuwangngé laoni mennang ri Bétel sibawa tudang messé babuwa narapi wenni ri yolona Puwangnge. Terini mennang sibawa mangobbi
Judges21:3 “Oh Puwang
Judges21:4 Pappa bajanana
Judges21:5 Nainappa nasalidiki mennang ri yelle'na suku-suku bangsa Israélié aga engka iya dé'é nalao maddeppungeng mangolo ri Puwangnge ri Mizpa riyolo. (Iyaro wettué purani mennang mattanro makkedaé tau iya dé'é napennoiwi pangobbié lao ri Mizpa harusu'i rihukkung maté.)
Judges21:6 Kasiyanni umma Israélié lao ri saudara-saudarana mennang suku Bényamingngé; makkedani mennang
Judges21:7 Aga harusu tapogau' kuwammengngi tau Bényamin iya nasésaéwé weddingngi mappunnai bainé
Judges21:8 Nanasalidikini mennang aga engka séddi golongang polé ri bangsa Israélié iya dé'é nalao maddeppungeng ri Mizpa. Nanalolongenni mennang makkedaé polé risining tau Yabés-é ri Giléad
Judges21:9 Nasaba
Judges21:10 Rimakkuwannanaro
Judges21:11 Riparéntanni mennang untu' mpunoi sininna tau worowané
Judges21:12 Na ri yelle'na sining tau iya monroé ri Yabésro
Judges21:13 Nainappa kiring suro sininna umma Israélié lao risining tau Bényamin iya engkaé ri bulu-bulu batué ri Rimon untu' mappéddarangngi assidaméngngé.
Judges21:14 Rimakkuwannanaro lisuni iyaro sining tau Bényamingngé
Judges21:15 Kasiyanni umma Israélié lao ri tau Bényamingngé

Judges21:21 sibawa jaga-jagano kuwaro. Matti rékko ana'-ana'daraé ri Silo massui untu' séré-séré pattaungeng untu' Puwangnge
Judges21:22 Rékko ambo' iyaré'ga ana' buranéna poléi sibawa tuntu'i
Judges21:23 Napogau'ni iyaro sining tau Bényamingngé aga iya ripowadaé lao ri mennang. Nalariyanni mennang tungke-tungke séddi ana' dara polé ri yelle'na ana'-ana' dara iya séré-séré ri Silo. Nainappa mennang lisu ri daérana sibawa patettongngi paimeng kota-kotana nainappa mattette kuwaro.
Judges21:24 Iyaro sining tau Israél laingngé joppa toni. Lisuni mennang ri tana appunnangenna ri laleng daérana tungke-tungke
Judges21:25 Iyaro wettué dé'pa gaga arung ri Israélié. Tungke tau napogau'i aga iya nangga'é tongeng. 1 1
Ruth1:1 Riyolo ri wettu dé'napa nappunnai Israélié séddi arung
Ruth1:2 
Ruth1:3 matéi Elimélékh. Nanaonrona Naomi silaong iya duwa ana'na.
Ruth1:4 Iya duwa ana'-ana'naro kawingngi sibawa ana'-ana' dara Moab
Ruth1:5 iya duwa ana' worowanéna Naomiro
Ruth1:6 Siyagangngaré wettu rimunrinna naéngkalingani Naomi makkedaé nabarakkakini Puwangnge umma Israélié sibawa wassélé éngngalang iya makessingngé. Rimakkuwannanaro Naomi sibawa iya duwa ménéttunna mangujuni untu' salaiwi Moab.
Ruth1:7 Joppani mennang massibawa lisu ri Yéhuda. Ri tengnga laleng
Ruth1:8 makkedani Naomi lao ri iya duwa ménéttunnaro
Ruth1:9 Tennapodo napuwéloi Puwangnge mpérékko oki kuwammengngi muwallaibinéngeng paimeng.” Purana napowada makkuwaro
Ruth1:10 sibawa makkeda lao ri Naomi
Ruth1:11 Nappébali Naomi
Ruth1:12 Lisuno na'
Ruth1:13 aga maélokoga mattajeng narapi mennang battowa? Masa nasaba gau'éro nadé' mukawing sibawa tau laingngé? Dé'
Ruth1:14 Terisi maladde-ladde Rut sibawa Orpa nainappa massimang Orpa nanabau towi matuwanna nainappa lisu. Iyakiya Rut dé' namaélo massarang polé matuwannaro.
Ruth1:15 Makkedani Naomi lao ri aléna
Ruth1:16 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Rut
Ruth1:17 Kégi-kégi Indo' maté
Ruth1:18 Naitani Naomi makkedaé mattedde'i Rut untu' maccowé
Ruth1:19 Nanapatteruni mennang joppana lettu ri Bétléhém. Lettu'na muwa kuwaro
Ruth1:20 Nakkeda Naomi
Ruth1:21 Wettukku lao polé kuwaé engkaka ri laleng agennekengngé
Ruth1:22 Makkuwaniro curitana pékkugi Naomi lisu polé ri Moab silaong Rut ménéttunna iya tau Moab-éro. Lettu'ni mennang ri Bétléhém ri pammulanna wettu éngngalang gandongngé.
Ruth2:1 Mappunnaiwi Naomi séddi anggota kaluwarga polé ri lakkainna iya matéénna
Ruth2:2 Riséuwaé esso makkedai Rut lao ri Naomi
Ruth2:3 Nalaona Rut ri dare'é sibawa mitté gandong maccowériwi sining paréngngalaé. Nasitujuwangngi laowi ri dare appunnangenna Boas.
Ruth2:4 Dé' namaitta rimunrinna engkani Boas polé ri Bétléhém sibawa mabbéré selleng lao risining paréngngalaé
Ruth2:5 Nanakkutana Boas ri mandoro'na
Ruth2:6 Nappébali iyaro mandoro'é
Ruth2:7 Méllau paramisiwi ri iyya kuwammenngi naripalalo maccowé ri munrinna sining paréngngalaé untu' mitté gandong iya sempé-sempé'é. Sipongenna élé najjama matteru
Ruth2:8 Nanakkeda Boas lao ri Rut
Ruth2:9 
Ruth2:10 Naéngkalinganaro
Ruth2:11 Nappébali Boas
Ruth2:12 Tennapodo Puwangnge wale'i sininna akessingemmu. Tennapodo mutarimai aga iya sitinajaé nawérékko Puwangnge
Ruth2:13 Nappébali Rut
Ruth2:14 Narapinana wettunna untu' manré
Ruth2:15 Nainappa laosi Rut mangitté gandong. Laonana
Ruth2:16 
Ruth2:17 Matteru bawanni Rut mangitté gandong ri dare'é narapi arawéng. Puranana nakkunrureng daramé-daramé gandongngéro untu' paddunui lise'na polé ri batanna
Ruth2:18 Nainappa lisu ri kotaé sibawa tiwi wassélé itténaro nanappaitangngi lao ri matuwannaro siyaga égana pura naitté. Sibawa nawéréng toni iyaro matuwanna inanré iya dé'é naulléi paccappui wettunna manré.

Ruth3:1 Siyagangngaré wettu ri munrinna
Ruth3:2 Dé'ga muwajjama silaong sining pajjama makkunraié ri dare'na Boas? Nah
Ruth3:3 Cemméno makkekkuwangngé
Ruth3:4 Pénessaiwi kégawi lao matinro. Rékko matinroni
Ruth3:5 Nappébali Rut
Ruth3:6 Nalaona Rut ri onronna tauwé majjama paddunui gandongngé polé ri uléna. Kuwaniro napogau' sininna iya risurowangngéngngi ri matuwanna.
Ruth3:7 Puranana Boas manré sibawa ménung
Ruth3:8 Ri tengnga bennié tappa moto'ni Boas sibawa maélo giling. Tassélenni mitai engka séddi makkunrai matinro ri seddéna ajéna.

Ruth4:1 Laoni Boas ri anrong addeppungengngé ri pintu gerbanna kotaé. Tudannana kuwaro laloni tau worowané iya manuru'é Boas iyanaritu kaluwargana Elimélékh iya macawé'é. Nariyobbina ri Boas
Ruth4:2 Nainappa naéra Boas seppulo tomariyolona masaraka'na kotaéro untu' tudatto massibawa kuwaro. Tudannana mennang
Ruth4:3 makkedani Boas lao ri tau iya massiyajingngé mupa alénaro
Ruth4:4 Nauwasengngi harusu'ko missengngi passalenna gau'éro. Rékko maéloko melliwi
Ruth4:5 Namakkeda Boas
Ruth4:6 Nappébali iyaro tauwé
Ruth4:7 Iyaro wettué rékko mabbalu'i tauwé iyaré'ga massélérengngi séuwaé appunnangenna
Ruth4:8 Rimakkuwannanaro
Ruth4:9 Nanakkeda Boas lao ri tomariyolona masaraka'é sibawa lao risininna tau laing iya engkaé kuwaro
Ruth4:10 Ri lainnaéro uwala towi Rut
Ruth4:11 Sining tomariyolona masaraka'é sibawa tau laing iya engkaé kuwaro makkedani
Ruth4:12 Tennapodo ana'-ana' iya nawéréngngékko matu Puwangnge naolai makkunrai maloloéwé pancajiwi matu kaluwargamu pada-pada Pérés
Ruth4:13 Nanalani Boas Rut mancaji bainéna. Puwangnge barakkakiwi Rut angkanna mattampu nanajajiyang séddi ana' worowané.
Ruth4:14 Makkedani sining makkunraié lao ri Naomi
Ruth4:15 Iyaro ménéttummu napoji senna'ko. Purano nawéréng lebbi naiya aga iya naullé mabbéréyang pitu ana' worowané. Makkekkuwangngé pura tono nawéréng séddi tau eppo worowané
Ruth4:16 Nalani Naomi iyaro ana'é nanapiyarai sibawa penno pammaséna.
Ruth4:17 Sining makkunrai bali-bali bolana mennang masengngi iyaro ana'é Obéd. Lao ri tungke tau makkedai
