1Samuel1:1 Engka séddi tau worowané
1Samuel1:2 Elkana mappunnai duwa bainé
1Samuel1:3 Tungke' taung laowi Elkana polé ri Rama untu' massompa ri Silo sibawa makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng ri Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé. Iya mancajiyé imanna Puwangnge ri Silo iyanaritu Hofni sibawa Pinéhas
1Samuel1:4 Tungke'-tungke' rékko Elkana makkasuwiyang akkarobangeng
1Samuel1:5 Iyakiya Hana nawéréngngi sibagiyang bawang saba' Puwangnge dé' nawéréngngi ana'. Namuni makkuwaro Elkana napoji senna'i Hana.
1Samuel1:6 Tuli ripeddiriwi atinna Hana sibawa ripakatuna ri Pénina
1Samuel1:7 Iyaro gau'é kajajiyangngi polé ri taungngé lao ri taungngé; rékko laowi mennang ri Bolana Puwangnge
1Samuel1:8 Nasisetto Elkana
1Samuel1:9 Riséuwaé esso purana mennang manré ri Bolana Puwangnge ri Silo
1Samuel1:10 
1Samuel1:11 Nainappa majjanci Hana
1Samuel1:12 Maitta senna Hana massempajang
1Samuel1:13 Massempajangngi Hana ri laleng ati
1Samuel1:14 Namakkedana Eli lao ri aléna
1Samuel1:15 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Hana
1Samuel1:16 Aja' nariyangga'ka makkunrai lampa. Massempajakka pada-pada iyaé nasaba masara senna'ka.”
1Samuel1:17 Nanakkeda Eli
1Samuel1:18 Nappébali Hana
1Samuel1:19 Pappa bajanana maéléni Elkana sibawa kaluwargana moto
1Samuel1:20 Mattampu'ni iyaro makkunraié sibawa jajiyang ana' worowané. Nasenni Samuél
1Samuel1:21 Narapi wettunna Elkana sibawa kaluwargana laosi ri Silo untu' makkasuwiyang akkarobangeng pattaungeng lao ri Puwangnge. Rilainnaéro purai Elkana majjanci untu' makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng iya ripallaingngé.
1Samuel1:22 Iyakiya iyaé sisengngé dé' naccowé Hana. Adanna lao ri lakkainna
1Samuel1:23 Nappébali Elkana
1Samuel1:24 Risalla'nana susu Samuél
1Samuel1:25 Iyaro sapingngé nagéréi
1Samuel1:26 Nakkeda Hana lao ri Eli
1Samuel1:27 Ana'énnaé uwéllau polé ri Puwangnge. Natarimani sempajakku
1Samuel1:28 narimakkuwannanaro uwabbéréyangngi iyaé ana'é untu' mancaji appunnangenna Puwangnge gangka tuwona.” Purairo mennang massompani ri Puwangnge.
1Samuel2:1 Namassempajanna Hana
1Samuel2:2 Dé' gaga iya mapaccingngé pada-pada Puwangnge! Banna aléna iya mullé mabbéré allinrungeng.
1Samuel2:3 Pappésauni abborommu iya kosongngé! Pappésauni bicara matempoé! Saba' iyaro Puwangnge Allataala Iya Pommajeppué; iya madélékiyéngngi sinininna pangkaukenna tauwé.
1Samuel2:4 Poloni panana pahlawangngé
1Samuel2:5 Tau iya messoé riyolo nasaba maonai anré
1Samuel2:6 Mappamaté Puwangnge
1Samuel2:7 Engka tau iya Naébbué kasiyasi
1Samuel2:8 Polé ri apeddirengngé Naakkai tau dé'é angke'na
1Samuel2:9 Tau matinulué tuli amangngi ri laleng allinrungenna Puwangnge. Iyakiya iya majaé ancuru'i binasa ri laleng kalemmengngé sibawa pettak-kape'é. Awatangeng ri alé dé' nawedding riyattuwang
1Samuel2:10 Sining balinna Puwangnge ancuru'i maccabbu
1Samuel2:11 Nanalisuna Elkana sibawa kaluwargana ri Rama
1Samuel2:12 Maja senna ana'-ana'na Eli. Dé' mennang nabati-batiwi Puwangnge
1Samuel2:13 sibawa selaku imang maggau' siélo-élonai mennang lao ri bangsa Israélié. Rékko ébara'na engka tau makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng
1Samuel2:14 iyaro sondo'é nattoddokengngi ri laleng panci onronna jukuéro rinasu
1Samuel2:15 Mala biyasai iyaro pabbantué poléi ri wettu dé'napa naripallaing lunra'na untu' ritunu
1Samuel2:16 Rékko mappébaliwi iyaro tauwé
1Samuel2:17 Makkuwaniro iya duwa ana'na Eliro madosa battowa ri pakkitanna Puwangnge
1Samuel2:18 Na wettuéro
1Samuel2:19 Tungke' taung indo'na mébbu jumba baiccu nanawéréngngi Samuél rékko iyaro makkunraié silaongngi lakkainna poléi makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng pattaungeng.
1Samuel2:20 Nanabarakkakini Eli Elkana sibawa bainéna
1Samuel2:21 Ribarakkakini Hana ri Allataala
1Samuel2:22 Macowa senna'ni Eli. Naéngkalingai matteru-teru appissengengngé passalenna kédo-kédona ana'-ana'na lao ri tau Israélié. Naisseng towi Eli makkedaé iyaro ana'-ana'na matinroi silaong sining makkunrai iya mangonrowangngé ri yolona sumpang Kéma Ahadérékenna Puwangnge.
1Samuel2:23 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani lao ri ana'-ana'na
1Samuel2:24 Aja'na mupogau'i makkuwaéro paimeng
1Samuel2:25 Rékko pasalai tauwé lao ri tolinoé
1Samuel2:26 Sibalé'na Samuél
1Samuel2:27 Riséuwaé esso poléni séddi nabi ri Eli sibawa palettu'i paseng polé ri Puwangnge ri aléna
1Samuel2:28 Polé risininna suku Israélié purani Upilé kaluwargana mancaji imak-Ku
1Samuel2:29 Jaji
1Samuel2:30 Iyya
1Samuel2:31 Engkalingai
1Samuel2:32 Messéko matu sibawa mangémpuru mitai sininna barakka iya uwabbéréyangngé matu lao risining tau laingngé ri Israélié
1Samuel2:33 Iyakiya
1Samuel2:34 Selaku butti makkedaé sininna iya Upowadaéro tongengngi kajajiyang matu
1Samuel2:35 Nainappa piléka matu imang iya matinulué ri Iyya sibawa iya pogau'éngngi aga iya Uparéntangngéngngi. Uwéréngngi matu wija-wijanna iya tuli majjamaé matu selaku imang ri yolona arung-ngarung iya Upilé.
1Samuel2:36 Tungke' wijammu iya tuwoé mupa
1Samuel3:1 Wettuéro
1Samuel3:2 Riséuwaé wenni
1Samuel3:3 na Samuél matinroi ri seddéna Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge
1Samuel3:4 Puwangnge mobbii Samuél
1Samuel3:5 Nainappa lari lao sita Eli sibawa makkeda
1Samuel3:6 Nainappa Puwangnge mobbisi Samuél
1Samuel3:7 
1Samuel3:8 Untu' mabbékkatellunna Puwangnge mobbii Samuél; nanaoto'na Samuél nalao sita Eli sibawa makkeda
1Samuel3:9 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani lao ri Samuél
1Samuel3:10 Nanapoléna Puwangnge
1Samuel3:11 Namakkedana Puwangnge lao ri aléna
1Samuel3:12 Iyaro essoé maélo-Ka pogau'i sininna iya puraé Uwangancangeng lao ri kaluwargana Eli polé ri pammulanna lettu ri paccappurenna.
1Samuel3:13 Purani Upaissengi aléna makkedaé Uhukkungngi matu kaluwargana untu' mannennungeng nasaba ana'-ana'na purai napakatuna-Ka. Naisseng Eli dosa-dosana mennanro
1Samuel3:14 Rimakkuwannanaro mattanroka passalenna kaluwargana Eli
1Samuel3:15 Purairo matinroni paimeng Samuél
1Samuel3:16 iyakiya riyobbii ri Eli
1Samuel3:17 Nakkutana Eli
1Samuel3:18 Nainappa Samuél paissengi manengngi iyaro Eli. Dé' gaga muwi séddi iya narahasiyakangngé. Nainappa makkedani Eli
1Samuel3:19 Tattamba battowani Samuél. Puwangnge sibawangngi sibawa mébbui sininna iya napowadaé Samuél kajajiyang tongeng.
1Samuel3:20 Iyanaro saba'na sininna umma Israélié polé ri sininna wanuwaéro mangakuiwi makkedaé Samuél iyanaritu nabinna Puwangnge. Sises-siseng mabbicara Samuél

1Samuel4:1 Iyaro wettué napangarani tau Filistingngé sininna tentarana untu' gasai Israélié; rimakkuwannanaro majuni tentara Israélié ri ammusurengngé; makkémani mennang ri seddéna Ebén Haézer
1Samuel4:2 Mammulani maggasa tentara Filistingngé
1Samuel4:3 Wettunna lisu sésana tentara iya cauéro ri akkémangngé
1Samuel4:4 Nainappa mennang suroi tauwé lao ri Silo untu' malai Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge iya mancajiyé kadéra arajanna Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé. Iya duwa ana'na Eli
1Samuel4:5 Lettu'nana iyaro Petti Assijancingngé ri akkémangngé
1Samuel4:6 Naéngkalinga towi tau Filistingngé iyaro oni gora-goraé nainappa mennang makkeda
1Samuel4:7 métauni mennang
1Samuel4:8 Cilaka tongenni! Nigana mulléi passalama'ki polé ri déwata-déwata iya mawatangngéro? Dé'ga na déwata-déwataéttoro pura mpunoi tau Maséré'é ri padang kessi'é riyolo?
1Samuel4:9 Pabbaraniwi atimmu
1Samuel4:10 Nainappa mammusuni tau Filistingngé sibawa masero nanacaui tentara Israélié. Larini tau Israélié lao ri kémana tungke'-tungke'. Battowa senna akalannaro: 30.000 prajuri'na Israélié maté.
1Samuel4:11 Petti Assijancinna Allataala nasittaiwi balinna Israélié
1Samuel4:12 Séddi tau polé ri suku Bényamin lari polé ri ammusurengngé lao ri Silo
1Samuel4:13 Eli
1Samuel4:14 Naéngkalingai Eli iyaro mpatingngé
1Samuel4:15 Na iya Eli asérani pulona aruwa taung umuru'na sibawa mawé'ni buta.
1Samuel4:16 Makkedani iyaro tauwé ri Eli
1Samuel4:17 Nappébali iyaro pattiwi karébaé
1Samuel4:18 Wettunna iyaro tauwé paissengiwi passalenna Petti Assijancingngéro
1Samuel4:19 Iyaro wettué
1Samuel4:20 Wettunna maéloni maté
1Samuel4:21 Iyaro ana'é nasenni Ikabod

1Samuel5:1 Nasittainnana tau Filistingngé Petti Assijancinna Allataala
1Samuel5:2 Kuwaniro natiwi iyaro Pettié muttama ri bola déwatana mennang
1Samuel5:3 Wettunna pabbanuwana Asdod pappa bajana éléé lao ri bola déwataéro
1Samuel5:4 Iyakiya pappa bajana éléé
1Samuel5:5 Iyanaro saba'na
1Samuel5:6 Nainappa nahukkung Puwangnge pabbanuwana Asdod nenniya daéra seddéna sibawa boro-boro ri tubunna mennang.
1Samuel5:7 Wettunna mennang naita aga iya mattengngangngé kajajiyang ri mennanro

1Samuel5:10 Nainappa iyaro Petti Assijancingngé ritiwi ri Ekron

1Samuel5:12 Sining tau iya dé'é namaté

1Samuel6:2 naobbini tau Filistingngé sining imangngé sibawa sining passéhéré'é nainappa makkutana
1Samuel6:3 Nappébali mennang
1Samuel6:4 Nakkutana iyaro sining tauwé
1Samuel6:5 Jaji
1Samuel6:6 Aga gunana matedde atiko pada-pada arungngé sibawa tau Maséré'é riyolo? Aja' muwallupai pékkugi Allataala macculé-culéiwi mennang
1Samuel6:7 Rimakkuwannanaro
1Samuel6:8 Nainappa alai Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge
1Samuel6:9 Pénessaiwi lalenna; rékko iyaro Petti Assijancingngé natiwii mattuju ri wanuwanna muto
1Samuel6:10 Turuni iyaro sining tauwé; malani mennang duwakkaju saping iya mappasusué mupa
1Samuel6:11 Nainappa iyaro Petti Assijancingngé napaénré ri padatié
1Samuel6:12 Iyaro sapingngé joppani matteru mattuju ri Bét-Sémes; iyaro olokolo'é mangnguwa'ni najoppato matteru
1Samuel6:13 Iyaro wettué pabbanuwana Bét-Sémes mattengngangngi méngngala gandong ri lompo'é. Wettunna mennang naita iyaro Petti Assijancingngé
1Samuel6:14 Iyaro padatié mappésauwi ri seddéna séddié batu loppo ri daérana Yosua
1Samuel6:15 Nainappa sining tau Léwié panonnoi Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge sibawa petti-petti iya mallise'é barab-barang ulawengngéro
1Samuel6:16 Wettunna iya limaro arung Filistingngé mitai iya manennaro lisuni mennang ri Ekron iyatoro essoé.
1Samuel6:17 Nanallalengiro napura tau Filistingngé kiring lao ri Puwangnge pakkasuwiyang pakkamaja dosa untu' pabbanuwana iya lima kota naparéntaé iya lima arung Filistingngé. Iyaro kota-kotaé iyanaritu: Asdod
1Samuel6:18

1Samuel6:21 Nanakiring mennang suro lao ri Kiryat-Yéarim sibawa paseng makkuwaéwé
1Samuel7:1 Nanalani pabbanuwana Kiryat-Yéarim iyaro Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge nanatiwii ri lalempolana tau iya riyasengngé Abinadab; iyaro bolaé engkai ri tompo'na bulu-bulué. Nainappa mennang nalanti Eléazar ana' Abinadab
1Samuel7:2 Maittato iyaro Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge monro ri Kiryat-Yéarim
1Samuel7:3 Namakkedana Samuél lao ri umma Israélié
1Samuel7:4 Jaji nabbéyanni tau Israélié dato'-dato'na Déwa Baal sibawa dato'-dato'na Déwi Asytorét
1Samuel7:5 Purairo makkedani Samuél
1Samuel7:6 Namaddeppungeng manenna mennang ri Mizpa. Séro'ni mennang uwai nainappa natiri selaku pakkasuwiyang lao ri Puwangnge
1Samuel7:7 Wettunna naéngkalinga tau Filistingngé makkedaé maddeppungenni tau Israélié ri Mizpa
1Samuel7:8 Nakkeda mennang lao ri Samuél
1Samuel7:9 Rimakkuwannanaro géréni Samuél sikaju ana' bimbala lolo
1Samuel7:10 Wettunna Samuél mattengngang makkasuwiyang akkarobangeng ritunuéro
1Samuel7:11 Massuni tentara Israélié polé ri Mizpa nanalellungngi iyaro tau Filistingngé nawéki sibbéla Bét-Kar
1Samuel7:12 Purairo patettonni Samuél séddi batu
1Samuel7:13 Makkuwaniro tau Filistingngé ricau. Dé' naripalalo mennang ri Puwangnge muttamakiwi daérana Israélié paimeng
1Samuel7:14 Sininna kota Israél iya puraé nacau tau Filistingngé
1Samuel7:15 Naparéntani Samuél Israélié gangka maténa.
1Samuel7:16 Tungke' taung joppai mattulili lao ri Bétel
1Samuel7:17 Purairo lisuni ri bolana ri Rama. Kuwaniro mancaji hakinna tau Israélié sibawa patettong towi séddi mézba untu' Puwangnge.

1Samuel8:12 Sibagiyang nakka mancaji parawira sisebbué tau
1Samuel8:13 Ana'-ana'mu iya makkunraié nasuroi matu mébbu minnya wangi untu' aléna sibawa mappallaung selaku pannasunna sibawa pakkébbu rotinna.

1Samuel8:16 Nalai matu atammu
1Samuel8:17 Tawaseppulona polé ri bémbé bimbala makkonrommu nalai matu. Sibawa iko paimeng mancaji matu atanna.

1Samuel13:2 piléni 3.000 tau Israél; polé ri yelle'na 2.000 monro sibawa aléna ri Mikhmas sibawa ri daéra buluna Bétel
1Samuel13:3 Nainappa Yonatan nauno pallima Filistingngé ri Gibéa
1Samuel13:4 Ripaissengi manenni bangsa Israélié makkedaé purani nauno Saul pallima Filistingngéro sibawa nabenci senna'ni tau Filistingngé tau Israélié. Rimakkuwannanaro napatoini ra'ya'é pangobbié untu' masséddi sibawa Saul ri Gilgal.
1Samuel13:5 Na wettuéro maddeppungeng toni tau Filistingngé untu' gasai tau Israélié; mappunnaiwi mennang 30.000 karéta musu
1Samuel13:6 Nainappa mennang maggasa sibawa masero lao ri tau Israélié
1Samuel13:7 engkato iya malléttoiyéngngi Salo Yordan sibawa muttama ri daérana Gad sibawa Giléad. Ri Gilgal mupi Saul
1Samuel13:8 Ritajenni Samuél ri Saul pitungngesso ittana
1Samuel13:9 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani lao ri mennang
1Samuel13:10 Iyakiya silalona pura napogau'
1Samuel13:11 iyakiya makkutanai Samuél
1Samuel13:12 Na pikkiri'ku
1Samuel13:13 Naéngkalinganaro makkedani Samuél lao ri Saul
1Samuel13:14 Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé dé'na matu nattahang apparéntanna Datu. Nasaba dé' Datu naturusiwi paréntana Puwangnge
1Samuel13:15 Nainappa nasalai Samuél Gilgal nanapatterui joppana lao ri Gibéa ri daérana Bényamin. Na Saul naparéssani pasukanna
1Samuel13:16 Makkuwaniro Saul sibawa Yonatan ana' worowanéna
1Samuel13:17 Iyatoro wettué engka tellu rombongang parampo Filistin joppa polé ri akkémang Filistingngé untu' maddampo; rombongang iya séddié laowi mattuju ri Ofra ri daéra Syual
1Samuel13:18 rombongang maduwaé mattujui ri Bét-Horon
1Samuel13:19 Ri sininna Israélié dé' gaga panré bessi
1Samuel13:20 Jaji harusu'i lao tau Israélié ri tau Filistingngé rékko maéloi masai mata rakkalana
1Samuel13:21 sarona iyanaritu séddi dowi baiccu untu' masai wasé sibawa untu' pédécéngiwi pakkakkasa babba sapinna
1Samuel13:22 Iyanaro saba'na
1Samuel13:23 Taroi tau Filistingngé séddi pos jagang untu' mattahangengngi séddi pallawangeng bulu ri Mikhmas.
1Samuel14:1 Riséuwaé wettu makkedai Yonatan lao ri kallolo pattiwi senjatana
1Samuel14:2 Iyaro wettué engkai Saul ri yawana pong dalimaé ri Migron
1Samuel14:3 (Imang iya tiwiéngngi éfod-é iyanaritu Ahiya ana' Ahitub
1Samuel14:4 Untu' rapii iyaro pos Filistingngé
1Samuel14:5 Batu karang iya seddé manorangngé mangoloi ri Mikhmas
1Samuel14:6 Namakkedana Yonatan lao ri kalloloéro
1Samuel14:7 Nappébali iyaro kalloloé
1Samuel14:8 Nakkeda Yonatan
1Samuel14:9 Rékko nasuroki mappésau sibawa tajengngi narapi mennang lao ri idi
1Samuel14:10 Iyakiya rékko nasuroki lao ri mennang
1Samuel14:11 Wettunna mennang nappaitang aléna ri tau Filistingngé ri pos jagangngéro
1Samuel14:12 Nainappa mennang gora lao ri Yonatan sibawa atanna
1Samuel14:13 Namakkalolo'na Yonatan ménré riyaccowéri ri kalloloéro. Wettunna cumpa Yonatan
1Samuel14:14 Ri laleng serangang mammulangngéro
1Samuel14:15 Iyaro kajajiyangngé pawéwangngi tau Filistingngé ri akkémangngé sibawa risining padangngé. Sininna ra'ya' Filistingngé sibawa pos-pos jagangngé enrengngé rombongang-rombongang parampo'é métauni; mala mpéwang tanaé
1Samuel14:16 Na wettuéro tentarana Saul iya manganrowangngé ri Gibéa ri daérana Bényamin
1Samuel14:17 Namakkedana Saul lao ri ana' buwana
1Samuel14:18 Nakkeda Saul lao ri Imang Ahia
1Samuel14:19 Wettunna Saul mabbicara sibawa iyaro imangngé
1Samuel14:20 Nainappa Saul sibawa sining taunna massamang malluru ri onrong ammusurengngé. Naitani mennang kuwaro engka akacaungeng ri yelle'na tau Filistingngé; sigasai mennang sibawa siyuno.
1Samuel14:21 Sining tau Ibrani iya monroé ri daérana tau Filistingngé
1Samuel14:22 Makkuwatoro sining tau Israél iya massubbué ri bulu-buluna Efraim
1Samuel14:23 Mammusui mennang puppu laleng lettu ri Bét-Awen. Puwangnge passalama'i Israélié iyaro essoé.
1Samuel14:24 Iyaro essoé malemmani sining tau Israélié nasaba malupui
1Samuel14:25 Nanalettu manenna mennang riséddié ale sibawa runtu maéga senna cani
1Samuel14:26 iyakiya dé' muwi séddi iya manré séuwa polé ri cani'éro
1Samuel14:27 Iyakiya Yonatan dé' naissengngi makkedaé purai ambo'na mancangngi ra'ya'é sibawa tanroéro; rimakkuwannanaro naloro'ni tekkeng natiwié
1Samuel14:28 Nainappa séddi polé ri prajuri'éro makkeda ri aléna
1Samuel14:29 Nappébali Yonatan
1Samuel14:30 Akkalarapanna ra'ya'é iyaé essoé ripalaloi manré inanré iya puraé narampasa wettunna nacau balié
1Samuel14:31 Iyaro essoé ricaui tau Filistingngé ri tau Israélié puranana mammusu puppu laleng polé ri Mikhmas lettu ri Ayalon. Iyakiya purairo makkuwamani posona mennang
1Samuel14:32 angkanna makkabéttang mennang mala barang rirappa iya nalolongengngé polé ri balié; malani mennang bimbala sibawa saping nanagéréi ri onrongngéttoro
1Samuel14:33 Nainappa ripaiisengi ri Saul makkuwaé
1Samuel14:34 Nainappa adanna paimeng lao risining tau iya tiwiéngngi iyaro birittaé
1Samuel14:35 Napatettonna Saul mézba untu' Puwangnge; iyanaro mézba mammulang iya napatettongngé.
1Samuel14:36 Nainappa makkeda Saul lao ri ana' buwana
1Samuel14:37 Namakkutanana Saul ri Allataala
1Samuel14:38 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani Saul lao risining pamimpinna ra'ya'é
1Samuel14:39 Majjancika nasabbing Puwang iya tuwoé
1Samuel14:40 Namakkedana Saul lao ri sininna ra'ya' Israélié
1Samuel14:41 Nainappa massempajang Saul
1Samuel14:42 Namakkedana Saul

1Samuel14:44 Nakkeda Saul lao ri aléna
1Samuel14:45 Iyakiya makkedai ra'ya'é lao ri Saul

1Samuel14:50 Bainéna riyaseng Ahinoam
1Samuel14:51 Kish ambo'na Saul

1Samuel15:2 Aléna matu hukkungngi tau Amalé'é
1Samuel15:3 Jaji
1Samuel15:4 Nanapassadiyani Saul tentarana sibawa bilangngi ri Telaim; engka 200.000 tau prajuri polé ri Israélié sibawa 10.000 tau polé ri Yéhuda.
1Samuel15:5 Purairo laoni Saul silaong ana' buwana ri kota Amalé'é sibawa madangngi balié ri salo marakkoé.
1Samuel15:6 Kiring towi paseng papparéngngerang lao ri tau Kénié adanna
1Samuel15:7 Purairo mammusuni Saul sibawa tau Amalé'é
1Samuel15:8 Sininna ra'ya'é sibawa tentarana Amalé'é naunoni Saul. Iyakiya Agag arunna tau Amalé'é natikkengngi sibawa rileppessangngi tuwo ri Saul sibawa tentarana

1Samuel16:1 Siyagangngaré wettu rimunrinna makkedani Puwangnge lao ri Samuél
1Samuel16:2 Iyakiya makkutanai Samuél
1Samuel16:3 Nainappa muwobbi Isai lao ri upacara akkarobangengngéro. Upowadappo matu aga harusu mupogau'. Tau iya Ujellokengngékko
1Samuel16:4 Napogau'ni Samuél pada-pada iya napowadaé Puwangnge. Wettunna lettu ri Bétléhém
1Samuel16:5 Nappébali Samuél
1Samuel16:6 Wettunna maddeppungenni sibawa naitani Samuél Eliab ana'na Isai
1Samuel16:7 Iyakiya makkedai Puwangnge lao ri Samuél
1Samuel16:8 Nainappa Isai mobbii Abinadab
1Samuel16:9 Nainappa Syama risuro malluru ri Isai
1Samuel16:10 Makkuwaniro Isai suroi iya pitu ana'na matturu-turuseng mangolo ri Samuél
1Samuel16:11 Namakkutanana Samuél ri aléna
1Samuel16:12 Nanassuro mobbini Isai iyaro ana'é. Annessana séddiwi kallolo iya magelloé sibawa madising
1Samuel16:13 Masitta'ni Samuél malai minnya zaitungngéro nanalanti'i Daud sibawa upacara amminnyakeng ri yolona kaka-kakana. Iyatoro wettué narikuwasai Daud ri Rohna Puwangnge. Mappammulai essoéro sibawa matteru risibawanni ri Rohna Puwangnge. Nainappa lisuni Samuél ri Rama.

1Samuel16:23 Mappammulairo
1Samuel17:1 Riséuwaé wettu napangarai tau Filistingngé tentarana untu' maju mammusu. Naatoro'i mennang barisi'na ri kota Sokho
1Samuel17:2 Saul sibawa sining tau Israélié maddeppungeng toni sibawa makkéma ri Lompo Ela; sadiya-sadiyani mennang mangoloiwi paggasana tau Filistingngé.
1Samuel17:3 Makkuwaniro barisi'na tau Filistingngé tettong ri seddéna bulu-bulué na barisi'na tau Israélié ri bulu-bulu laingngé
1Samuel17:4 Na séddi tau jago mallaga iya riyasengngé Goliat
1Samuel17:5 sibawa pakéi palo-palo tembaga sibawa waju musu tembaga iya tane'naé kira-kira limappulo pitu kilo.
1Samuel17:6 Ajéna nalinrungiwi sibawa pallinrung ajé polé ri tembagaé
1Samuel17:7 Torongempessinna silloppo aju paréwa tennungngé
1Samuel17:8 Mappésauni Goliat nainappa mangobbi lao ri tentara Israélié
1Samuel17:9 Rékko ri laleng musu attandingengngéro
1Samuel17:10 Makkekkuwangngénna
1Samuel17:11 Wettunna naéngkalinga Saul sibawa sining taunna angéwangengngéro
1Samuel17:12 Daud iyanaritu ana'na Isai tau Efrataé
1Samuel17:13 Iya tellu ana'na Isai iya pommacowaé laoni mammusu maccowériwi Saul. Iya macowaé riyasengngi Eliab
1Samuel17:14 Daud ana' malolo. Wettunna iya tellu kakana iya macowaéro mammusu maccowériwi Saul
1Samuel17:15 biyasai Daud salaiwi Saul nalisu ri Bétléhém untu' mampii bimbala'na ambo'na.
1Samuel17:16 Ri lalenna patappuloé essona
1Samuel17:17 Riséwaé esso makkedai Isai lao ri Daud
1Samuel17:18 Tiwi towi seppulo batunna kéjuéwé untu' komandang pasukangngé. Akkutangngi pékkugi keadaanna kaka-kakamu
1Samuel17:19 Engkai mennang ri Lompo Ela silaong Arung Saul
1Samuel17:20 Pappa bajanana
1Samuel17:21 Siyolo-olonni tentara Filistingngé sibawa tentara Israélié sibawa sadiya-sadiya untu' mammusu.
1Samuel17:22 Nainappa nappaddettangeng Daud tiwinaro ri panganrowang perlengkapang tentaraé
1Samuel17:23 Iyakiya wettunna mabbicara sibawa mennang
1Samuel17:24 Naitana muwa tau Israélié Goliat
1Samuel17:25 Makkedai mennang ri padanna
1Samuel17:26 Namakkeda Daud
1Samuel17:27 Ripaissengini ri ra'ya'é aga iya puraé najjanciyang arungngé.
1Samuel17:28 Eliab kakana Daud iya macowaé naéngkalingani Daud mabbicara sibawa prajuriprajuri'é. Macaini lao ri Daud sibawa makkeda
1Samuel17:29 Nappébali Daud
1Samuel17:30 Nainappa lao sibawa makkutanangngi gau' padaé ri prajuri-prajuri laingngé; nanalolongenna pappébali makkuwaéttoro.
1Samuel17:31 Iyakiya siyagangngaré tau iya méngkalingaéngngi ada-adanna Daud
1Samuel17:32 Nakkeda Daud lao ri Saul
1Samuel17:33 Nappébali Saul
1Samuel17:34 Iyakiya makkedai Daud
1Samuel17:35 iyaro olokolo masekkangngé nalellungngi atatta sibawa nahantangngi
1Samuel17:36 Purani atatta mpuno singa sibawa beruang
1Samuel17:37 Puwangnge pura passalama'i atatta polé ri singaé sibawa beruangngé
1Samuel17:38 Nabbéréyanni Saul pakéyang musuna
1Samuel17:39 Paccappurenna natappini Daud peddanna Saul ri waju bessiéro nainappa nacoba joppa
1Samuel17:40 Nainappa nala tekkeng pakkampina
1Samuel17:41 Siyagangngaré wettu rimunrinna Goliat iya ripoddiyoloiyé ri pattiwi kaliyawona
1Samuel17:42 Iyakiya wettunna naita Daud sibawa pénessaiwi
1Samuel17:43 Makkedai Goliat lao ri Daud
1Samuel17:44 Nainappani naéwai Daud
1Samuel17:45 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Daud
1Samuel17:46 Iyato essoéwé nabbéréyakko matu Puwangnge lao ri iyya; ucauko matu sibawa urette'i matu ulummu. Tubummu sibawa tubunna prajuri-prajuri Filistingngé uwéréngngi matu manu'-manu'é sibawa olokolo'é kuwammengngi naanréi. Nanaissengngi matu sininna linoé makkedaé idi bangsa Israélié mappunnaiwi Allataala iya risompaé
1Samuel17:47 na sininna tauwé kuwaé naitai matu makkedaé Puwangnge dé' napparelluwang peddang iyaré'ga bessi untu' passalama'i umma'-Na. Aléna ritu pattentui joppana ammusurengngéwé sibawa Aléna mabbéréyakko matu ri laleng limatta.”

1Samuel17:49 Nakoti'ni Daud kantonna
1Samuel17:50 Larini Daud lao ri Goliat

1Samuel18:2

1Samuel18:5 Napogau'ni Daud sininna tugasna sibawa makessing iya riwéréngngéngngi ri Saul. Rimakkuwannanaro riyakkani ri Saul mancaji parawira ri laleng tentarana

1Samuel18:14 Naulléi pogau'i sininna tugasna
1Samuel18:15 Wettunna naita Saul makkedaé tuli mallolongengngi Daud

1Samuel18:21 Pikkiranna
1Samuel18:22 Nainappa nasuro sininna pegawénna kuwammengngi napowadangngi Daud sibawa mammekko-mekko

1Samuel18:25 nanasuroni Saul mennang powadangngi Daud
1Samuel18:26 Iyaro sining pegawénna Saul napalettu'ni iyaro pasengngé lao ri Daud

1Samuel18:30 Sises-siseng rékko poléi tentara Filistingngé maggasa
1Samuel19:1 Makkedani Saul lao ri Yonatan ana' worowanéna
1Samuel19:2 rimakkuwannanaro makkedani lao ri Daud
1Samuel19:3 Maéloka lao ri padangngé silaong ambo'ku sibawa tettong ri seddéna onrong muwassubbuiyéro. Nainappaka mabbicara matu sibawa ambo'ku passalenna akkattana lao ri iko
1Samuel19:4 Nainappa napau madécénni Yonatan passalenna Daud lao ri Saul
1Samuel19:5 Purani nappésonang nyawana wettunna nauno Goliat
1Samuel19:6 Mainge'ni Saul polé ri ada-adanna Yonatan
1Samuel19:7 Purairo riyobbini Daud ri Yonatan
1Samuel19:8 Nainappa kajajiyassi musué sibawa tau Filistingngé. Nagasani Daud sibawa nacau sisengngi mennang
1Samuel19:9 Riséuwaé esso tudat-tudangngi Saul ri bolana sibawa bessi ri limanna natappa napoléisi Saul roh maja iya nasuroé Puwangnge. Iyaro wettué mattengngangngi Daud macculéyangngi kacapinna.
1Samuel19:10 Namakkuragana Saul paddince'i bessinna ri Daud iya engkaé ri seddéna renringngé. Iyakiya lésséi Daud
1Samuel19:11 Iyatoro wennié nakiring Saul siyagangngaré taunna lao ri bolana Daud untu' mata-mataiwi Daud sibawa mpunoi ri éléna. Iyakiya Mikhal bainéna makkedai lao ri Daud
1Samuel19:12 Nainappa Mikhal panonnoi Daud polé ri tellongengngé
1Samuel19:13 Purairo nalani Mikhal dato'-dato' ruma tanggana nanapalénne'i ri onrong atinronna Daud. Nainappa ri bagiyang ulunna nataroi angkalungung polé ri bulu bémbé'é
1Samuel19:14 Wettunna polé sining surona Saul untu' tikkengngi Daud
1Samuel19:15 Iyakiya risuroi paimeng ri Saul lao kuwaro untu' mitai Daud sibawa mata ri aléna mennang. Paréntana
1Samuel19:16 Nauttama'na iyaro suroé ri laleng bili'é na annessana dato'-dato' ritu lénne ri onrong atinrongngé sibawa angkalungung bulu bémbé ri bagiyang ulunna.
1Samuel19:17 Makkedani Saul lao ri Mikhal
1Samuel19:18 Leppe'nana Daud
1Samuel19:19 Iyakiya ripaissengiwi Saul makkedaé engkai Daud ri Nayot seddéna Rama.
1Samuel19:20 Rimakkuwannanaro kirinni Saul siyagangngaré suro untu' tikkengngi Daud. Iyakiya napoléiwi mennang sikonrong nabi iya mattengngangngé séré-séré sibawa gora-gora massama-samang
1Samuel19:21 Wettunna lettu iyaro karébaé ri Saul
1Samuel19:22 Rimakkuwannanaro joppani Saul lao ri Rama. Lettu'nana ri bujung lompoé ri Sékhu
1Samuel19:23 Jaji matteruni lao kuwaro
1Samuel19:24 Lettu'nana kuwaro
1Samuel20:1 Nalarina Daud polé ri Nayot seddéna Rama nalao méwai sita Yonatan
1Samuel20:2 Nappébali Yonatan
1Samuel20:3 Nappébali Daud
1Samuel20:4 Namakkedana Yonatan
1Samuel20:5 Nappébali Daud
1Samuel20:6 Rékko nakkutangngi ambo'mu magi udé'
1Samuel20:7 Rékko makkedai arungngé
1Samuel20:8 Uwéllauwi pattulummu
1Samuel20:9 Nappébali Yonatan
1Samuel20:10 Nainappa makkutana Daud
1Samuel20:11 Nakkeda Yonatan
1Samuel20:12 Nanakkeda Yonatan lao ri Daud
1Samuel20:13 Rékko manniya'i cilakaiko
1Samuel20:14 Narékko tuwo mupa
1Samuel20:15 appaitanni atinuluremmu lao ri wija-wijakku untu' mannennungeng. Sibawa rékko napaccappui Puwangnge sininna balikku
1Samuel20:16 aja' napettu assijancitta sipadduwa. Rékko pettui
1Samuel20:17 Jaji untu' mabbékkaduwanna Yonatan suroi Daud majjanci maélo mamaséiwi
1Samuel20:18 Nainappa makkeda Yonatan lao ri aléna
1Samuel20:19 apalagi sangadi! Rimakkuwannanaro
1Samuel20:20 Maéloka leppessang tellu ana' pana sangadi mattuju ri batuéro
1Samuel20:21 Nausuroi matu atakku mittéi iyaro pana-panaé
1Samuel20:22 Iyakiya rékko makkedaka lao ri atakku
1Samuel20:23 Tennapodo Puwangnge jagaiki kuwammengngi natuli takkatenningngi assijancitta sipadduwa.”
1Samuel20:24 Namallekke'na Daud ri padangngé. Ri Pésta Uleng Baru
1Samuel20:25 Pada-pada biyasanna tudangngi ri seddéna renringngé; Yonatan mala onrong ri yolona
1Samuel20:26 Iyakiya dé' nasinggungngi Saul iyaro keadaangngé ri essoéro
1Samuel20:27 Ri esso rappina
1Samuel20:28 Nappébali Yonatan
1Samuel20:29 Adanna
1Samuel20:30 Naéngkalinganaro macai senna'ni Saul lao ri Yonatan sibawa makkeda ri aléna
1Samuel20:31 Dé'ga mumainge makkedaé sipongenna tuwo mupi Daud dé' namakkulléko matu mancaji arung ri wanuwaéwé? Suroni makkekkuwangngé tauwé sappai sibawa tiwii lao mai
1Samuel20:32 Namappébali Yonatan
1Samuel20:33 Naéngkalinganaro naddawukenni bessinna Saul lao ri Yonatan maélo mpunoi. Nanaissenni Yonatan makkedaé mémeng ambo'na tonget-tongengngi manniya maélo mpunoi Daud.
1Samuel20:34 Namacai senna'na Yonatan salaiwi méjang anréngngé sibawa dé' aga-aga nanré ri esso maduwanna Pésta Uleng Baruéro. Messé senna'ni pikkiri'i Daud iya puraé ripakatuna ri Saul ambo'na.
1Samuel20:35 Pappa bajanana laoni Yonatan ri padangngé untu' siruntu Daud pada-pada iya puraé mennang narancana massibawa. Tiwii séddi ana' worowané
1Samuel20:36 namakkeda ri aléna
1Samuel20:37 Wettunna iyaro ana'é lettu ri onrong nateppaiyé iyaro panaé
1Samuel20:38 Agattiko céddé
1Samuel20:39 Dé' sises-siseng napahangngi akkattana ada-adanna Yonatanro
1Samuel20:40 Nainappa nabbéréyang Yonatan pakkakkasa appananna lao ri ana'éro nanasuroi lisu ri kotaé.
1Samuel20:41 Laonana iyaro ana'é
1Samuel20:42 Nainappa makkeda Yonatan lao ri Daud
1Samuel21:1 Nalaona Daud ri Imang Ahimélékh ri Nob. Namasélenna Ahimélékh massu méwai sita Daud sibawa makkutana ri aléna

1Samuel22:1 Nanasalaini Daud kota Gat namassubbu ri gowa seddéna kota Adulam. Wettunna kaka-kakana sibawa sininna kaluwargana naéngkalinga makkedaé engkai kuwaro
1Samuel22:2 Makkuwatoro sining tau ritenre'é
1Samuel22:3 Polé ri gowaéro laoni Daud ri Mizpa ri Moab sibawa makkeda lao ri arunna wanuwa Moab
1Samuel22:4 Nanatiwini iyaro tomatowanna ri arunna wanuwa Moab
1Samuel22:5 Riséuwaé esso engka séddi nabi riyaseng Gad lao ri Daud sibawa makkeda
1Samuel22:6 Riséuwaé esso tudangngi Saul ri yawana aju tamariskaé ri tompo'na bulu-bulué ri Gibéa; nakkatenningngi bessinna nasininna parawirana tettongngi mattulilingiwi. Wettunna naéngkalinga makkedaé onronna Daud sibawa ana' buwana naissenni
1Samuel22:7 makkedani lao ri sininna parawiranaro
1Samuel22:8 Iyanaro saba'na namasséddi méwaka nadé' muwi séddi tau paissengika makkedaé ana'ku paimeng maccowé toni ri Daud? Dé' muwi séddi tau polé ri iko pikkiri'i aléna iyaré'ga paissengika makkedaé Daud
1Samuel22:9 Doég kapala pakkampi olokolo'na Saul
1Samuel22:10 Méllauni Ahimélékh panunju ri Puwangnge passalenna aga iya harusu'é napogau' Daud. Rilainnaéro ripabokongi towi Daud inanré enrengngé peddanna Goliat
1Samuel22:11 Nanassurowanni arungngé mobbii Imang Ahimélékh sibawa sininna sumpulolona iya mancaji imangngé ri Nob; namangolona mennang ri aléna.

1Samuel22:13 Nakkutana Saul ri aléna
1Samuel22:14 Nanappébali Ahimélékh
1Samuel22:15 Mémeng

1Samuel22:18 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani Saul lao ri Doég
1Samuel22:19 Napparéntang towi Saul mpunoi sininna pabbanuwana Nob
1Samuel22:20 Banna Abyatar
1Samuel22:21 nainappa napowadang makkedaé purani nauno Saul sining imanna Puwangnge.

1Samuel22:23 Onrono silaongekka sibawa aja' mumétau. Macinnai Saul mpunoko
1Samuel23:1 Riséuwaé esso ripaissengini Daud makkedaé nagasai tau Filistingngé kota Kéhila sibawa narampasa'i gandong iya nappaé naéngngala.
1Samuel23:2 Namakkutanana ri Puwangnge
1Samuel23:3 Iyakiya makkedai ana' buwana Daud lao ri aléna
1Samuel23:4 Rimakkuwannanaro siseppi Daud méllau panunju polé ri Puwangnge
1Samuel23:5 Nanalaona Daud sibawa ana' buwana ri Kéhila nanagasai enrengngé naunoi maéga tau Filistin
1Samuel23:6 Wettunna Abyatar ana' Ahimélékh lari lao ri Daud
1Samuel23:7 Wettunna ripaissengiwi Saul makkedaé engkai Daud ri Kéhila
1Samuel23:8 Nanapangarani Saul tentarana sibawa joppa lao ri Kéhila untu' keppungngi Daud silaong sininna ana' buwana.
1Samuel23:9 Iyakiya naissengngi Daud makkedaé manniya' majai Saul lao ri aléna. Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani lao ri Imang Abyatar
1Samuel23:10 Namassempajanna Daud
1Samuel23:11 Tongegga iyaro karéba uwéngkalingaé? Puwang
1Samuel23:12 
1Samuel23:13 Namasitta'na Daud silaong ana' buwana kira-kira 600 tau
1Samuel23:14 Purairo monroni Daud ri gowa-gowaé ri bulué ri padang kessi Zif. Tuli rilellungngi ri Saul
1Samuel23:15 Namuni makkuwaro métau mutowi Daud
1Samuel23:16 Laoni Yonatan méwai sita kuwaro untu' pakkasse'i atepperenna makkedaé rilinrungiwi matu ri Allataala.
1Samuel23:17 Adanna Yonatan lao ri Daud
1Samuel23:18 Nainappa Daud sibawa Yonatan siyo assijancing assisellaongeng ri yolona Puwangnge. Purairo lisuni Yonatan ri bolana
1Samuel23:19 Nasiyagangngaré tau polé ri Zif mangolo ri Saul ri Gibéa sibawa makkeda
1Samuel23:20 Taisseng makkedaé macinna senna'i Datu tikkengngi; rimakkuwannanaro
1Samuel23:21 Nappébali Saul
1Samuel23:22 Laono sibawa pénessaiwi paimeng; paréssai tonget-tongeng kégi Daud monro sibawa niga pura mitai kuwaro. Uwéngkalingai makkedaé macca senna'i.
1Samuel23:23 Jaji paréssai madécét-décéng gowa-gowa iya puraé mancaji onrong assubbuwanna
1Samuel23:24 Najoppana lisu iyaro sining tauwé ri Zif poddiyoloiwi Saul. Iyaro wettué Daud sibawa ana' buwana engkai ri padang kessi Maon
1Samuel23:25 Poléni Saul sibawa tentarana maélo sappai Daud
1Samuel23:26 Joppani Saul sibawa tentarana ri wiring bulué tibang kumaiyé na Daud sibawa ana' buwana ri wiring tibang kuwaro. Mappéri-perini Daud paleppe'i aléna polé ri Saul iya mammulaénna makkeppung maélo tikkengngi mennang.
1Samuel23:27 Iyakiya tappa polé muni séddi suro mangolo ri Saul sibawa makkeda
1Samuel23:28 Napappésauni Saul lellungngi Daud
1Samuel24:1 Polé kuwaro laoni Daud ri daéra En-Gedi
1Samuel24:2 Wettunna Saul silalona lisu polé ri ammusurengngé méwai tau Filsitingngé
1Samuel24:3 Masitta'ni Saul pilé tellussebbu prajuri makessingngé polé risininna Israélié
1Samuel24:4 Nalettu'na daud ri seddéna siyagangngaré wakké bimbala ri wiring lalengngé. Kuwaro engkato séddi gowa
1Samuel24:5 Namakkedana ana' buwana Daud lao ri aléna
1Samuel24:6 Iyakiya purairo
1Samuel24:7 Makkedani lao ri ana' buwana
1Samuel24:8 Makkuwaniro Daud pattennangngi ana' buwana

1Samuel24:11 Makkekkuwangngé aléna Datu mitai makkedaé ri laleng gowaé onna
1Samuel24:12 Itani
1Samuel24:13 Tennapodo Puwangnge ritu pettuiwi niga ri yelle'ta iya pasalaé! Tennapodo Puwangnge ritu mpale'i pangkaukenna Datu lao ri atatta
1Samuel24:14 Naisseng Datu iyaé warékkada riyoloé
1Samuel24:15 Pénessaini atattaé iya maéloé riyuno ri arunna Israélié! Itani atattaé iya tuli rilellungngé! Atatta banna sikaju asu maté
1Samuel24:16 Puwangnge matu mancaji haking ri yelle'na Datu sibawa atatta. Tennapodo naparéssai iyaé parakaraé
1Samuel24:17 Puranana napowada Daud iyaro ada-adaé
1Samuel24:18 Nakkeda lao ri Daud
1Samuel24:19 Jaku lao ri iko muwale'ni sibawa akessingeng. Ri essoéwé purani muwappaitang makkedaé makkatta makessikko lao ri iyya
1Samuel24:20 Majarang senna tau siruntu balinna iyakiya naleppessangngi iyaro balinna tuwo! Jaji
1Samuel24:21 Mateppe'na makkekkuwangngé makkedaé mancaji arukko matu ri Israél sibawa tette'i matu akkarungenna Israélié masse ri yawa apparéntammu.
1Samuel24:22 Makkekkuwangngé ajjancino ri iyya nasabbing Puwangnge
1Samuel24:23 Namattanrona Daud maélo pogau'i iyaro gau'é. Nainappa lisuni Saul ri bolana
1Samuel25:1 Dé' namaitta rimunrinna maténi Samuél. Maddeppungeng manenni Israélié untu' maccowériwi upacara abbaratangngé. Nainappa rikuburu ri bolana ri Rama. Purairo laoni Daud ri padang kessi Paran.
1Samuel25:2 Ri kota Maon engka séddi tau worowané polé ri appanna Kaléb
1Samuel25:3 
1Samuel25:4 Wettunna Daud iya engkaé ri padang kessi'é
1Samuel25:5 suroni seppulo kallolo lao ri Karmél
1Samuel25:6 méwai sita Nabal untu' palettu'i sellenna Daud ri aléna. Nasuroi mennang makkeda makkuwaé lao ri Nabal
1Samuel25:7 Uwéngkalingai makkedaé mattengngakko goncingngi bulu bimbala'mu. Issengngi makkedaé pakkampi-pakkampimu iya engkaé ri daérata
1Samuel25:8 Coba tanai bawanni mennang
1Samuel25:9 Lettu'na ri Karmél
1Samuel25:10 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Nabal
1Samuel25:11 Masa' wedding uwala roti sibawa uwai rinukku
1Samuel25:12 Nalisuna ana' buwana Daud lao ri Daud sibawa paissengiwi iyaro ada-adanna Nabal.
1Samuel25:13 Napparéntana Daud
1Samuel25:14 Na iyaro wettué Abigail bainéna Nabal
1Samuel25:15 Padahal makessing senna'i mennang lao ri idi. Dé' naengka nagangguki
1Samuel25:16 Esso wenni mennang linrungiki ri wettutta makkampi bémbé bimbala ri seddéna.
1Samuel25:17 Rimakkuwannanaro
1Samuel25:18 Masitta'ni Abigail mala duwa ratu roti
1Samuel25:19 Namakkedana lao ri pattumani-pattumaninna
1Samuel25:20 Natonangini Abigail kaleddé'na
1Samuel25:21 Iyaro wettué mappikkiri'ni Daud
1Samuel25:22 Tennapodo Allataala mpunoka rékko dé' uwunoi sininna tau worowané iya engkaé kuwaro ri wettu dé'napa naompo essoé!”
1Samuel25:23 Wettunna Abigail naita Daud
1Samuel25:24 sibawa makkeda lao ri aléna
1Samuel25:25 Aja' Puwakku napikkiri'i Nabal
1Samuel25:26 Allataala pura pésangkaiwi Puwakku makkabale sibawa mpunoi sining balinna Puwang. Na makkekkuwangngé Puwakku
1Samuel25:27 Tatarimani pabbéré iya natiwié atatta untu' Puwakku
1Samuel25:28 Taddampengengngi atakkalupanna atatta. Pasti Puwangnge pancajiwi matu Puwakku enrengngé wija-wijanna Puwakku arung ri Israélié
1Samuel25:29 Ebara'na séddié tau luruiwi Puwakku sibawa cobai mpunoi Puwakku
1Samuel25:30 Napogau'i matu Puwangnge sininna makessingngé iya najjanciyangngé lao ri Puwakku
1Samuel25:31 Iyaro wettué naéngngerangngi matu Puwakku makkedaé dé' nabbuno Puwakku temmakkéalasang iyaré'ga mancaji haking ri alé angkanna dé'na naparellu Puwakku messé iyaré'ga massesse kalé. Narékko Puwangnge pura barakkakiwi Puwakku
1Samuel25:32 Nanakkedana Daud lao ri aléna
1Samuel25:33 Ripojiwi apanrémmu sibawa ripoji tokko nasaba puraka mutahang pogau'i abbunowangngé nenniya mancaji haking.
1Samuel25:34 Puwangnge pura tahakka kédo maja lao ri iko. Nasabbing Puwangnge
1Samuel25:35 Purairo natarimani Daud aga iya natiwié Abigail untu' aléna
1Samuel25:36 Wettunna Abigail lisu ri Nabal
1Samuel25:37 Elénana
1Samuel25:38 Kira-kira seppulo esso rimunrinna lolongessi Nabal serangang jantung polé ri Puwangnge angkanna maté.
1Samuel25:39 Wettunna naéngkalinga Daud makkedaé maténi Nabal
1Samuel25:40 Nalettu'na surona Daud lao ri makkunraiéro ri Karmél sibawa makkeda ri aléna
1Samuel25:41 Natokkonna Abigail sibawa suju' enrengngé makkeda
1Samuel25:42 Namangujuna masitta. Natonangini kaleddé'na sibawa ritinrosi ri lima pattumani makkunrainna
1Samuel25:43 Ri yolonaro purani Daud kawing sibawa Ahinoam polé ri Yizreel
1Samuel25:44 Na iyaro wettué purani Saul napasiyala Mikhal ana'na
1Samuel26:1 Riséuwaé esso sining tau polé ri Zif laoni ri Saul ri Gibéa sibawa paissengiwi makkedaé Daud mattengngang massubbu ri Bulu Hakhila ri wiring padang kessi Yéhuda.
1Samuel26:2 Namapperi-perina Saul joppa ritinrosi ri tellussebbu prajuri iya pommakessingngé ri Israélié
1Samuel26:3 Makkémai Saul ri wiring lalengngé seddéna Bulu Hakhilaro. Daud iya engkaé ri padang kessi'é
1Samuel26:4 Nanakirinna mata-mata
1Samuel26:5 Masitta'ni Daud lao ri akkémanna Saul nanaruntu'ni kéma naonroiyé Saul matinro ri seddéna Abnér ana' Nér. Iyaro kémana Saul engkai ri tengnga-tengnga
1Samuel26:6 Namakkutana Daud ri Ahimélékh tau Hét-éro
1Samuel26:7 Na iyaro wennié coco'ni Daud sibawa Abisai muttama ri akkémangngéro nanaitai Saul matinro ri tengnga-tengngana akkémangngé

1Samuel26:9 Iyakiya makkedai Daud
1Samuel26:10 Nasabbing Puwang iya tuwoé
1Samuel26:11 Tennapodo Puwangnge pésangkaika mpunoi arung iya Napilé! Alani bawang bessinna sibawa kendinna

1Samuel26:13 Nainappa mallétto Daud ri wiring lompo iya laingngé lettu ri tompo bulué

1Samuel27:2 Namasitta'na Daud silaong iya enneng ratuna ana' buwana lao ri Akhis ana' Moah
1Samuel27:3 Namattette'na kuwaro silaong ana' buwana ri Gat
1Samuel27:4 Wettunna naéngkalinga Saul makkedaé larini Daud lao ri Gat

1Samuel27:6 Nariwérénna ri Akhis kota Ziklag lao ri Daud
1Samuel27:7 Monroni Daud ri wanuwanna Filistingngé sitaung patampuleng ittana.
1Samuel27:8 Mappammulai wettuéro Daud sibawa ana' buwana biyasai gasai tau Gésur-é
1Samuel27:9 Naunoi sining tau worowané sibawa makkunraié enrengngé narampasa'i bimbala'é
1Samuel27:10 Rékko makkutanai Akhis ri aléna
1Samuel27:11 Dé' muwi séddi tau ri daéra-daéra iya nagasaéro naleppessang tuwo
1Samuel27:12 Iyakiya Akhis natepperiwi Daud sibawa mappikkiri'i ri laleng atinna
1Samuel28:1 Siyagangngaré wettu rimunrinna napangarani tau Filistingngé tentarana untu' gasai Israélié
1Samuel28:2 Nappébali Daud
1Samuel28:3 Maténi Samuél sibawa riwatingi ri sininna Israélié enrengngé ritampung ri Rama
1Samuel28:4 Na wettunna maddeppungeng tentara Filistingngé sibawa makkéma ri seddéna kota Sunem
1Samuel28:5 Wettunna naita Saul tentara Filistingngéro
1Samuel28:6 Nainappa méllau panunju ri Puwangnge
1Samuel28:7 Rimakkuwannanaro makkedani Saul lao ri sining pegawénna
1Samuel28:8 Nanallarikkodona Saul kuwammengngi dé' nariisseng ri tauwé. Ritinrosi duwa tau worowané
1Samuel28:9 Nappébali iyaro makkunraié
1Samuel28:10 Namattanro Saul
1Samuel28:11 Nakkutana iyaro makkunraié
1Samuel28:12 Wettunna iyaro makkunraié naita Samuél
1Samuel28:13 Nappébali arungngé
1Samuel28:14 Nakkutana Saul
1Samuel28:15 Purairo makkedani Samuél lao ri Saul
1Samuel28:16 Nanakkeda Samuél
1Samuel28:17 Napogau'ni Puwangnge lao ri iko pada-pada iya puraé Napowada naolai iyya. Nalani Puwangnge akkarungeng Israélié polé ri iko nanawéréngngi Daud.
1Samuel28:18 Purai muéwa paréntana Puwangnge sibawa dé' mumaélo paccappui tau Amalé'é enrengngé sininna appunnangenna mennang. Iyanaro saba'na makkekkuwangngé narigaukeng makkuwaéko ri Puwangnge.
1Samuel28:19 Iko sibawa sining tau Israélié riyabbéréyakko matu ri tau Filistingngé. Baja iko sibawa ana'-ana' worowanému maddeddungenno sibawa iyya; mala sininna tentara Israélié nabbéréyang towi matu Puwangnge lao ri tau Filistingngé.”
1Samuel28:20 Iyatoro wettué
1Samuel28:21 Naddeppérini Saul iyaro sanroé sibawa naitani makkumani tauna; rimakkuwannanaro makkedani iyaro makkunraié lao ri aléna
1Samuel28:22 Jaji
1Samuel28:23 Massampéyangngi Saul sibawa makkeda makkedaé dé' namaélo manré. Iyakiya wettunna pegawé-pegawénnato dessa'i
1Samuel28:24 Masitta'ni iyaro makkunraié géréi ana' sapinna iya macommo'é nanala labbu nanalamai
1Samuel28:25 Purairo napatalani iyaro inanré lao ri Saul sibawa pegawé-pegawénna
1Samuel29:1 Napaddeppungenni tau Filistingngé sininna tentarana ri Afék
1Samuel29:2 Iya lima arung Filistingngé majuni mabbarisi sibawa passéddiyang-passéddiyang iya tungke'-tungke'é polé risératu sibawa sisebbu tau; Daud sibawa ana' buwana mabbarisi ri monri silaong arung Akhis.
1Samuel29:3 Sining pallimana tau Filistingngé mitai mennang nainappa makkutana
1Samuel29:4 Iyakiya iyaro sining pallima Filistingngé macayii lao ri Akhis sibawa makkéda ri aléna
1Samuel29:5 Uwaseng aléna Daud? Untu' aléna ritu naséré-séré riyolo sining makkunraié namakkélotto makkuwaé
1Samuel29:6 Nariyobbina Daud ri Akhis sibawa makkeda
1Samuel29:7 Rimakkuwannanaro lisuno sibawa salama
1Samuel29:8 Nappébali Daud
1Samuel29:9 Nappébali Akhis
1Samuel29:10 Rimakkuwannanaro Daud

1Samuel30:6 Masussa senna'ni ana' buwana Daud nasaba ateddéngenni ana'-ana'na sibawa bainéna mennang. Rimakkuwannanaro maéloni mennang genrungngi Daud sibawa batu. Jaji engkani Daud ri laleng asukkarakeng battowaé
1Samuel30:7 Nakkeda Daud lao ri Imang Abyatar ana'na Ahimélékh
1Samuel30:8 Nainappa makkutanani Daud ri Puwangnge
1Samuel30:9 Nanajoppana Daud silaong iya enneng ratuna ana' buwana. Wettunna mennang lettu ri Salo Bésor
1Samuel30:10 
1Samuel30:11 Ri laleng allalengengngéro siruntu'i ana' buwana Daud sibawa séddi tau ana' worowané Maséré ri padangngé
1Samuel30:12 makkuwatoro béppa buwa ara
1Samuel30:13 Nainappa makkutana Daud lao ri aléna
1Samuel30:14 Puraki gasai daérana tau Krétié ri bagiyang yattanna Yéhuda sibawa daérana appanna Kaléb
1Samuel30:15 Nanakkutana Daud
1Samuel30:16 Nariyantara'na mennang lao ri onronna garembolangngéro. Iyaro wettué
1Samuel30:17 Wettunna mompo essoé pappa bajana
1Samuel30:18 Naulléni Daud paleppe'i sininna iya puraé narampasa tau Amalé'é
1Samuel30:19 dé' muwi séuwa iya teddéngngé. Sininna ana' worowané sibawa makkunraié enrengngé sininna barang iya narampasa'é tau Amalé'é
1Samuel30:20 Ri lainnaéro narampasa towi Daud sininna bimbala'é sibawa olokolo'é. Iyaro sining olokolo'é narimpani ana' buwana Daud riyolo
1Samuel30:21 Purairo lisuni Daud ri iya duwa ratu tau iya poso senna'é untu' maccowériwi
1Samuel30:22 Iyakiya ri yelle'na ana' buwana Daud iya silaongngé maccowériwi
1Samuel30:23 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Daud
1Samuel30:24 Jaji dé' muwi séddi tau wedding situjuiwi iyaro tangngaé! Harusu manengngi lolongeng bagiyang iya pada-padaé égana: tau iya monroé untu' jagaiwi barab-barangngé harusu'i lolongeng bagiyang iya padaé pada-pada tau iya majué mammusu.”
1Samuel30:25 Nainappa iyaro gau'é naébbuni Daud mancaji séddi peraturang
1Samuel30:26 Wettunna Daud lisu ri Ziklag
1Samuel30:27 Iyaro kota-kotaé iyanaritu: Bétel sibawa Rama ri bagiyang yattanna Yéhuda
1Samuel30:28

1Samuel30:30 
1Samuel30:31 
1Samuel31:1 Na wettuéro mammusuni tau Filistingngé méwai tau Israélié ri Bulu Gilboa. Maéga tau Israél maté kuwaro
1Samuel31:2 Iyakiya riyolaiwi ri tau Filistingngé na tellu tau polé ri ana'-ana' worowanéna Saulro maténi riyuno; iyanaritu Yonatan
1Samuel31:3 Masero senna'ni ammusurengngé ri seddéna Saul
1Samuel31:4 Namakkeda Saul lao ri kallolo iya tiwiéngngi senjatana
1Samuel31:5 Wettunna naita iyaro kalloloé makkedaé maténi Saul
1Samuel31:6 Makkuwaniro Saul silaong iya tellu ana' worowanéna
1Samuel31:7 Wettunna sining tau Israél iya monroé ri liwenna Lompo Yizreel sibawa seddé alauna Salo Yordan naéngkalinga makkedaé larini tentara Israélié
1Samuel31:8 Bajana wettunna polé tau Filistingngé untu' rampo'i sining ujué
1Samuel31:9 Narette'ni mennang ulunna Saul sibawa nalai waju musuna
1Samuel31:10 Nainappa iyaro waju musuna Saul nataroi ri laleng bola déwi Asytorét
1Samuel31:11 Iyakiya pabbanuwana Yabésh ri Giléad naéngkalingai aga iya puraé napogau' tau Filistingngé lao ri Saul
1Samuel31:12 nainappa sining tau iya kaminang baranié joppani polé kuwaro namallaleng puppu benni lao ri Bét-Séan. Napanonnoni mennang ujuna Saul sibawa ujuna ana'-ana' worowanéna polé ri témbo kotaéro nainappa natiwi ri Yabésh
1Samuel31:13 Sininna buku-bukunna napaddeppungengngi sibawa natampungngi ri yawana aju tamariskaé ri kotaéro

2Samuel1:14 Nakkeda Daud

2Samuel1:16 Nakkeda Daud lao ri kallolo Amalé'éro
2Samuel1:17 Purairo napuwélonni Daud iyaé mpatingengngé untu' Saul sibawa Yonatan
2Samuel1:18 sibawa mapparéntangngi kuwammengngi iyaéro élongngé riyappagguruwangngi lao ri suku Yéhuda. (Iyaéro élongngé tarokii ri laleng Kitta Yasar.)
2Samuel1:19 “Israél
2Samuel1:20 Tennapodo sining tau Gat-é dé' naéngkalingai iyaro karébaé. Tennapodo lorong-loronna Askélon dé' nalolongeng karéba passalennaro. Aja' narapii makkunrai Filistingngé gora-gora aja' narapii makkunrai kapéré'é kelli-kelli marowa.

2Samuel2:1 Purairo makkutanani Daud lao ri Puwangnge
2Samuel2:2 Nalaona Daud ri Hébron silaong iya duwa bainéna: Ahinoam makkunrai Yizreel sibawa Abigail jandana Nabal iyanaritu makkunrai Karmél.
2Samuel2:3 Makkuwatoro ana' buwana sibawa kaluwargana tungke'-tungke' maccowéni ri Daud
2Samuel2:4 Nanalaona sining tau Yéhudaé ri Hébron sibawa lanti'i Daud mancaji arung ri Yéhuda. Wettunna naéngkalinga Daud makkedaé sining tau Yabésh-é ri Giléad purani nakuburu ujuna Saul
2Samuel2:5 kirinni suro lao kuwaro sibawa palettu paseng
2Samuel2:6 Rimakkuwannanaro

2Samuel2:9 Kuwaniro Abnér nakka Isybosét mancaji arung ri daéra-daéra Giléad
2Samuel2:10 Patappulo taung umuru'na Isybosét wettunna ripancaji arung ri Israélié
2Samuel2:11 na Daud mapparéntai ri Hébron ri Yéhuda pituttaung sitengnga ittana.
2Samuel2:12 Riséuwaé esso laowi Abnér polé ri Mahanaim lao ri kota Gibéon
2Samuel2:13 Makkuwatoro Yoab (indo'na riyaseng Zéruya)
2Samuel2:14 Nakkedana Abnér lao ri Yoab
2Samuel2:15 Namajuna seppulo duwa tau polé ri suku Bényamin iya wakkélékiyéngngi Isybosét
2Samuel2:16 Tungke'-tungke' mennang sisullé sittikkeng gemme sisullé sigajang babuwana balinna
2Samuel2:17 Purananaro kajajiyanni musu maseroé
2Samuel2:18 Iya tellu ana'na Zéruya engkai kuwaro
2Samuel2:19 nanalellunni Abnér matteru-teru.
2Samuel2:20 Nagiling Abnér limonri sibawa makkutana
2Samuel2:21 Nakkeda Abnér
2Samuel2:22 Siseppi Abnér makkeda ri aléna
2Samuel2:23 Wettunna tette'i Asaél dé' namaélo mappésau
2Samuel2:24 Iyakiya Yoab sibawa Abisai napatterui lellungngi Abnér. Wettunna labu essoé
2Samuel2:25 Kuwaniro sining tau polé ri suku Bényamin masséddi sibawa Abnér
2Samuel2:26 Polé kuwaro gorani Abnér lao ri Yoab
2Samuel2:27 Nappébali Yoab
2Samuel2:28 Nainappa naseppung Yoab tarompé'é selaku tanrang lao ri ana' buwana kuwammengngi nappésau lellungngi tau Israélié
2Samuel2:29 Abnér sibawa ana' buwana puppu benni mabbarisi molai Lompo Yordan
2Samuel2:30 Mappésaunnana Yoab lellungngi Abnér
2Samuel2:31 Ana' buwana Daud purani nauno 360 tau pasukanna Abnér polé ri suku Bényamin.
2Samuel2:32 Purairo nakkani Yoab silaong ana' buwana ujuna Asaél nanakuburu'i ri laleng kuburu kaluwargana ri Bétléhém. Nainappa mennang joppa puppu benni nalettu ri Hébron ri subué.
2Samuel3:1 Ammusurengngé ri yelle'na iya sokongngéngngi kaluwargana Saul sibawa iya sokongngéngngi Daud matterui kajajiyang. Pédé mawatangngi Daud
2Samuel3:2 Ana'-ana' worowanéna Daud iya najajiyangngé ri Hébron iyanaritu mangoloéwé situru ajajiyanna: Amnon. Indo'na iyanaritu Ahinoam polé ri Yizreel.
2Samuel3:3 Kiléab. Indo'na iyanaritu Abigail
2Samuel3:4 Adonia. Indo'na iyanaritu Hagit. Séfaca. Indo'na iyanaritu Abital.
2Samuel3:5 Yitram. Indo'na iyanaritu Egla. Iya enneng ana' worowanéro rijajiyangngi ri Hébron.
2Samuel3:6 Ri wettu matteruna mupa musué ri yelle'na iya sokongngéngngi Daud sibawa iya sokongngéngngi kaluwargana Saul
2Samuel3:7 Riséuwaé esso Isybosét
2Samuel3:8 Namacai senna'na Abnér namakkeda
2Samuel3:9 Lebbi kessing muwi utulungngi Daud
2Samuel3:10 
2Samuel3:11 Dé' nappébali Isybosét muwi silappa ada

2Samuel3:13 Nappébali Daud
2Samuel3:14 Purairo kiring toni Daud suro lao mangolo ri Isybosét
2Samuel3:15 Nanasuroni Isybosét surona malai Mikhal polé ri lakkainna
2Samuel3:16 Iyakiya Paltiél matterui maccowériwi Mikhal naterito. Wettunna mennang lettu ri kota Bahurim

2Samuel3:22 Laonana Abnér
2Samuel3:23 Ripaissengini Yoab makkedaé poléni Abnér mangolo ri Arung Daud sibawa ripalaloi lao sibawa ritanggungngi asalamakenna.
2Samuel3:24 Namangolona Yoab ri arungngé sibawa makkeda
2Samuel3:25 Pasti naisseng Datu makkedaé iyaro apolénna Abnér banna untu' belléi Datu

2Samuel6:1 Nainappa naobbisi Daud prajuri-prajuri iya pommakessingngé ri Israélié kuwammengngi naddeppungeng
2Samuel6:2 Napimpinni mennang mattuju ri Baalé-Yéhuda
2Samuel6:3 Iyaro Petti Assijancingngé nalai polé ri bolana Abinadab ri tompo bulu-bulué nanapaénré'i ri laleng padati barué. Nainappa Uza sibawa Ahio
2Samuel6:4 sibawa Ahio joppa ri yolona.
2Samuel6:5 Daud sibawa sininna bangsa Israélié joppa ri yolona Pettiéro naséré-séréto siullé-ulléna sibawa makkélok-kélong untu' pakalebbii Puwangnge. Macculé kacapiwi mennang
2Samuel6:6 Wettunna mennang lettu ri onrong addésekeng gandong appunnangenna Nakhon
2Samuel6:7 Iyatoro wettué namacai Puwang Allataala lao ri Uza
2Samuel6:8 Nappammula wettuéro nariyaseng iyaro onrongngé Pérés-Uza. Macaini Daud nasaba Puwangnge mpunoi Uza.
2Samuel6:9 Iyakiya métau towi Daud ri Puwangnge sibawa makkeda
2Samuel6:10 Rimakkuwannanaro dé'na namaélo tiwii Petti Assijancingngéro ri Yérusalém
2Samuel6:11 Iyaro Petti Assijancingngé monroi kuwaro tellumpuleng ittana
2Samuel6:12 Naéngkalingani Arung Daud makkedaé Puwangnge barakkakiwi kaluwargana Obéd-Edom sibawa sininna appunnangenna nasaba Petti Assijancingngéro. Nanalaona ri bolana Obéd-Edom
2Samuel6:13 Wettunna sining tau iya makkaéngngi iyaro Petti Assijancingngé joppani enneng jongkana
2Samuel6:14 Nainappa Daud séré-séré sibawa penno sumange untu' pakalebbii Puwangnge. Iyaro wettué banna pakéi lipa lénang mapodang iya risiyoé ri babuwaé.
2Samuel6:15 Makkuwaniro Daud sibawa sininna ra'ya' Israélié palétté'i Petti Assijancingngéro lao ri Yérusalém
2Samuel6:16 Wettunna iyaro Pettié ritiwi muttama ri laleng kota
2Samuel6:17 Iyaro Petti Assijancingngé napalénne'i ri onronna ri laleng kéma iya puraé napasang Daud untu' Pettiéro. Nainappa makkasuwiyang Daud akkarobangeng ritunu sibawa akkarobangeng pappasidamé lao ri Puwangnge.
2Samuel6:18 Nainappa nabarakkaki ra'ya' Israélié sibawa asenna Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé.
2Samuel6:19 Nainappa mattawa-tawangngi inanré lao ri iya maneng mennang. Tungke' tau iya engkaé kuwaro muwi worowané iyaré'ga makkunrai nawéréngngi sikare' juku panggang
2Samuel6:20 Wettunna Daud lisu ri saorajaé untu' bérésellengiwi kaluwargana
2Samuel6:21 Nappébali Daud
2Samuel6:22 Mala sadiyaka ripakatuna lebbi naiyaro onna. Weddikko muwita mariyawaka
2Samuel6:23 Mikhal

2Samuel7:23 Ri sininna linoé dé' gaga bangsa pada-padanna Israélié. Israélié alé-aléna bangsa iya puraé Mupaleppe polé ri angatangengngé untu' mancaji umma'-Mu. Sininna pangkaukeng battowaé sibawa makalallaing iya Mupogau'é untu' mennang

2Samuel7:29 Rimakkuwannanaro
2Samuel8:1 Siyagangngaré wettu ri monrinna nagasani Arung Daud tau Filistingngéssi. Nacauni mennang sibawa nasittaiwi tanana mennang.
2Samuel8:2 Nacau towi Daud tau Moab-é. Nasuroi mennang léwu ri tanaé
2Samuel8:3 Nacau towi Daud Arung Hadadézer ana' Réhob iya mapparéntaé ri Zoba
2Samuel8:4 Natawanni Daud 1.700 tau tentara makkinnyaranna sibawa 20.000 tau tentara mallalenna. Naképoni sininna anyarangngé
2Samuel8:5 Kirinni tentara tau Siriaé polé ri Damsyik untu' duwangngi Arung Hadadézer. Iyakiya Daud caui mennang sibawa mpunoi 22.000 tau polé ri mennang.
2Samuel8:6 Nainappa Daud patettong akkémang-akkémang tentara ri laleng daérana mennang
2Samuel8:7 Kaliyawo-kaliyawo ulaweng iya napaké Hadadézer narampasa'ni Daud sibawa natiwii ri Yérusalém.
2Samuel8:8 Ri lainnaéro mala towi Daud gessa maéga senna polé ri Bétah sibawa Bérotai
2Samuel8:9 Naéngkalingani Arung Tou polé ri Hamat makkedaé nacauni Daud sininna tentarana Hadadézer.
2Samuel8:10 Nanasuroni Yoram ana' worowanéna untu' palettu selleng ri Arung Daud sibawa passalama'i nasaba apakalannaro
2Samuel8:11 Nakkasuwiyangenni Arung Daud sininna hadiyaéro lao ri Puwangnge untu' riyakkégunang ri laleng upacara assompangngé. Makkuwatoro nagaukengngi barab-barang ulawengngé sibawa péra' iya puraé narampasa polé ri Hadadézer sibawa bangsa-bangsa iya nacaué
2Samuel8:12 
2Samuel8:13 Lebbi tarompoi asenna Daud wettunna lisu puranana nauno 18.000 tau Edom ri Lompo Pejjé.
2Samuel8:14 Patettonni akkémang-akkémang tentara risininna Edom
2Samuel8:15 Makkuwaniro Daud paréntai sininna Israélié sibawa jagaiwi kuwammengngi ra'ya'na tuli rigaukengngi adélé enrengngé makessing.
2Samuel8:16 Iyanaé pejaba-pejaba tanré iya nakkaé Daud: Pallima tentara: Yoab ana' Zéruya; Jurutulisi'na saorajaé: Yosafat ana' Ahilud; Imang-ngimang: Zadok ana' Ahitub sibawa Ahimélékh ana' Abyatar; Jurutulisi'na wanuwaé: Séraya
2Samuel8:17 
2Samuel8:18 Kapala pengawal paribadinna arungngé: Bénaya ana' Yoyada; Imang-ngimang ri saorajaé: ana'-ana' worowanéna Daud.
2Samuel9:1 Riséuwaé esso makkutanai Daud
2Samuel9:2 Kaluwargana Saul mappunnai ata iya riyasengngé Ziba
2Samuel9:3 Nainappa makkutana arungngé
2Samuel9:4 Nakkutana arungngé
2Samuel9:5 Nanassurowanni Arung Daud mobbii ana' worowanéna Yonatanro.
2Samuel9:6 Iyaro ana' worowanéna Yonatan riyasengngi Méfibosét. Wettunna polé
2Samuel9:7 Nakkutana Daud
2Samuel9:8 Nasuju' si Méfibosét sibawa makkeda
2Samuel9:9 Nainappa riyobbi Ziba atanna Saulro ri arungngé
2Samuel9:10 Iko sibawa ana'-ana'mu enrengngé pabbantummu harusu jamai tanaéro untu' kaluwargana puwammu Saul
2Samuel9:11 Nappébali Ziba lao ri arungngé
2Samuel9:12 Méfibosét mappunnai ana' worowané iya riyasengngé Mikha. Sininna anggota kaluwargana Ziba mancajini ata-atanna Méfibosét.
2Samuel9:13 Makkuwaniro Méfibosét iya sala-salangngé ri iya duwa ajénaro monroi ri Yérusalém sibawa tuli manré ri saorajaé.
2Samuel10:1 Siyagangngaré wettu rimunrinna maténi Nahas arung Amon
2Samuel10:2 Namakkedana Arung Daud
2Samuel10:3 Wettunna mennang lettu ri Amon
2Samuel10:4 Nainappa natikkeng Hanun sining surona Daudro
2Samuel10:5 Iyakiya masirii mennang untu' lisu ri wanuwanna. Wettunna gau'éro ripaissengi Daud
2Samuel10:6 Nainappa namaingeki tau Amongngé makkedaé pangkaukenna mennang nassabariwi Daud musui mennang. Rimakkuwannanaro séwani mennang 20.000 tau prajuri Siria iya monroé ri Bét-Réhob sibawa Zoba
2Samuel10:7 Wettunna Daud naéngkalinga gau'éro
2Samuel10:8 Massuni tau Amongngé nanaatoro'i barisi'na ri yolona pintu gerbang Raba ibukotana mennang
2Samuel10:9 Naitani Yoab makkedaé tassipii ri pasukang balié ri yolo sibawa ri munri. Rimakkuwannanaro piléni tentara Israél iya pommakessingngé sibawa taroi mennang siyolo-olong sibawa tentara Siriaé.
2Samuel10:10 Lebbinna polé ri tentara Israélié nabbéréyangngi lao ri Abisai anrinna
2Samuel10:11 Makkedani Yoab lao ri anrinnaro
2Samuel10:12 Attahanno! Laono mai tammusu sibawa barani untu' bangsata sibawa untu' kota-kotana Allataalata. Tennapodo napogau'i Puwangnge aga iya Napuwéloé.”
2Samuel10:13 Majuni maggasa Yoab sibawa pasukanna
2Samuel10:14 Wettunna naita tau Amongngé lari tentara Siriaé
2Samuel10:15 Namaingekini tau Siriaé makkedaé ricauni mennang ri tau Israélié
2Samuel10:16 Nainappa Arung Hadadezér massuro mobbii tau Siriaé iya engkaé ri seddé alauna Salo Efrat
2Samuel10:17 Naéngkalingana gau'éro
2Samuel10:18 Iyakiya tau Israélié pasoroi tentara Siriaé. Daud sibawa pasukanna mpunoi 700 tau pappalari karétana balié
2Samuel10:19 Wettunna sining arung iya nakuwasaiyé Hadadézer naita makkedaé ricauni mennang ri tentarana Israélié
2Samuel11:1 Biyasanna majui mammusu arung-ngarungngé ri wettu lemmaé. Na ri wettu lemmaé ri taungngéro risuroni Yoab ri Daud maju mammusu silaong sining parawirana sibawa sininna tentara Israélié; nanacauni mennang tau Amongngé sibawa keppungngi kota Raba. Iyakiya Daud monroi ri Yérusalém.
2Samuel11:2 Riséuwaé arawéng
2Samuel11:3 Nainappa nassurowang Daud makkutanangngi niga iyaro makkunraié
2Samuel11:4 Nassurowanni Daud mobbii iyaro makkunraié
2Samuel11:5 Siyagangngaré wettu rimunrinna mammulani Batsyéba mattampu
2Samuel11:6 Masitta'ni Daud kiring parénta lao ri Yoab
2Samuel11:7 Wettunna Uria mangolo ri Arung Daud
2Samuel11:8 Nainappa makkeda Daud lao ri Uria
2Samuel11:9 Iyakiya dé' nalisu Uria sangadinna matinroi ri yolona pintu gerbanna saorajaé silaong sining pengawalna arungngé.
2Samuel11:10 Ripaissengini Daud gau'éro. Namakkutanana ri Uria
2Samuel11:11 Nappébali Uria
2Samuel11:12 Namakkeda Daud
2Samuel11:13 Namanréna sibawa riwérénni maéga énungeng angkanna mabo'. Iyakiya muwi iyaro wennié dé'to nalisu Uria ri bolana
2Samuel11:14 Pappa bajanana mokini sure' Daud lao ri Yoab
2Samuel11:15 Okina
2Samuel11:16 Na wettunna Yoab keppungngi iyaro kotaé
2Samuel11:17 Wettunna massu tentara balié polé ri kotaé sibawa gasai pasukanna Yoab
2Samuel11:18 Nainappa kiring Yoab suro lao ri Daud untu' paissengiwi joppana iyaro ammusurengngé.
2Samuel11:19 Paréntana Yoab lao ri suroéro
2Samuel11:20 nauéllé macayii sibawa makkutana ri iko
2Samuel11:21 Muwallupainiga pékkugi Abimélékh ana' Gidéonro riyuno ri Tébes? Dé'ga namaté nasaba séddi makkunrai maggenrungeng batu allélureng labbu polé ri yasé'na témbo'é lao ri aléna? Jaji
2Samuel11:22 Nanalaona iyaro suroé mangolo ri Daud sibawa paissengiwi aga riparéntangngi ri Yoab.
2Samuel11:23 Makkedani iyaro suroé
2Samuel11:24 Nainappa polé ri yasé'na témbo'é napanaki mennang
2Samuel11:25 Namakkeda Daud lao ri suroéro
2Samuel11:26 Wettunna naéngkalinga Batsyéba makkedaé maténi lakkainna
2Samuel11:27 Nainappa leppe'nana wettu abbaratanna
2Samuel12:1 Purairo nasuroni Puwangnge Nabi Natan méwai sita Daud. Laoni Natan ri aléna sibawa makkeda
2Samuel12:2 Si sugié mappunnaiwi maéga olokolo sibawa bimbala
2Samuel12:3 na si kasiyasié banna mappunnai sikaju ana' bimbala
2Samuel12:4 Riséuwaé esso engka topoléna tau sugié. Si sugié dé' namaélo géréi bimbala'na iyaré'ga sapinna kuwammengngi nanasui untu' topoléna. Iyakiya nalai ana' bimbala'na si kasiyasiéro
2Samuel12:5 Naéngkalinganaro macai senna'ni Daud nasaba pangkaukenna si sugiéro sibawa makkeda
2Samuel12:6 
2Samuel12:7 Nakkeda Natan lao ri Daud
2Samuel12:8 Akkarungenna Saul sibawa sining bainéna purani Uwérékko
2Samuel12:9 Magi nadé' mubati-batiwi parénta-parénta-Ku? Magi mupogau'i iyaro jaé? Muwassurompunoi Uria ri laleng ammusurengngé; muleppessangngi riyuno ri tau Amongngé
2Samuel12:10 Nasaba dé' muturusi-Ka sibawa muwalai bainéna Uria
2Samuel12:11 Mattanro-Ka maélo patakkennai abalaé lao ri iko iya polé ri kaluwargamu muto. Uwalai matu sining bainému ri yolona matammu nauwéréngngi tau laingngé iya matinroé matu silaong mennang ri lakessoé.
2Samuel12:12 Purano pogau' dosa mammekko-mekko
2Samuel12:13 Nanakkeda Daud lao ri Natan
2Samuel12:14 Iyakiya nasaba purani Datu napakatuna Puwangnge sibawa pangkaukengngéro
2Samuel12:15 Purairo lisuni Natan ri bolana. Ana' worowanéna Daud iya najajiyangngé Batsyéba jandana Uria
2Samuel12:16 Namassempajanna Daud lao ri Puwangnge kuwammengngi namajjappa iyaro ana'é. Mappuwasani sibawa tungke' wenni léwui puppu benni ri témbo'na bili'na.
2Samuel12:17 Nanalaona sining tomarajana saorajaé palécéi kuwammengngi naoto
2Samuel12:18 Siminggu rimunrinna maténi iyaro ana'é
2Samuel12:19 Wettunna naita Daud mabbici-bici ata-atanna
2Samuel12:20 Natokkonna Daud polé ri témbo'é
2Samuel12:21 Naitanaro
2Samuel12:22 Nappébali Daud
2Samuel12:23 Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé

2Samuel12:26 Iyaro wettué mammusu mupi Yoab méwai Raba ibukotana wanuwa Amon

2Samuel12:28 Makkekkuwangngé
2Samuel12:29 Nanapaddeppungenni Daud sininna tentarana
2Samuel12:30 Nalani Daud passigera polé ri ulunna arunna mennang nanapakéi ri ulunna. Iyaro passigera'é tane'na kira-kira 35 kilo sibawa riparamataiwi paramata magello. Tiwi towi Daud maéga senna barang rampasa polé ri kotaéro.
2Samuel12:31 Rilainnaéro narimpai pabbanuwana
2Samuel13:1 Absalom ana' worowanéna Daud mappunnai séddi anri makkunrai iya magelloé
2Samuel13:2 sibawa macinnai méwai siatinrong. Iyakiya iyaro mustahélé ri aléna nasaba dé'pa nakawing Tamar sibawa dé' nawedding siwollompollong sibawa worowané. Napikkiri'ni matteru-teru Amnon iyaro gaué angkanna malasa.
2Samuel13:3 Amnon mappunnai séddi sellao iya macca senna'é
2Samuel13:4 Makkedai Yonadab lao ri Amnon
2Samuel13:5 Nanakkeda Yonadab lao ri aléna
2Samuel13:6 Nanaléwuna Amnon ri onrong atinrongngé
2Samuel13:7 Nanakirinna paseng Daud lao ri Tamar ri saorajaé
2Samuel13:8 Nalaona Tamar kuwaro nanapoléini Amnon léwu ri onrong atinrongngé. Malani Tamar céddé lama labbu
2Samuel13:9 Purairo napassuni iyaro béppaé polé ri pancié nanapatalai. Iyakiya dé' namaélo manré Amnon. Makkedai
2Samuel13:10 Massu manennana tauwé polé ri bili'éro
2Samuel13:11 Iyakiya wettunna najjulluwang Tamar iyaro béppaé lao ri aléna
2Samuel13:12 Nappébali iyaro ana'daraé
2Samuel13:13 Rékko kajajiyangngi makkuwaéro
2Samuel13:14 Iyakiya dé' namaélo Amnon tunru
2Samuel13:15 Iyakiya purairo ribenci senna'ni Tamar ri Amnon sibawa iyaro paccéccéna lebbi battowai naiya pappojinna bunge'na. Nainappa makkeda lao ri anrinnaro
2Samuel13:16 Nappébali Tamar
2Samuel13:17 Naobbini pattumani paribadinna nainappa makkeda
2Samuel13:18 Iyaro pattumanié napogau'ni iyaro paréntana. Pakéyanna Tamar iyanaritu jumba labbu iya malampéé limanna. Iyaro wettué ana'-ana'dara iya dé'éppa nakawing biyasanna pakéi pakéyang pada-padaéro.
2Samuel13:19 Nanataroini awu ulunna Tamar
2Samuel13:20 Wettunna naita Absalom
2Samuel13:21 Naéngkalingana Daud passalenna kajajiyangngéro
2Samuel13:22 Macai senna'ni Absalom lao ri Amnon sibawa dé'na namaélo mabbicara sibawa aléna nasaba purai nakédo salai Tamar anrinna.
2Samuel13:23 Duwattaung rimunrinna pakangkani Absalom pésta aggoncingeng bulu bimbala ri Baal-Hazor
2Samuel13:24 Mangoloni ri Arung Daud sibawa makkeda
2Samuel13:25 Iyakiya mappébaliwi arungngé
2Samuel13:26 Namakkedana Absalom
2Samuel13:27 Iyakiya nasaba matterui maddessa
2Samuel13:28 Napparéntanni lao ri ata-atanna
2Samuel13:29 Napogau'ni iyaro ata-ataé paréntana Absalom
2Samuel13:30 Wettunna mennang mattengnga laleng mupi lisu
2Samuel13:31 Tokkonni arungngé
2Samuel13:32 Iyakiya makkedai Yonadab ana' Siméa kakana Daud
2Samuel13:33 Jaji aja' mumateppe makkedaé maté manenni ana' worowanéna Datu; saba' iya maté banna Amnon bawang.”
2Samuel13:34 Iyaro wettué larini Absalom. Naitani panganrowang saorajana Daud maéga tau polé turungiwi bulué polé ri Horonaim. Nalaona ri arungngé laporo'i gau'éro.

2Samuel14:1 Naisseng Yoab makkedaé muddani senna'ni Arung Daud lao ri Absalom
2Samuel14:2 rimakkuwannanaro nassuro mobbini séddi makkunrai macca iya monroé ri Tékoa. Wettunna lettu iyaro makkunraié
2Samuel14:3 Nainappa lao ri arungngé
2Samuel14:4 Nanalaona mangolo iyaro makkunraié ri arungngé
2Samuel14:5 Nakkutana arungngé ri aléna
2Samuel14:6 Mappunnaiwi atatta duwa ana' worowané
2Samuel14:7 Na makkekuwangngé
2Samuel14:8 Nappébali arungngé
2Samuel14:9 Nakkeda iyaro makkunraié
2Samuel14:10 Nappébali arungngé
2Samuel14:11 Nakkeda iyaro makkunraié
2Samuel14:12 Nakkedana iyaro makkunraié
2Samuel14:13 Nakkeda iyaro makkunraié
2Samuel14:14 Maté manekki matu; idi'é pada-padaki uwai iya tuppa'é ri tanaé nadé'na nawedding ripaddeppungeng paimeng. Muwi Allataala dé'tona napatuwoi matu paimeng tau iya matéénna; rimakkuwannanaro sitinajai Puwakku makkuraga kuwammengngi tau ripalié weddingngi lisu paimeng.
2Samuel14:15 Mangoloi atatta ri Puwakku nasaba riyancangngi atatta ri tauwé. Nanappikkiri atatta madécéngengngi atatta mabbicarai sibawa Puwakku nasibawang amménasang natarimai matu Puwakku iyaé parellunna atatta.
2Samuel14:16 Napikkiri'i atatta naéngkalingai matu Puwakku sibawa passalama'i atatta polé ri tau iya makkuragaé maélo mpunoi atatta sibawa ana'na atatta. Makkattai mennang paddésu'ki polé ri tana iya nabbéréyangngé Allataala lao ri umma'-Na.
2Samuel14:17 Mateppe'i atatta makkedaé iyaro jancinna Puwakku tanggungngi matu asalamakenna atatta saba' Puwakku iyanaritu pada-padai malaéka'na Allataala
2Samuel14:18 Nappébali arungngé
2Samuel14:19 Adanna arungngé
2Samuel14:20 Iyakiya napogau'i makkuwaéro untu' pacceppiwi parakaraéro sibawa madécéng. Mapanréi iyanaritu Puwakku pada-pada malaéka'na Allataala angkanna naisseng sininna iya kajajiyangngé.”
2Samuel14:21 Purairo riyobbini Yoab ri arungngé sibawa makkeda
2Samuel14:22 Suju'ni Yoab ri yolona Daud
2Samuel14:23 Najoppana Yoab lao ri Gésur untu' duppaiwi Absalom lisu ri Yérusalém.
2Samuel14:24 Iyakiya dé' napalaloi arungngé Absalom monro ri saorajaé. Makkedai arungngé
2Samuel14:25 Ripojiwi Absalom selaku tau iya kaminang magelloé risininna Israélié. Dé' gaga tau lebbi gello naiya aléna. Polé ri palakajéna lettu ri cappa gemme'na dé' gaga sala-salanna.
2Samuel14:26 Maworong senna gemme'na
2Samuel14:27 Absalom mappunnai tellu ana' worowané sibawa séddi ana' makkunrai iya magello senna'é
2Samuel14:28 Duwattaunni Absalom monro ri Yérusalém
2Samuel14:29 Nariséuwaé esso naobbini Yoab
2Samuel14:30 Namakkedana Absalom lao ri ata-atanna
2Samuel14:31 Nalaona Yoab ri bolana Absalom sibawa makkutana
2Samuel14:32 Nappébali Absalom
2Samuel14:33 Nanalaona Yoab mangolo ri Arung Daud sibawa palettu'i paréllaunna Absalom. Nanaobbini arungngé Absalom
2Samuel15:1 Purairo napassadiyangenni aléna Absalom séddi karéta musu sibawa anyaranna enrengngé limappulo tau pattinro.
2Samuel15:2 Esso-esso Absalom maélé moto nanatettong ri wiring lalengngé ri seddéna pintu gerbanna saorajaé. Tungke' tau iya maéloé mapparapekengngi parakarana lao ri arungngé
2Samuel15:3 namakkedana Absalom
2Samuel15:4 Nainappa adannasi
2Samuel15:5 Rékko engka tau iya maddeppériyéngngi Absalom untu' suju' sompai
2Samuel15:6 Makkuwaniro kédona Absalom lao ri tungke' tau Israélié iya maéloé mapparapekengngi parakarana lao ri arungngé
2Samuel15:7 Labe'nana patattaung
2Samuel15:8 Saba' wettukku monro mupa ri Gésur wanuwa Siria
2Samuel15:9 Nappébali arungngé
2Samuel15:10 Iyakiya ri yolonaro pura mémenni kiring sining suro lao ri sininna suku Israélié sibawa tiwi paseng
2Samuel15:11 Polé ri Yérusalém engka duwa ratu tau tinrosiwi Absalom lao ri Hébron. Dé' aga-aga naisseng passalenna assikongkolokengngéro sibawa turu manengngi mennang lao tennabata-batai.
2Samuel15:12 Na wettunna Absalom makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng
2Samuel15:13 Nainappa séddi parennung laporo'i ri Daud
2Samuel15:14 Nanakkedana Daud lao ri sininna pegawénna iya engkaé ri Yérusalém
2Samuel15:15 Nappébali mennang
2Samuel15:16 Nanajoppana arungngé ritinrosi ri sininna kaluwargana sibawa pegawénna
2Samuel15:17 Wettunna arungngé sibawa sininna pattinrona joppa salaiwi kotaé
2Samuel15:18 Tettong maneng pegawénna arungngé ri seddéna wettunna pasukang pengawalna arungngé mabbarisi laloiwi. Makkuwatoro enneng ratuna prajuri iya puraé maccowériwi polé ri Gat
2Samuel15:19 Naitanaro makkedani arungngé lao ri Itai pamimpinna iya enneng ratuna tau prajuri'éro
2Samuel15:20 Dé'pa mumaitta monro kuwaé
2Samuel15:21 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Itai
2Samuel15:22 Nappébali Daud
2Samuel15:23 Teri maneng ra'ya'é sibawa macenno wettunna sining pasukanna Daud salaiwi kotaé. Nainappa nalléttoi arungngé ana' Salo Kidron riyaccowéri ri sininna pasukanna
2Samuel15:24 Imang Zadok sibawa Imang Abyatar engka kuwaro silaong sininna tau Léwi iya tiwiéngngi Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge. Iyaro Petti Assijancingngé ripalénne
2Samuel15:25 Namakkedana arungngé ri Zadok
2Samuel15:26 Iyakiya rékko dé' napojika Puwangnge
2Samuel15:27 Nakkeda paimeng arungngé lao ri Zadok
2Samuel15:28 Maéloka mattajeng ri seddéna onrong-ngonrong alléttong saloé ri padang kessi'é narapi tarimaka karéba polé ri iko.”
2Samuel15:29 Nainappa Zadok sibawa Abyatar natiwii iyaro Petti Assijancingngé lisu ri Yérusalém nanaonro mennang kuwaro.
2Samuel15:30 Purairo naludunni Daud sapatunna. Silaonni sininna tau maccowériyéngngi tuppuiwi Bulu-bulu Zaitun nanaterito sibawa nabombo ulunna tanrang mabbarata.
2Samuel15:31 Wettunna ripaissengngi lao ri Daud makkedaé maccowé towi Ahitofel silaong assikongkolokenna Absalom
2Samuel15:32 Wettunna Daud lettu ri tompo bulu-bulué ri onrong biyasanna tauwé massompa lao ri Puwangnge
2Samuel15:33 Makkedani Daud ri aléna
2Samuel15:34 Iyakiya weddikko tulukka
2Samuel15:35 Imang Zadok sibawa Abyatar engka towi kuwaro. Paissengiwi mennang sininna séuwa-séuwaé iya muwéngkalingaé ri saorajaé.
2Samuel15:36 Ahimaas ana' Zadok sibawa Yonatan ana' Abyatar naccowéri toni ambo'na
2Samuel15:37 Nanalisuna Husai sellaona Daudro ri Yérusalém

2Samuel16:2 Makkutanani Arung Daud lao ri aléna
2Samuel16:3 Namakkutana arungngé lao ri aléna
2Samuel16:4 Namakkedana arungngé lao ri Ziba
2Samuel16:5 Wettunna Daud lettu ri Bahurim
2Samuel16:6 Siméi genrungngi Daud nenniya pegawé-pegawénna sibawa batu
2Samuel16:7 Ritanroini ri Siméi sibawa ada-ada
2Samuel16:8 Purani murampasa akkarungenna Saul! Makkekkuwangngé nahukkunno Puwangnge nasaba muwunoi maéga senna sumpulolona Saul. Puwangnge pura mabbéréyangngi akkarungemmu lao ri ana'mu Absalom. Makkekkuwangngé maténo
2Samuel16:9 Abisai anrinna Yoab ana' Zéruya
2Samuel16:10 Iyakiya makkedai arungngé lao ri Abisai sibawa Yoab kakana
2Samuel16:11 Namakkeda paimeng Daud lao ri Abisai sibawa lao ri sininna atanna
2Samuel16:12 Naullé naitai matu Puwangnge iyaé anrasa-rasangngé nanabarakkakika selaku passulléna tanroéro.”
2Samuel16:13 Nainappa Daud sibawa sining pattinrona patterui joppana
2Samuel16:14 Poso senna'ni arungngé sibawa sininna ana' buwana wettunna lettu ri Salo Yordan
2Samuel16:15 Wettuéro Absalom sibawa sininna tau Israélié iya tinrosiyéngngi muttama'ni ri kota Yérusalém
2Samuel16:16 Wettunna Husai sellaona Daud iya matinuluéro siruntu Absalom
2Samuel16:17 Iyakiya makkutanai Absalom ri aléna
2Samuel16:18 Nappébali Husai
2Samuel16:19 Nainappani
2Samuel16:20 Nainappa makkeda Absalom lao ri Ahitofel
2Samuel16:21 Nappébali Ahitofel
2Samuel16:22 Jaji
2Samuel16:23 Iyaro wettué tungke' pangajana Ahitofel ritarimai samanna iyaro adanna Allataala; muwi Daud iyaré'ga Absalom turusiwi sining pangajana.
2Samuel17:1 Dé' namaitta puranaro
2Samuel17:2 Maéloka gasai wettunna poso sibawa koddo sumange'na. Maéloka patassélengngi
2Samuel17:3 Iyakiya sininna ana' buwana maéloka palisui lao ri Puwakku pada-pada botting makkunraié lisu lao ri lakkainna. Dé'ga Puwakku banna macinnaiwi nyawana séddi tau bawang? Iya laingngé dé' nariyagaga matu.”
2Samuel17:4 Iyaro pangajaé naita makessinni Absalom sibawa sininna pamimping Israélié.
2Samuel17:5 Namuni makkuwaro makkedai Absalom
2Samuel17:6 Wettunna polé Husai mangolo
2Samuel17:7 Nappébali Husai
2Samuel17:8 Pasti naisseng Petta makkedaé Daud sibawa ana' buwanaro iyanaritu pajuwang iya poré. Sissekkang mennang beruwang komba iya teddéngngé ana'é. Nainappani Daud iyanaritu prajuri mappangalamang iya dé'é naengka nabbenni silaong ana' buwana.
2Samuel17:9 Naullé makkekkuwangngé massubbuni ri laleng séddié gowa iyaré'ga onrong laingngé. Jaji
2Samuel17:10 Na muwi sining tau iya kaminang baranié sibawa poré pada-pada singaé pasti métauto matu. Saba' sininna tau Israélié naisseng iyaro ambo'na Petta iyanaritu pahlawangngi
2Samuel17:11 Rimakkuwannanaro
2Samuel17:12 Taruntu'i matu Daud muwi kégi monro
2Samuel17:13 Rékko lariwi ri laleng séddié kota
2Samuel17:14 Naéngkalinganaro makkedani Abasalom sibawa sininna tau Israélié
2Samuel17:15 Purairo nalaporo'ni Husai lao ri Imang Zadok sibawa Imang Abyatar passalenna pangajana Ahitofel sibawa pangajanato lao ri Absalom sibawa sining pamimpinna Israélié.
2Samuel17:16 Nakkeda Husai
2Samuel17:17 Wettuéro Yonatan ana' Abyatar sibawa Ahimaas ana' Zadok mattengngang mattajeng ri seddéna mata uwai En-Rogel
2Samuel17:18 Iyakiya iyaé sisengngé séddi ana' worowané nasitujuwangngi mitai mennang
2Samuel17:19 Bainéna punna bolaéro pallebba silampa kaing ri yasé'na kalebbong bujungngéro nanatale gandong ri yasé'na
2Samuel17:20 Poléni sining surona Absalom ri bolaéro sibawa makkutana ri makkunraié onna
2Samuel17:21 Massuni Ahimaas sibawa Yonatan polé ri bujungngéro
2Samuel17:22 Nainappa Daud sibawa ana' buwana malléttoiwi Salo Yordan
2Samuel17:23 Wettunna napahang Ahitofel makkedaé dé' nariturusi pangajana
2Samuel17:24 Lettu'ni Daud ri kota Mahanaim wettunna Absalom malléttoiwi Salo Yordan
2Samuel17:25 Purani riyakka Amasa ri Absalom mancaji kapala pasukang sulléiwi Yoab. Amasa ana' Yitra tau Ismaél; indo'na riyaseng Abigail ana' Nahas
2Samuel17:26 Makkémani Absalom sibawa ana' buwana ri tana Giléad.
2Samuel17:27 Wettunna Daud lettu ri Mahanaim
2Samuel17:28 Tiwini mennang mangko

2Samuel18:1 Napaddeppungenni Arung Daud sininna ana' buwana
2Samuel18:2 Purairo naleppessanni maju mammusu ri laleng tellu kalompo
2Samuel18:3 Iyakiya mappébaliwi sining tauwéro
2Samuel18:4 Namakkeda arungngé
2Samuel18:5 Nainappa napparéntang arungngé lao ri Yoab
2Samuel18:6 Nanajoppana pasukanna Daud musui pasukang Israélié
2Samuel18:7 Ricauni pasukang Israélié ri ana' buwana Daud; iyaro akalangngé battowa senna
2Samuel18:8 Mallebbanni ammusurengngé ri sininna daéraéro
2Samuel18:9 Wettunna Absalom tonangiwi bagalna
2Samuel18:10 Séddi polé ri ana' buwana Daud mitai nanalaporo'i lao ri Yoab
2Samuel18:11 Nappébali Yoab

2Samuel18:13 Na ébara'na uwunoi Absalom onna
2Samuel18:14 Nakkeda Yoab
2Samuel18:15 Nainappa seppulo ana' buwana Yoab borongngi nanaunoi.
2Samuel18:16 Napaonini Yoab tarompé'é angkanna mappésauni ana' buwana lellungngi pasukang Israélié.
2Samuel18:17 Nainappa nakka ujuna Absalom nanaggenrungengngi ri laleng bujung iya maliyungngé ri ale'é. Iyaro bujungngé natébunni sibawa batu gangka matanré. Sininna pasukang Israélié larini tungke'-tungke' lao ri bolana.
2Samuel18:18 Ri wettu tuwona mupa Absalom purai napatettongeng aléna séddi tugu ri Lompo Arungngé
2Samuel18:19 Nainappa makkeda Ahimaas ana' Zadok lao ri Yoab
2Samuel18:20 Nakkeda Yoab

2Samuel18:22 Iyakiya maddessa'i Ahimaas ri Yoab

2Samuel18:25 Gorani iyaro pajagaé liyawa paissengiwi gau'éro arungngé

2Samuel19:1 Ripaissengini Yoab makkedaé teriwi Arung Daud sibawa mabbarata untu' Absalom.
2Samuel19:2 Natappinrana apakalangngé iyaro essoé mancaji sara lao risininna tentarana Daud nasaba naéngkalingai mennang makkedaé nateringiwi arungngé ana' worowanéna.
2Samuel19:3 Mammekko-mekkoni mennang lisu ri kotaé
2Samuel19:4 Nasamponi arungngé rupanna nanawating sibawa macenno
2Samuel19:5 Laoni Yoab mangolo ri arungngé sibawa makkeda
2Samuel19:6 Namaséiwi Datu sining tau iya benciyéngngi Datu
2Samuel19:7 Sitinajanna moto'i Datu nalao tettong ri saliweng untu' pattennangngi atinna ana' buwana Datu. Mattanroi atatta nasabbing Puwangnge
2Samuel19:8 Nanaoto'na arungngé nanalao massu
2Samuel19:9 Ri yelle'na sininna suku Israélié momponi assisalangngé. Adanna mennang
2Samuel19:10 Talanti'i Absalom mancaji arung
2Samuel19:11 Iyaro ada-adaé lettu towi ri Arung Daud. Rimakkuwannanaro nasuroni Imang Zadok sibawa Imang Abyatar makkutangngi risining pamimpinna Yéhuda makkuwaé
2Samuel19:12 Tenniyaga iko sumpulolona sibawa siyajinna? Masa iko paccappureng méllauwi kuwammengngi ulisu?”
2Samuel19:13 Risuro towi mennang ri Daud powadangngi Amasa makkuwaé
2Samuel19:14 Makkuwaniro Daud naulléni malai atinna sininna tau Yéhudaé angkanna kiring mennang paseng lao ri arungngé kuwammengngi nalisu ri saorajaé silaong sibawa sininna pegawénna.

2Samuel19:19 “Naéllauwi atanna
2Samuel19:20 Mainge'ni atatta
2Samuel19:21 Naéngkalinganaro makkedani Abisai ana' Zéruya
2Samuel19:22 Iyakiya makkedai Daud lao ri Abisai sibawa Yoab kakana

2Samuel19:24 Makkuwatoro Méfibosét eppona Saul
2Samuel19:25 Wettunna lettu Méfibosét polé ri Yérusalém untu' duppaiwi arungngé
2Samuel19:26 Nappébali
2Samuel19:27 Mala ripétenna'i atatta lao ri Datu. Iyakiya Datu pada-padai malaéka'na Allataala. Rimakkuwannanaro pogau'ni aga iya nasengngé Puwakku makessing.
2Samuel19:28 Sininna siyajinna ambo'na atatta sitinajai rihukkung maté ri Datu
2Samuel19:29 Nappébali arungngé
2Samuel19:30 Namappébali Méfibosét
2Samuel19:31 Makkuwatoro Barzilai tau Giléad-éro engkani polé ri Rogelim untu' tinrosi arungngé malléttoiwi Salo Yordan.
2Samuel19:32 Macowa senna'ni Barzilai
2Samuel19:33 Makkedai arungngé ri aléna
2Samuel19:34 Iyakiya mappébaliwi Barzilai
2Samuel19:35 Umuru'na atatta aruwani pulona taung
2Samuel19:36 Dé' nasitinaja atatta tarima appalang battowaéro. Banna macinnai atatta tinrosiwi Datu siyagangngaré bawang jongkana polé ri liwenna Salo Yordan.
2Samuel19:37 Purairo
2Samuel19:38 Nappébali arungngé
2Samuel19:39 Nainappa Daud sibawa sininna ana' buwana malléttoiwi Salo Yordan. Nainappa Daud bauwi Barzilai sibawa siassimangeng sibawa aléna. Purairo lisuni Barzilai ri bolana.
2Samuel19:40 Sininna pasukanna Yéhuda sibawa sitengnga pasukanna Israélié tinrosiwi arungngé malléttoiwi saloé. Purairo matteruni arungngé lao ri Gilgal
